name: Zoe Lofgren
subject: final ask of the year!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LOFGREN FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [#]
This is it, folks. We’re hours away from an election year, and hours away from the books closing on our final public FEC fundraising deadline of the year. We CANNOT come up short, so I’m asking again: will you help us close our fundraising gap before midnight? We’re still about $1k short. Please dig deep and chip in whatever you can.

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zoe1223?amount=10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zoe1223?amount=10]

Thanks and Happy New Year!

Zoe
Congresswoman Zoe Lofgren is a strong fighter for California’s values in Washington. As the Chair of the California Democratic Congressional Delegation, she has been on the front lines of expanding and protecting the Democratic Majority. Zoe has dedicated her career to fighting for our diverse communities and needs your help. Click here to donate to Zoe’s campaign → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zlem?refcode=emfooter&amount=10&recurring=auto] PAID FOR BY LOFGREN FOR CONGRESS

#### **[New Year's Auction](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=7QmA2ZRRQzQ3ZCS8wNmA0I2bJLxScUQf16bioTVzfk3zhiIN6EuKekvTKKzpfMul&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_hours_auction_1&n=2) \- ENDS MIDNIGHT TONIGHT**
Happy New Year, Peter,******** Just a reminder that this is the final day to bid [on our Team Kennedy New Year’s auction.](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=7QmA2ZRRQzQ3ZCS8wNmA0I2bJLxScUQf16bioTVzfk3zhiIN6EuKekvTKKzpfMul&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_hours_auction_1&n=3)
**Help Team Kennedy finish the year strong! Tonight is the deadline for FEC fundraising and we're excited to offer these limited edition auction items, including unique opportunities to connect with our future President, our future First Lady, and the campaign leadership team.**
* [Hike with RFK Jr. and his dogs](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=7QmA2ZRRQzQ3ZCS8wNmA0Mt9m07ALE6jgIE-VQAKjROSAuxV4fKnO7ysIBenf4xxO6_jWxSZZrWQgiXRID4i5UsMUMMfElcq9s3e11LJfPkBk1_yDKd2XfDCK7UN6Cfk&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_hours_auction_1&n=4)
* Del Bigtree's Health Think Tank
* [Virtual Baking Lesson with Cheryl Hines](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=7QmA2ZRRQzQ3ZCS8wNmA0Mt9m07ALE6jgIE-VQAKjROSAuxV4fKnO7ysIBenf4xxO6_jWxSZZrWQgiXRID4i5UsMUMMfElcq9s3e11LJfPlk5E5_LlrSTVADVB9iBtvc&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_hours_auction_1&n=5)
* [New Year’s Day phone call with RFK Jr.](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=7QmA2ZRRQzQ3ZCS8wNmA0Mt9m07ALE6jgIE-VQAKjROSAuxV4fKnO7ysIBenf4xxO6_jWxSZZrWQgiXRID4i5UsMUMMfElcq9s3e11LJfPmFPRlD-5dotJB5sAqNqajZ&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_hours_auction_1&n=6)
* [“Inside the Campaign” briefings](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=7QmA2ZRRQzQ3ZCS8wNmA0Mt9m07ALE6jgIE-VQAKjROSAuxV4fKnO7ysIBenf4xx0jUygAeGHVJcBr-0ItYiEqBGqVcQ0sLIlxbJRq_nn0U&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_hours_auction_1&n=7) with Amaryllis Kennedy, Charles Eisenstein, Del Bigtree, and Holly Baird
* [Stand Up World comedy show with Mike Binder – 2 tickets](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=7QmA2ZRRQzQ3ZCS8wNmA0Mt9m07ALE6jgIE-VQAKjROSAuxV4fKnO7ysIBenf4xxO6_jWxSZZrWQgiXRID4i5UsMUMMfElcq9s3e11LJfPkJ2gmHYwk-PLPNHrCvzIPS&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_hours_auction_1&n=8)
* [Two VIP tickets to comedy show with RFK Jr. ](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=7QmA2ZRRQzQ3ZCS8wNmA0Mt9m07ALE6jgIE-VQAKjROSAuxV4fKnO7ysIBenf4xxO6_jWxSZZrWQgiXRID4i5UsMUMMfElcq9s3e11LJfPkM75Yhzm46xUiMwn5R-U73&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_hours_auction_1&n=9)
* [Books signed by RFK Jr.](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=7QmA2ZRRQzQ3ZCS8wNmA0Mt9m07ALE6jgIE-VQAKjROSAuxV4fKnO7ysIBenf4xx0jUygAeGHVJcBr-0ItYiEqBGqVcQ0sLIlxbJRq_nn0U&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_hours_auction_1&n=10)

[](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=7QmA2ZRRQzQ3ZCS8wNmA0I2bJLxScUQf16bioTVzfk3zhiIN6EuKekvTKKzpfMul&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_hours_auction_1&n=11) Signed copies of RFK Jr.'s latest book, The Wuhan Cover Up, as well as previously published books, The Life of St. Francis of Assisi, and Robert Smalls: The Boat Thief, are all [live on the auction](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=7QmA2ZRRQzQ3ZCS8wNmA0I2bJLxScUQf16bioTVzfk3zhiIN6EuKekvTKKzpfMul&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_hours_auction_1&n=12) now.
The auction ends tonight, Sunday, December 31st, 11:59 EST! Due to FEC regulations, donations must be completed on our [website using this link.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate-new-years-auction?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_hours_auction_1&n=13) Please be sure to include the $15 flat shipping fee for physical items. Auction winners and those purchasing "Buy it now" items will be contacted by a team member when the auction concludes. For any virtual or in-person auction items, a team member will contact purchasers for scheduling. Please try to complete all payments by 11:59PM EST tonight, to help us meet our $6 million goal for the 4th quarter of 2023. **Thank you for your unmatched support of this movement. On behalf of RFK Jr., we hope that your family has a wonderful holiday season and an incredible start to 2024.**

[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

It's New Year's Eve, so I'll get directly to the point.

AIPAC is promising to spend "at least" $100 million defeating progressive Peace candidates brave enough to call for peace in Gaza.

With lives on the line, we need to have the back of progressives, which is why Our Revolution is committed to raising money to have their back against AIPAC's attacks.

That's why I'm asking you to help us close our $5,559 budget gap before tonight's end-of-year fundraising deadline. name: The GIFFORDS Team
subject: LAST CHANCE: Don’t miss your final opportunity to contribute to GIFFORDS PAC
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We deserve a better future—a future free from gun violence—and we’re going to keep fighting for it in 2024 and beyond.
#

Team, with just hours left until our critical end of year FEC fundraising deadline passes, right now is your absolute **last chance** to donate to GIFFORDS PAC before 2023 comes to an end.
[**Before you head out to your New Year’s Eve festivities tonight, will you please contribute $3 or anything you can to GIFFORDS PAC right away?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-dec23.vYScJV&refcode=em231231-2-30&amount=3&t=1&akid=7126%2E3935704%2EFG00eB)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
**[DONATE $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-dec23.3M4OtG&amount=3&refcode=em231231-2-30&t=2&akid=7126%2E3935704%2EFG00eB)**
We need to finish the year with strong numbers that show we are a coalition ready to take on the gun lobby and demand action from our elected officials.
We deserve a better future—a future free from gun violence—and we’re going to keep fighting for it in 2024 and beyond. But we can’t do this work without your support.
So please, don’t miss this opportunity to make your final donation of the year to GIFFORDS PAC and help us reach our end of year fundraising goal.
You can use this link to donate:
[**https://go.giffords.org/go/Last-Chance-2023**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-dec23.vYScJV&refcode=em231231-2-30&amount=3&t=3&akid=7126%2E3935704%2EFG00eB)
Thank you. With your help, we’re one step closer to reaching our goals for the year.
\- The team at GIFFORDS PAC

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=7126%2E3935704%2EFG00eB) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

body:
Please review this before midnight!
| | |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/76229350/446994873/-1986725773?&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1387-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImEyZjcxNDY1LTM5YTgtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMWY1NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=7j9u1xxf3lgQIN67z_31_QpFwelZi1p7o8pjNhjZIkQ=)
Peter, I’m reaching out to our top Emerge supporters one last time before 2023 ends because we’re counting on you to step up now. **Our 2X match expires tonight, and we’re still falling $1,730 short of our must-hit fundraising goal.**

**This is the LAST CHANCE to double your impact for our women-led movement before our most crucial deadline of the year. So our team pulled your supporter record to help confirm where you stand.**
| | **Official Contribution Record**
---
_**Supporter ID: dpwillis67@gmail.com**_
---
_**Your End-of-Year Gift Status: PENDING**_
---
_**2X MATCH EXPIRES: 11:59 P.M.**_
---
| | [MATCH MY GIFT NOW](https://click.everyaction.com/k/76229351/446994876/-1986725773?&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1387-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImEyZjcxNDY1LTM5YTgtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMWY1NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=7j9u1xxf3lgQIN67z_31_QpFwelZi1p7o8pjNhjZIkQ=)
---
Expanding our ranks of Democratic women at EVERY level of government is critical to upholding our essential rights. **Whether it's abortion access, affordable health care, or voting rights – it's all on the line in 2024.**

As a dedicated Emerge supporter, you know the difference our recruitment, training, and democracy building programs make in every election. Democrats count on Emerge women to run, win, and continue our urgent fight. So please, Peter:

**[Make your end-of-year gift to Emerge now – before our 2X match EXPIRES at midnight – and every dollar will be DOUBLED to fuel our movement and empower Democratic women up and down the ballot in 2024 and beyond.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/76229353/446994878/-1986725773?&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1387-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImEyZjcxNDY1LTM5YTgtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMWY1NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=7j9u1xxf3lgQIN67z_31_QpFwelZi1p7o8pjNhjZIkQ=)**

Thank you for your urgent support,

Jasmine Smith
Development Manager, Emerge
| | [SUPPORT EMERGE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/76229355/446994880/-1986725773?&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1387-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImEyZjcxNDY1LTM5YTgtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMWY1NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=7j9u1xxf3lgQIN67z_31_QpFwelZi1p7o8pjNhjZIkQ=)
---
Emerge is a national organization working to recruit, train, and get Democratic women elected across the country, and we are so grateful to have you on our team. Our alums are strong voices for Democratic values — and they are running up and down the ballot to fight for working families. They are fighting for critical issues that affect our communities, such as the environment, accessible and affordable health care, social justice, and education equity. We need more alums fighting for us across the country.

You may notice that we send a lot of emails asking for your support — that’s because we win when everyone does what they can to help. Our organization depends on thousands of actual people who care about our democracy and want to see positive change in our communities and across our country by building power through investing in Democratic women. **[If you’d like to donate, click here.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/76229356/446994882/-1986725773?&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1387-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImEyZjcxNDY1LTM5YTgtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMWY1NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=7j9u1xxf3lgQIN67z_31_QpFwelZi1p7o8pjNhjZIkQ=)**

name: =?utf-8?B?UmFxdWVsIFRlcsOhbg==?=
subject: Mine and Eddie’s NYE Anniversary 🎊
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terán for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_123123_sundayeoq [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_123123_sundayeoq]
As you might know, Eddie and I met when I knocked on his door while canvassing in 2012. But, did you know the sparks really flew and our fates were sealed on that New Year’s Eve?
Help us celebrate our anniversary with a $10 donation! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=x_123123_sundayeoq2]
We found ourselves at the same New Year’s Eve party, then got married a year later on that same day. And I haven’t spent one away from him since.
New Year’s Eve has looked a lot different since then. We’ve spent them with little EJ, and of course, racing to meet fundraising deadlines.
Can we count on you to rush $10 now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=x_123123_sundayeoq2]
This year is no different! We’re fundraising today so that in 2024 we can knock on doors, distribute literature to voters, and run digital ads to help people turn out and vote. Every dollar you contribute will help us start the year strong to win on August 6th.
Your investment will make a critical impact (and help us out in our yearly tradition). Together, we can win this.
Raquel Terán
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=x_123123_sundayeoq2]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=x_123123_sundayeoq2 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=x_123123_sundayeoq2] Raquel Terán is running to represent Arizona's 3rd Congressional District as the first Latina congresswoman from Arizona.
For nearly 20 years, she's been fighting for higher wages for workers, healthcare for all, and better schools for our children.
She's helped build broad and diverse coalitions that have beaten Republicans like Donald Trump, Joe Arpaio, and Kari Lake.
Now she's ready to take the fight to Congress, but we'll need your support to win. Chip in today! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=x_123123_sundayeoq2]
Terán for Congress
PO Box 1041
Glendale, AZ 85311
United States
Paid for by Terán for Congress

subject: the last request I’ll make in 2023
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gloria for Tennessee
body:
We’re SO close.

| Hey y’all, Pardon me for interrupting your New Year’s celebrations, but I had to email one last time before the year ends. We’re SO close to meeting our goal of 6,932 donations. Seriously, I’m amazed by how many folks have stepped up in the last few days. But I’m still counting on another 173 supporters to make their first contribution before midnight. This is the last time I’ll ask in 2023. Please, chip in to support our campaign. Here’s a unique link where you can give: **_[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gj_em_bax_eoq_q42023?refcode=RequestFor_dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76229413/446995062/265304508?refcode=ea.a3f71465-39a8-ee11-bea1-002248221f54&ms=ea.a3f71465-39a8-ee11-bea1-002248221f54&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhM2Y3MTQ2NS0zOWE4LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjFmNTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9gqZNRWAnAWiHXo-zkmkRq2kg1pgQNJ2akPupGYKwXs=)_** Falling short of our target would put us in a tough position as we start our election year. After tonight, we have to make another public filing with the FEC to show our opponents + the pundits our financial strength. We need to prove that the grassroots momentum is with us, since Marsha Blackburn is relying on PACs + corporate CEOs to fund her reelection. This is our campaign’s most important deadline yet + I’m sincerely requesting your support. Please, donate anything you can at the link below — before 12am. **_[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gj_em_bax_eoq_q42023?refcode=RequestFor_dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76229415/446995064/265304508?refcode=ea.a3f71465-39a8-ee11-bea1-002248221f54&ms=ea.a3f71465-39a8-ee11-bea1-002248221f54&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhM2Y3MTQ2NS0zOWE4LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjFmNTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9gqZNRWAnAWiHXo-zkmkRq2kg1pgQNJ2akPupGYKwXs=)_** Stay safe tonight & Happy New Year, Gloria _Sent from my iPhone. Please excuse typos._ |
> _Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address and sometimes takes up to a week to sync in our systems. If you have donated — thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign._

Gloria for Tennessee

Nashville, TN 37205

On December 17th, 2023, I exclusively reported that Republican Texas Senator Ted Cruz attended a dinner with DeSantis-ally, Nevada Republican Senator Adam Laxalt on the same day that President Trump held a rally for his supporters in Reno, Nevada. I received numerous calls from insiders warning me about Cruz's support for Adam Laxalt, and other anti-Trump elements of the Republican Senate, controlled by Kentucky Senator, and lead RINO, Mitch McConnell. I exclusively reported that Jeff Roe, a political consultant and strategist who runs Adam Laxalt's campaign apparatus in Nevada also controlled Ted Cruz's failed Presidential campaign in 2016, giving speculators yet another connection between the DeSantis camp, Laxalt, and Ted Cruz.

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: One final, humble request before midnight:
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Growing up poor, my family didn’t have much. We had each other, and we had the American dream. We had hope.
#

Peter, it’s Ruben again. This is my last email today, and I’ll make it quick.
We started today off with a HUGE gap between where we were and where we needed to be by our deadline. To be honest, we didn’t even think we could hit our goals.
We’re just a few hours from midnight. A few hours from our last FEC deadline before the election year.
I probably don’t need to reinforce how important this deadline is to you at this point (_but it is really, really important_).
So look... growing up poor, my family didn’t have much. We had each other, and we had the American dream. We had hope.
Right now, too many people are losing hope. For the kids growing up like me, we cannot fall behind. We cannot fall short. Because if we do, we could lose this campaign.
That could mean Trump in the White House and Kari Lake in the Senate. An absolute nightmare I’m going to do everything I can to stop.
Are you with me?
There isn’t much time left, so I’m turning to you. Please. I’ll be watching for donations at this link:
[**https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/ruben-personal-12-31-23**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-dec23.csjDeB&refcode=em231231-5-sm&t=1&akid=1636%2E734936%2EGqbi2d)
This is our last chance, Peter. This email. This donation. Right now.
Thank you in advance, and Semper Fi.
Ruben
[DONATE $3](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-dec23.csjDeB&refcode=em231231-5-sm&t=2&akid=1636%2E734936%2EGqbi2d)

Paid For By Gallego for Arizona

Because this is not only the FINAL deadline of this dark year in American history, it’s the FIRST FEC-mandated close of books since Crooked Joe had a State Supreme Court REMOVE President Trump’s name from the 2024 ballot! | | - Thank you, Team Trump \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Donald J. Trump Date: Sun, December 31, 2023 Subject: MY FINAL EMAIL OF THE YEAR To: <dpwillis67@gmail.com> | | Dear Patriot, This is my final email to you of 2023. I couldn’t possibly conclude the year without first THANKING you for all of your support. Because of you, we were able to prevail against the most vicious political attacks in the history of our country. Crooked Joe and his Democrat accomplices tried to systematically ELIMINATE their leading opponent – ME – through wrongful arrests, indictments, lawsuits, sham trials, and a mugshot. And then, when each of their attacks failed, they did the unthinkable and simply REMOVED my name from the ballot. These were fear tactics designed to intimidate you out of pursuing our noble mission to restore power to the hardworking citizens of our country. But our year-end report – filed with the Federal Election Commission – will show that these fear tactics not only failed to stop us, they AWAKENED the full spirit of the Silent Majority. Tonight at 11:59 P.M. is our last chance to give 2023 all we’ve got before we close the books on this dark year and officially enter 2024 – the most critical election year in American history. With your support, we will post a massive grassroots fundraising haul, proving that NOTHING can intimidate the American people! So, I was checking to see who hasn’t donated yet before tonight’s Federal Election Commission deadline – and as of the last time I checked the roster, I didn’t see your name. But please do NOT get me wrong... ...I am certainly not trying to make you feel pressured into making a contribution. If you can’t donate right now because of the sinister Crook in the White House who’d rather spend all day thinking about how he can JAIL his leading opponent than lift a single finger to help our own citizens, then just hit the back button, and go about your day. I mean it. I’m only reaching out, because I know that so many of our donors choose to wait until the final day of the month to help us reach our fundraising goal. In fact, it’s always our BIGGEST day of the month for that reason. People must see the clock ticking down to midnight and decide this is the moment to spring into action.And this time, it’s the FINAL day of the year – so we’re expecting a massive surge! So, if that describes you, then now is your chance before 2023 is OVER! | | THANK YOU! DONALD J. TRUMP | | Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. | Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. Trump for President 2024, Inc. and Save America.

name: Maxwell Frost
subject: last chance before 2024
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAXWELL FROST FOR CONGRESS
body:
Hey Peter, I hope all is well and you had a great holiday season!

I just got off a call with our finance team for our final check-in of the year and honestly, I’m really worried. _**We’re still $9,900 short of our critical End of Year goal and we only have 5 hours to make up the difference.**_

This is the LAST public filing deadline before 2024. We’re putting every last penny into ramping up our organizing and voter turnout efforts ASAP. And for good reason.

The earlier we get a jump on the work in the new year, the more Democratic voters we’ll bring into our movement to keep me in Congress and end Republican extremists’ stranglehold on Florida.

**Everyone’s waiting to see if our grassroots strength can hold up into 2024 – including the fascists who are desperately hoping we’ll fail and lose the momentum we need to compete against them. But I refuse to let that happen.**

Everything we raise now will determine whether we can keep up the fight to end gun violence, protect abortion access, advocate for environmental justice, and bring the change necessary to lead us to a brighter future in Florida and across the country.

Peter, this is your last chance in 2023 to make an impact and fuel our movement before this critical deadline, which is why I’m personally asking you to chip in right now.

Here’s a personalized link to donate $27, or whatever you can before 2024. I’ll be keeping an eye out for yours: [**_https://secure.actblue.com/donate/maf-em-pge?refcode=20231231_em_fr_b1_EOYLow_en &amount;=27_**](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/HiJuYRndYHMgQ6pCH1pZkQ~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRndIlaP0TIaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDIzMTIzMV9lbV9mcl9iMV9FT1lMb3dfZW4mYW1vdW50PTI3JmNkbWM9MmFLVW56aGdSNzcxb2tyZEkwdjlNMU5KTGNBJnJlZmNvZGUyPTJhS1VuemhnUjc3MW9rcmRJMHY5TTFOSkxjQSZyZWZjb2RlY2RtYz0yYUtVbnpoZ1I3NzFva3JkSTB2OU0xTkpMY0FXA3NwY0IKZYNaBJJl7-j0yVIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAGk~)

Thank you for taking the time to read this, Peter. I hope you and your loved ones have a Happy New Year!

All my gratitude,

Maxwell

PAID FOR BY MAXWELL FROST FOR CONGRESS

Maxwell Frost for Congress
PO Box 772671
Orlando, FL 32877-2671
United States

Peter, this is your last chance in 2023 to make an impact and fuel our movement before this critical deadline, which is why I’m personally asking you to chip in right now. Here’s a personalized link to donate $27, or whatever you can before 2024. I’ll be keeping an eye out for yours: ~ Thank you for taking the time to read this, Peter. I hope you and your loved ones have a Happy New Year! All my gratitude, Maxwell PAID FOR BY MAXWELL FROST FOR CONGRESS Maxwell Frost for Congress PO Box 772671 Orlando, FL 32877-2671 United States | Email is an important way for us to communicate with our supporters. You can .

Democrats are in a panic about my race for Congress. They want to buy CD6 to force you under their rule. Tell them no thanks. Donate TONIGHT. | | | |

|
## The Swamp is in a panic. Your generous 2023 contribution is how we win.
Friend,
Democrats are running articles ([FrederickNewsPost](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=ea58267b4c&e=5bb5efcda7)) in our newspapers _near panicking_ that they do not have a popular name to run for this open seat in CD6 for which I am your frontrunner for the GOP nomination. They are begging for their crowded field of candidates to become even more crowded. Four of their candidates live outside the District and are seeking to buy the seat. At least one GOP candidate also lives outside our district. What a joke they want to represent you and me!

[Help me ensure that never happens](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=adebf6ab8b&e=5bb5efcda7). In a time when everything matters for our families, we need a strong voice who can win to speak for us in Congress.

I humbly submit I am that candidate and I pledge to keep fighting for you. I am so close to reaching our goal. But some of you are reading this and not sure if you should help. Now is the time to help.

[Any donation enters you to win Kash Patel's new book 'Government Gangsters.' A donation of $1000+ TONIGHT and I will send you his book!](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=b0d69bf95b&e=5bb5efcda7)

Your investment in my campaign is already valued as it follows a near $2 million recent investment from last year where we saw many CD6 precincts overwhelmingly vote for me in both the primary and general election.

No other candidate on either side of the aisle has spent as much as I have on name and issue ID in the last 18 months in Maryland.

Contribute securely tonight before 11:59pm at: [https://secure.anedot.com/dan-cox-for-congress-inc/donate](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=0b980e370a&e=5bb5efcda7) or you can put your check in the mail tonight dated 12/31/2023 for any amount and mail to: Dan Cox for Congress, P.O. Box 3952, Frederick, MD 21705.

Freedom, Faith and Victory,

Hi, Friend,

As the year comes to a close, I'm reaching out with a sense of urgency and
gratitude for your ongoing support.

opportunity for every American.

With less than 5 hours left, our fundraising goal is nearly within
reach—all we need is 197 more donors! Even $1 will help us reach our
critical goal, and we can’t afford to miss it.

—Qasim Rashid

name: Lorinser Campaign
subject: Last one
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/TOP.png]
This is my last e-mail of the year, so we need to knock this final fundraising goal out of the park.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
Friend,
With hours to go before our final FEC fundraising deadline, we're just $1,025 shy from hitting our end-of-the-year goal.
Can you be one of 205 people who gives $5 before midnight? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=express_lane_5]
If you've saved your payment info with ActBlue Express,
your donation will go through immediately:
RUSH A $5 CONTRIBUTION [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=express_lane_5]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
Friend,
I'm so proud that our average donation is just $30. I believe in campaign finance reform because big-money doesn't belong in politics.
No dark money, no corporate PACs, no ultra-wealthy donors looking for influence. It's just us; hardworking, everyday people giving what they can, and every dollar counts.
Even though we're out-funded, we have the most donors out of every candidate in the race . We have the most contributors and have raised more money from donations under $200 than the rest of the field, including incumbent Rep. Jack Bergman.
That's the statistic that matters most to me. Our opponent may have a bigger dollar figure, but we have more people-power; more grassroots support.
No matter the amount, your contribution helps me fight for universal healthcare, better jobs, family sustaining wages, environmental protection, affordable childcare, public education, and reproductive freedom.
I can't wait to get back to addressing these issues with you through our e-mails, but tonight, I come to you with a hard ask. We're determined to put up a big number, and I need your help doing it.
Whether you're able to pitch in tonight, I am eternally grateful for your support, loyalty, and generosity. Friend, none of this is possible without you in my corner.
Thank you.
-Dr. Bob
Bob Lorinser
Candidate for US Congress
Northern Michigan / Upper Peninsula
Democrat, MI01
shop.votedrbob.com [shop.votedrbob.com]
Or, send a check to:
"Friends of Dr. Bob"
PO Box 936
Marquette, MI 49855

clean_body: I need to talk to you | Fellow American This is the most important email you will receive all day. Keep reading. I was going to wait to send this to you, but I’m getting anxious, and we’re running out of time. This is coming directly from me, Kari Lake: a critical fundraising deadline of my campaign is just around the corner. Meeting these early fundraising deadlines is crucial to a winning campaign. So, I’m offering you an unprecedented opportunity to make a difference in the most important Senate race of 2024. | - We only get one chance to make a strong start. Let's make it count. These are REAL goals and REAL deadlines. We can’t miss them. We really can’t. Kari Lake Candidate for U.S. Senate in Arizona Paid for by Kari Lake for Senate

name: Katie Porter
subject: Quick message before midnight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
This race is winnable—thanks to supporters like you.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=35710%2E3422442%2EigvElF)
**[Our end of quarter deadline is tonight at midnight, can you chip in before the new year?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231231-3?refcode=EMAO23_1_QUI_20231231_V1_F&refcode2=35710_3422442_igvElF&akid=35710%2E3422442%2EigvElF)**
* * *
Derek,
As I’ve mentioned in past emails, recent polls haven’t been our best. But the difference between first, second, and third place is just a few points. **And here’s the thing: the TV and digital ads that will really sway this election are starting soon.** We’ll have debates and more campaign stops. I can’t wait—I love campaigning!
**So as we enter 2024, I feel optimistic, and ready to leave those bad poll numbers in 2023.** This race is winnable—thanks to supporters like you. I’d love to start the new year off by meeting our end of quarter goal, and by posting an impressive 2023 fundraising haul that dissuades super PACs from supporting my opponents.
**[Can you contribute before the end of the fundraising quarter?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231231-3?refcode=EMAO23_1_QUI_20231231_V1_F&refcode2=35710_3422442_igvElF&akid=35710%2E3422442%2EigvElF)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231231-3?refcode=EMAO23_1_QUI_20231231_V1_F&refcode2=35710_3422442_igvElF&akid=35710%2E3422442%2EigvElF)
Thanks so much, and Happy New Year!
Katie Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAO23_1_QUI_20231231_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=35710_3422442_igvElF&akid=35710%2E3422442%2EigvElF)**

Katie Porter for Senate

Irvine, CA 92616

name: Mazi Pilip
subject: Breaking News: New York special election declared!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mazi Pilip for Congress
body:
My name is Mazi Pilip- I'm the GOP candidate in the NY special election

| |
---
| | | | [](http://links.primaryupdate.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=2db3eacf5d5e436da733ee5d4018e2d2&_e=EwEGTcw8oocIuoIFdRxwcCS_iyFXvrYDmaKS3jvoJLL6vS_N1wCBvB7GpFY4auGce7RzLE4OeoAZ1nHpgPjh76M7HbliAZL_X4OZoQqUBqSAPbb9hR1Hyuyc91vj-BxxS2HW_jj9cYfoMl6PilXRB-2PQceDegg2WAht8IZYoSeSoylUXPL7aMvf5V6NgIBsZK2KHLwJVQkJ6aoHmQG4KiYGXxMgi1SjL-W8WAU8GZcG4z49UhjxYsVbr07TlRdwfUSd7LWSIeScf_Zrb0xhXgHn4ZQglWvoGNw9joxDOVfEqPI_WUwnT4yTH-L34aLWMKx2xkJSoadxptcKFgyp0r78wj-uaL5DU70RV8TNqM826zFRXtOIHJbLrsoBbQpbQgOkrMYVh0f1eU3RsVk8JvDd6kzuihP1NkKR58l1LeKNLfsvPpNM1ZL_hi6w3OEQ)
---

Friend,

I never thought I'd have running water, let alone be running for Congress.

My name is Mazi Melesa Pilip, but you can call me Mazi for short!

I'm the Republican nominee running in the New York special election that was just declared.

If you don't already know- this is the one & only seat we absolutely have to win to defend the House Majority.

I'm a black, Jewish woman & I'm not afraid to tell you that I am 100% Pro-Law Enforcement, Pro-Border security, and Pro-Family.

Democrats & the liberal media have spent years saying the GOP will never support someone of my ethnicity & my creed.

They say women like me don't exist & that we can't be any of those things.

And now they're spending millions to bury me in negative headlines, hit pieces, and TV commercials.

They take great pleasure in laying waste to minority women who don't fall in line with their sacred narrative.

And without your help today- I'm afraid I'm going to be one of them.

The only way to stop them is to come out of the gates strong with the full weight and might of the conservative movement behind me.

---
| [](http://links.primaryupdate.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=2db3eacf5d5e436da733ee5d4018e2d2&_e=EwEGTcw8oocIuoIFdRxwcCS_iyFXvrYDmaKS3jvoJLL6vS_N1wCBvB7GpFY4auGce7RzLE4OeoAZ1nHpgPjh76M7HbliAZL_X4OZoQqUBqSAPbb9hR1Hyuyc91vj-BxxS2HW_jj9cYfoMl6PilXRB-2PQceDegg2WAht8IZYoSeSoylUXPL7aMvf5V6NgIBsZK2KHLwJVQkJ6aoHmQG4KiYGXxMgi1SjL-W8WAU8GZcG4z49UhjxYsVbr07TlRdwfUSd7LWSIeScf_Zrb0xhXgHn4ZQglWvoGNw9joxDOVcGaPhT2MU6B9xTeSrcUfdGmjJPg4pJLH6ArvTb1oG4Vz5FdGmuahqi3IzirAaHRBC_AZgAHGZuez_SF7SQLBetEaHsKkbohYCxU9_1gyNy6m4eTY7tZmy1wnskSujfU5qwtdNE_GmBSaX2en7rwx7i)
---

I've just launched my campaign to keep NY-03 red & so I'm humbly asking you to stand with me as we embark on this sprint to the finish line.

---
| | [STAND WITH MAZI PILIP TODAY](http://links.primaryupdate.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=2db3eacf5d5e436da733ee5d4018e2d2&_e=EwEGTcw8oocIuoIFdRxwcCS_iyFXvrYDmaKS3jvoJLL6vS_N1wCBvB7GpFY4auGce7RzLE4OeoAZ1nHpgPjh76M7HbliAZL_X4OZoQqUBqSAPbb9hR1Hyuyc91vj-BxxS2HW_jj9cYfoMl6PilXRB-2PQceDegg2WAht8IZYoSeSoylUXPL7aMvf5V6NgIBsZK2KHLwJVQkJ6aoHmQG4KiYGXxMgi1SjL-W8WAU8GZcG4z49UhjxYsVbr07TlRdwfUSd7LWSIeScf_Zrb0xhXgHn4ZQglWvoGNw9joxDOVeQp4qinafSwQupYcKliO3itl7VLLlUuJetpClW3rU1bjhMS8XENbp0PppCNcDjWteXhwii0YjTsLnhj0KXdOqyXSy1xJonzP75JwtC3ld3JmpfbmppK12GXsu5AtbpsOzkK22Cd8OTgnZIvbb_3drq)
---

Early voting begins in just a few weeks. Voters are already planning to head to the polls & that makes this the most important race in the nation right now.

I hope you'll step up & stand with me today to defeat the Democrats & hold the House Majority.

---

clean_body: My name is Mazi Pilip- I'm the GOP candidate in the NY special election | | | | | | Friend, I never thought I'd have running water, let alone be running for Congress. My name is Mazi Melesa Pilip, but you can call me Mazi for short! I'm the Republican nominee running in the New York special election that was just declared. If you don't already know- this is the one & only seat we absolutely have to win to defend the House Majority. I'm a black, Jewish woman & I'm not afraid to tell you that I am 100% Pro-Law Enforcement, Pro-Border security, and Pro-Family. Democrats & the liberal media have spent years saying the GOP will never support someone of my ethnicity & my creed. They say women like me don't exist & that we can't be any of those things. And now they're spending millions to bury me in negative headlines, hit pieces, and TV commercials. They take great pleasure in laying waste to minority women who don't fall in line with their sacred narrative. And without your help today- I'm afraid I'm going to be one of them. The only way to stop them is to come out of the gates strong with the full weight and might of the conservative movement behind me. | I've just launched my campaign to keep NY-03 red & so I'm humbly asking you to stand with me as we embark on this sprint to the finish line. | | Early voting begins in just a few weeks. Voters are already planning to head to the polls & that makes this the most important race in the nation right now. I hope you'll step up & stand with me today to defeat the Democrats & hold the House Majority. | | And if I can ever help you the way you've helped me, please just say the word. All the best, Mazi Melesa Pilip GOP Nominee Special Election NY-03 | - | | Paid for by Mazi Pilip for Congress 228 S Washington St STE 115 Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: My big plans tonight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
What better way to ring in 2024 and this pivotal election year?

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=1883%2E4032634%2EIO-LTV)
---
Happy New Year’s Eve! I hope you and your loved ones have had a happy, healthy, and restful holiday season. My big plans for tonight involve sitting on the couch. Bruce and I will continue our annual New Year’s Eve tradition of re-watching Casablanca. It’s a story about love, loyalty, and courage. And it gives me hope. Hope for people who survive and flourish even against long odds. Hope for young people on the cusp of building a new life. Hope for older people looking for a safe landing place. Hope for people at the edge of a big transition — fighting and praying for a brighter dawn. What better way to ring in 2024 and this pivotal election year? We’re standing at the edge of our own transformation right now. I’m up for re-election next year. And across the country, everything from health care and child care to abortion rights and our democracy itself will be on the ballot and on the line. I will continue working my heart out for Massachusetts families. And I will continue doing everything I can to help re-elect President Joe Biden and Vice President Kamala Harris. We have a lot of work ahead of us in the new year, so I’m asking if you can chip in to help keep up the fight and the hope. **[Please make a donation, if you can, to help hit our fundraising goal before tonight’s last FEC deadline of the year. $28 or whatever you can contribute would go a long way to help make our movement even stronger for this powerfully important election year and beyond.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1122?amount=28&t=8&akid=1883%2E4032634%2EIO-LTV)**

---
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_ |
---
| [DONATE NOW: $3](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1122?t=22&express_lane=true&amount=3&akid=1883%2E4032634%2EIO-LTV)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $15](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1122?t=24&express_lane=true&amount=15&akid=1883%2E4032634%2EIO-LTV)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $28](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1122?t=26&express_lane=true&amount=28&akid=1883%2E4032634%2EIO-LTV)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $50](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1122?t=28&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=1883%2E4032634%2EIO-LTV)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $100](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1122?t=18&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=1883%2E4032634%2EIO-LTV)
---
| [OTHER AMOUNT](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1122?t=20&express_lane=true&akid=1883%2E4032634%2EIO-LTV)
---

---
If I get the honor of serving another term in the U.S. Senate, I’ll keep working to build on the progress we’ve already made and get done what still needs getting done. Like universal child care. A wealth tax to fund opportunity for all. A nationwide law to codify the right to an abortion. An end to Washington corruption. But this re-election campaign is only possible with the continued support of people like you. Let's keep working side by side to make sure the new year is a brighter one for everyone who's struggling and everyone who needs a government on their side. **[If you can, please make a donation before midnight — the final FEC deadline of the year — to power our grassroots movement.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1122?amount=28&t=14&akid=1883%2E4032634%2EIO-LTV)** Have a safe and happy New Year's Eve, and thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth
| | | |

body:
If we want 2024 to bring in A New Brand for Montana, it starts NOW.

Ryan Busse puts principles over politics. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/KuMB1syMs0W9O3v5MuCvqQ2?unsubscribedata=OLJN0b%2BZR4BGFthM8gEeZr7JmLkRZDf5p0bq0KxclcGUWeYbP2Rf%2Fy%2B6sUjDF%2FMjyOkKVSWg1DcDHxGc4VRwRvDLVBnx8CrJEi4ZElvqMY237h5nngAbFmljqGHXp85YvKPkB3sckGnGq%2Bc3YvoWj%2F6A%2BYEVkCcnFB6hbFOmqslRMDdJNtlXhyDPYcWGMI3gCcGqn3fiOwNaPcm4bnrf1xWE0zvnWqfg%2Fc4wf2vZJf1zj%2B37YoYsX5MvfGhMsffWNTX1lwImRA4uoOdCJoDkHAzpLmXYSgHbcaAgAG5KLIX7tNOWnrfBanO%2BZcLUldBUm6dbP%2F%2BaSgMlRkd7YAYjohP9KzweaquTiPGKOQ6nUV%2BHvnrox9WCul50eOIlh7cnS6T2zmanPd7KbjVSNL%2BSW8vgrP2%2Bj3zzFHpNn9Eor12hgJpHXuj6IvQhy84SVooW)
---
| | Hi Peter. It’s almost 2024 and time to celebrate, so I’ll keep this brief.

**If we want 2024 to bring in A New Brand for Montana, it starts NOW.**

In 2024, we will not vote for the “leadership” of bullies that celebrates kicking kids off health care, that takes pleasure in taking away the autonomy of women, and that pits folks against each other because of their differences. We will not.

**In 2024 we will bring A New Brand to Montana — one that calls us to be better versions of ourselves.** A place where the goodness of our state uplifts every single person that inhabits it. **A place and time when a new leader defeats the ugliness Gianforte has cast upon this state.**

I believe that next year’s holiday season is going to be better than this one. It’s going to happen. But it’s going to take all of us.

That’s why I need to ask you one final time to chip in $10 _(or any amount, really — even just a dollar would mean you're in it to win it)_ before tonight at midnight and help us reach our $23,500 goal. Here’s the link if you need it: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfm-em-fr-eoy23](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76230116/447005940/1281336112?source=SBD_RB_EM_FR_DEC23_2_4_EOY&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDgzNDciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTg2NTFhODctM2NhOC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIxZjU0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ts7jD4Qw-IFQ2K6pKIYeMU9QFfPnmTDt1mCAMZ0sc4I=)

Thanks so much for everything this year, Peter. I’m so proud to have you on my team and can’t wait to see what we accomplish together in 2024.

Happy New Year!

— Ryan

clean_body: If we want 2024 to bring in A New Brand for Montana, it starts NOW. Ryan Busse puts principles over politics. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Hi Peter. It’s almost 2024 and time to celebrate, so I’ll keep this brief. If we want 2024 to bring in A New Brand for Montana, it starts NOW. In 2024, we will not vote for the “leadership” of bullies that celebrates kicking kids off health care, that takes pleasure in taking away the autonomy of women, and that pits folks against each other because of their differences. We will not. In 2024 we will bring A New Brand to Montana — one that calls us to be better versions of ourselves. A place where the goodness of our state uplifts every single person that inhabits it. A place and time when a new leader defeats the ugliness Gianforte has cast upon this state. I believe that next year’s holiday season is going to be better than this one. It’s going to happen. But it’s going to take all of us. That’s why I need to ask you one final time to chip in $10 (or any amount, really — even just a dollar would mean you're in it to win it) before tonight at midnight and help us reach our $23,500 goal. Here’s the link if you need it: = Thanks so much for everything this year, Peter. I’m so proud to have you on my team and can’t wait to see what we accomplish together in 2024. Happy New Year! — Ryan | | | ---|---|--- = For more than 25 years, Ryan was a successful executive within the gun industry. But he also saw how unchecked extremism could take away American freedoms and even jeopardize our democracy. Ryan sees the same thing happening to Montana: wealthy extremist Greg Gianforte bought his seat with his own millions, and now he’s raising our taxes, making Montana unaffordable, defunding our public schools, locking up our public lands, hijacking our freedoms and rigging the system for the rich. Ryan is running as an advocate for ALL Montanans and as a champion for our Montana way of life.** | = = PAID FOR BY BUSSE FOR MONTANA • DEMOCRAT • PO BOX 8537 • KALISPELL, MT 59904 If you would like to unsubscribe, click here: You can also =. They’re supporting this campaign because they know I can win – and they know I’ll be the pro-choice voice Virginians deserve in Congress. But I can’t get to Congress without you. So before you log off, will you chip in $5 or whatever you’re able to help me hit my critical public fundraising goal tonight? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks for everything. Onward to 2024! Briana | This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a key way for us to stay in touch and make sure you get the latest updates from our campaign. But if you would like to . | | = | PAID FOR BY BRIANA SEWELL FOR CONGRESS Friends of Briana Sewell PO Box 1849 Woodbridge, VA 22195 United States

name: Eric Sorensen (personal)
subject: one last ask before midnight, Peter:
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Eric Sorensen for Illinois
body:
| Peter, I’m glad I could catch you before we all get ready to watch the ball drop and celebrate the new year. I know we have been in touch quite a bit this week, so I’ll get right to the point. Tonight at midnight is the final FEC fundraising deadline of my first year in Congress. This will be the last report we submit before our March primary. We’re working hard to send a strong message about what our campaign is made of. As it stands, we’re about $5,710 short of our quarterly goal. With just a few more grassroots contributions, we’ll be able to show real strength on this report. I’d be remiss if I didn’t ask one last time: will you make a last-minute donation before midnight to help us reach our goal? Yours could be the one that puts us over the hump. Here’s a good link: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-q4-2023](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/4PfL751D8g4IfLXFw3QfXV5Wo_6TP_ujTmJFoO05AE16Yq3cn0CZ98JsJ-X0f71bUM8BtRYWsT0NooHHP6BH05zP4LXimWhqoRgu6VYjalBBEdy9RH-NSjh2_CJoFArTzkA3NK-SZNsjRN3ohmMdtzdasJNWiqwM5crRXk7-Obm4G9pbuvCGA2cHd8S_GqjRvFiRxnzMeT5EZzL_ZoGnu6bdOJqz-8zQnW2n9xSV8YbyWGJ2b_y4TU49Jn6fpYEZKhPBPSC274kFltFcWtFWlgU0oaOEj8OOcoRUWPXm_3xibtJUlnxu_ULsSf-xhqgVIbNh2-MRaMAPXBWk0Cmp04JVJL-UNpBsM6yZ35uS6ZqZ4aJeaD3R2KdwxtLvbsPQWbLoI2V34MEhnoo34uHVBRnRqoYPoFwVBqkQZ9EWmLIUrSiCF0XvqtSNQIU3HRvSX3t011dLjpwG-sCixtNlTv0irGn0dPoZEMNbFa5X9WUDjZZtKJY3U9ykzJx0ZoSDKOfccvQh5hqPUfJl4zLvxw/42m/5oRBDMASQ1uzr2C588Rnkw/h0/ivhPNXwK8oXanMYAmUScYTXXhOiwzEc9_72kq0Klx-M)** Every day in Congress is a reminder of just how critical it is that Democrats retake the House. From the weeks and months without a Speaker, to the baseless impeachment attempts, to monthly threats of our government closing, it’s clear that Republicans are moving at the mercy of the farthest-right members of their caucus. The best way we can push back on their dangerous agenda is by relegating them back into the minority. There are very few pathways to winning back the House without keeping Illinois’ 17th District blue. And I should add: Our fundraising goals aren’t random -- they represent the minimum amount we need to educate and engage the voters who will keep this competitive district blue. Please chip in to send a strong message that we’re well-prepared to defend this seat. name: madeleine dean (personal)
subject: reflections before midnight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mad4PA PAC
body:
With midnight right around the corner, I’m reflecting on 2023 while also getting ready for 2024. At the top of my to do list for next year? Ensure we regain a Democratic majority in the House to bring sanity back to Congress and get back to making progress for all Americans.

With the national GOP strategizing for next year, I know our FEC filing holds greater importance tonight. Our showing will help inform their overall swing state strategy in Pennsylvania. We need to show the strength of this grassroots team – and I know we will.

I believe in our ability to be successful and defend the Philly suburbs with wide margins – we’ve done it before, and we’ll do it again. I hope you’ll consider standing with me by donating before midnight.

Here’s a link:

**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/md_eoy2023#Peter](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76230925/447015522/979907179?amount=25&refcode=12312023_md_eoy_fr_13&refcode2=9e157bfd-3ea8-ee11-bea1-002248221f54&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTE1N2JmZC0zZWE4LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjFmNTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xqdYctceg4gZSbR5Cmm9H-VjVgB-XPvp-ifPveBrqpk=)**

I hope you have a happy and safe New Year!

– Mad

_Sent from iPhone_

* * *
_Madeleine is an attorney, professor, mother, grandmother, and Member of Congress, representing Pennsylvania’s 4th Congressional District of Berks and Montgomery Counties. She is an outspoken leader who champions progressive priorities such as education, universal access to healthcare, gun safety, and ethical government.**Madeleine Dean has built a reputation for getting things done, and we need her to continue to be our voice to serve us in Congress.**_ _We are excited to have you on Team Dean! clean_body: With midnight right around the corner, I’m reflecting on 2023 while also getting ready for 2024. At the top of my to do list for next year? Ensure we regain a Democratic majority in the House to bring sanity back to Congress and get back to making progress for all Americans. With the national GOP strategizing for next year, I know our FEC filing holds greater importance tonight. Our showing will help inform their overall swing state strategy in Pennsylvania. We need to show the strength of this grassroots team – and I know we will. I believe in our ability to be successful and defend the Philly suburbs with wide margins – we’ve done it before, and we’ll do it again. I hope you’ll consider standing with me by donating before midnight. Here’s a link: = I hope you have a happy and safe New Year! – Mad Sent from iPhone Madeleine is an attorney, professor, mother, grandmother, and Member of Congress, representing Pennsylvania’s 4th Congressional District of Berks and Montgomery Counties. She is an outspoken leader who champions progressive priorities such as education, universal access to healthcare, gun safety, and ethical government.Madeleine Dean has built a reputation for getting things done, and we need her to continue to be our voice to serve us in Congress.** We are excited to have you on Team Dean! name: Tammy
subject: Ringing in the new year
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| It’s getting late, so I’ll keep this short.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=1808%2E35263%2EpePpGl)
Hi Peter, Happy New Year’s Eve! It’s getting late, I know, so I’ll keep this short. A lot is going to change after tonight once we ring in the election year. Our Senate race will become more expensive, the right-wing attacks will be more frequent, and our work to defend the Democratic Senate majority will kick into high gear. So before our midnight deadline, I’m asking you one final time: Will you make a donation toward our end-of-year fundraising goal and help prepare our campaign to win this toss-up Senate race in 2024? Here’s my secure link you can use to donate: **[secure.actblue.com/donate/tbe-em-dec23?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-dec23.PriOoE&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20231231_PM2_V1_S1&t=4&akid=1808%2E35263%2EpePpGl)** Thank you so much for your unwavering support. I hope you and your loved ones have a happy, healthy New Year. — Tammy

subject: Before 2024...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
A personal link for you to make your final donation of 2023.
#
With just hours left until our end-of-year deadline, we have an important ask to make of you:
Will you chip in $5 to our campaign before midnight tonight? We’ve set up a personalized link just for you:
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20231231-2?personal=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20231231-2.12qsVh&personal=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=em20231231-5568-P_FND_EOQ_LNK&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=5568%2E2526796%2Ebp1jPa)
We’re asking for your support at the 11th hour because we set an ambitious, but necessary $1.3 million fundraising goal — and we’re still coming up short.
These goals are not made up numbers. Our team calculates what resources we’ll need to pay for everything from the costs to print flyers for the district, Alexandria’s travel to important events, a living wage for our staff, and so much more.
Hitting this goal not only allows us to fund our programs, but it also sends a signal to the entire political establishment that our movement is stronger than ever and that there is broad support for our platform from Medical for All to a Green New Deal.
**If you’re able, will you use your personal link below to make a $5 contribution before our end-of-year deadline at midnight tonight?**
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20231231-2?personal=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20231231-2.12qsVh&personal=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=em20231231-5568-P_FND_EOQ_LNK&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=5568%2E2526796%2Ebp1jPa)
Alexandria can’t do this work alone. She needs a movement alongside her, and you are a critical part of that very movement.
Thank you for everything and Happy (almost) New Year!
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20231231-2?refcode=em20231231-5568-P_FND_EOQ_LNK&t=3&refcode2=5568_2526796_bp1jPa&akid=5568%2E2526796%2Ebp1jPa)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20231231-5568-P_FND_EOQ_LNK&t=4&akid=5568%2E2526796%2Ebp1jPa)**
---|---

---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

[**So as we look toward the New Year and enter a critical Presidential election year, I hope you’ll stand with me. This is your last chance to chip in before our critical $10,000 End of Year goal. Peter, can I count on you to chip in $3 to fight for a Democratic House Majority? »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76231825/447024891/236453838?amount=3&refcode=MTFC_20231231_EMDF_E3_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDI2ZWYxNS00MWE4LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjFmNTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LUwm-ouuej_FDeH0uKMzqDoJWagH1EMtzUu7RqQKLTk=) | [RUSH $3 TO SUPPORT PROGRESSIVE MARK TAKANO »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76231826/447024892/236453838?amount=3&refcode=MTFC_20231231_EMDF_E3_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDI2ZWYxNS00MWE4LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjFmNTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LUwm-ouuej_FDeH0uKMzqDoJWagH1EMtzUu7RqQKLTk=)

Peter, I know the news can get exhausting and negative, so let me remind you of some incredible accomplishments we made this year:

**Democrats won big in 2023’s off-year elections** on abortion, in state supreme courts, and state legislatures. Let’s continue this success in 2024!

**President Biden has continued to strengthen the economy** while supporting working class Americans.

**Democrats have continued to stand strong against MAGA Republicans** – even avoiding a government shutdown!

But Peter, in order to finally make progress on critical issues, we must flip the House blue:
_❌ Abortion is illegal in states across the country, gun violence continues to run rampant, and extremist Republicans are actively attacking President Biden. ❌_
[**That’s why I’m counting on supporters like you, Peter, to join me in continuing the fight. clean_body: | Peter, 2023 has not been an easy year – from a MAGA, out of control Republican majority to sham impeachments, far-right rhetoric, and more – it’s clear that things need to change. = | = Peter, I know the news can get exhausting and negative, so let me remind you of some incredible accomplishments we made this year: Democrats won big in 2023’s off-year elections on abortion, in state supreme courts, and state legislatures. Let’s continue this success in 2024! President Biden has continued to strengthen the economy while supporting working class Americans. Democrats have continued to stand strong against MAGA Republicans – even avoiding a government shutdown! But Peter, in order to finally make progress on critical issues, we must flip the House blue: ❌ Abortion is illegal in states across the country, gun violence continues to run rampant, and extremist Republicans are actively attacking President Biden. ❌ = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = Thank you and Happy New Year's Eve! — Mark Takano | | Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P.O. _A young Raul Ruiz in Kindergarten, reciting the pledge of allegiance._ Look – I’m not a member of Congress because I had privilege, wealth, or family connections.

I got to where I am because I watched my parents work hard every day, and from an early age, I was instilled with the kind of work ethic that only working folks know.

**But when over half of the members of Congress are millionaires, the system is almost __designed__ to keep folks like you and me shut out.**

I’m committed to getting our country back on track, but ensuring progressives lead the charge on critical issues by taking back the House has to be our main focus.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76232064/447025582/-1301578774?refcode=BLU_EM_SAN_2023-12-31_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3M2Y5MDI0OC00MWE4LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjFmNTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vv76sQoPqzwH0GIOsg2n7JcWoClZ85uZ1nMUDhBsWo0=)

| Hey Peter,

Before we get ready to eat our grapes, sit underneath the dining table, and run laps around the house to lock in our New Year’s resolutions, I wanted to take a short pause from my family’s New Year’s festivities to express my gratitude for your ongoing support this year.

This year, I became the first woman to lead BOLD PAC, the campaign arm of the Congressional Hispanic Caucus, and in a year that demands more progressives in Congress, I couldn’t be more excited for the road ahead. **As we look into the new year, we need to be more prepared than ever to fight back against extremist legislative attacks on reproductive rights, Medicare, and Social Security. All this as we fight to take back the House.**

I’m committed to getting our country back on track and ensuring progressives lead the charge on critical issues by taking back the House. [_**I need your support to get our momentum going, Peter. I’m hoping you’ll donate $5 or whatever you can to my campaign ahead of tonight’s end-of-year deadline.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76232065/447025587/-1667771349?refcode=BLU_EM_SAN_2023-12-31_1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3M2Y5MDI0OC00MWE4LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjFmNTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vv76sQoPqzwH0GIOsg2n7JcWoClZ85uZ1nMUDhBsWo0=)

clean_body: I’m committed to getting our country back on track, but ensuring progressives lead the charge on critical issues by taking back the House has to be our main focus. | = | Hey Peter, Before we get ready to eat our grapes, sit underneath the dining table, and run laps around the house to lock in our New Year’s resolutions, I wanted to take a short pause from my family’s New Year’s festivities to express my gratitude for your ongoing support this year. This year, I became the first woman to lead BOLD PAC, the campaign arm of the Congressional Hispanic Caucus, and in a year that demands more progressives in Congress, I couldn’t be more excited for the road ahead. As we look into the new year, we need to be more prepared than ever to fight back against extremist legislative attacks on reproductive rights, Medicare, and Social Security. All this as we fight to take back the House. I’m committed to getting our country back on track and ensuring progressives lead the charge on critical issues by taking back the House. = | = Have a Happy New Year! body:
I’m glad I caught you before you sign off for the evening, Peter.

I’m excited to ring in the new year, but I wanted to give you a quick update on our 2023 fundraising efforts before the books close tonight. **Right now, we are about $2,000 from reaching our digital goal -- which means we need roughly 50 more supporters to step up before the ball drops._(We are so close!)_**

Can you chip in a donation to put us over the top?

Here's a personalized link: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jw-q4-23?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76232268/447026263/1436736915?refcode=em-12.31.23-all-2-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU2NTciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzdmOTAyNDgtNDFhOC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIxZjU0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=nwktMxkpeK-JGNZMus5jfKjBnyNCosKfPLdqLQorp7c=)**

Hello,
In a few hours, I’m facing my final FEC fundraising deadline of the year. **After midnight tonight, we're required by federal law to show everyone how much our people-powered campaign has raised to replace Lauren Boebert in Congress.**
**Right now, we’re only a few thousand dollars short of our $2 million goal, so I have to ask:** **[Please, will you make a donation right now – before our final end-of-quarter FEC deadline at midnight tonight – to help me replace Lauren Boebert in Congress?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76232023/447025474/1610638071?refcode=em20231231pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=c826ef15-41a8-ee11-bea1-002248221f54&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODI2ZWYxNS00MWE4LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjFmNTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xGz_pCRtnl0d6KZGt1LMdB2dwM3IO_YEtXaOMkBzd1A=)**
I’m not taking money from corporate PACs. Too many politicians have been corrupted by special interests who buy votes and buy access. That’s not our campaign.
Our campaign is funded by people, like you, giving an average of just $31. A people-powered campaign is what will help us counter the Super PAC lies. But I’m counting on your support now if we’re going to win and replace Lauren Boebert.
We had the closest race in the entire country last year; in 2024, things could get even closer. And the political pundits have predicted record levels of outside spending against me. **We are so close to hitting our ambitious $2 million goal, but time is running out before our final FEC deadline at midnight.**
**[I’m asking you personally: Can you make a donation right now to my campaign – whatever amount you can afford before midnight tonight – to help me replace Lauren Boebert and finally end the angertainment circus in Washington?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76232024/447025475/1610638071?refcode=em20231231pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=c826ef15-41a8-ee11-bea1-002248221f54&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODI2ZWYxNS00MWE4LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjFmNTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xGz_pCRtnl0d6KZGt1LMdB2dwM3IO_YEtXaOMkBzd1A=)**

name: Patty Murray
subject: Hours left
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
Sorry to reach out on New Year's Eve, but this just can't wait
| | |
---

body:
https://www.dean24.com [https://www.dean24.com]
Hi Friend,
Are you exhausted by this same old political song and dance? Lately, every four years we are met with a matchup that we’re not excited about and has us feeling anxious about our future. With Biden’s approval numbers continuing to see record lows and the only spotlights being on the crazy Republican candidates, it doesn’t look good.
We need to start the new year off strong, with a powerful message that says, “we’re not going to take it anymore.” We know the match up is going to be Biden versus Trump. And there hasn’t been a shred of evidence that Biden is going to make it.
We need to flip the script. We need to feel good about our future. Dean’s the candidate to do it. Chip in $24 today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dean24-email?refcode=12.31.2023.hours&amount=24]
We’ve got HOURS left in the year. You’ve heard from our campaign manager and our finance director — this is our make it or break it moment.
Let's transform this election season into an opportunity — a chance to ensure that our democracy continues and we implement policy that invests for the people.
Without your support there will be no opportunity for hope — we won’t be able to make it and Biden will lose.
Help us grab the headlines for 2024 and chip in $24. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dean24-email?refcode=12.31.2023.hours&amount=24]
Thanks,
Dean Team

name: Dr. Brian Williams (personal)
subject: One final challenge
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Brian Williams for Congress
body:
| | Peter –

Before things get too hectic with your New Year’s Eve plans – I’m getting ready myself to celebrate with my wife and daughter – I want to say THANK YOU.

From the moment I launched this campaign for Congress, I have been blown away by this grassroots team. You’ve had my back from the very start, and I’m so grateful for your support going into the New Year.

We’ve accomplished a lot this year, but we have one final hurdle to clear in 2023: our end-of-year fundraising deadline. **Will you chip in before the ball drops at midnight to help us reach our ambitious $100,000 goal?** You can use this link to donate: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brian-williams-december-2023 &refcode2=dpwillis67@gmail.com**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76233029/447030560/1416552317?refcode=em23_231231_EOY8_fnd_gq_act___DBW_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_231231_EOY8_fnd_gq_act___DBW_ettx&utm_medium=email&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=&zip=&refcode2=15cd580e-42a8-ee11-bea1-002248221f54&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTVjZDU4MGUtNDJhOC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIxZjU0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=fJ63ncDSe1Hnd6jgQ8Ptd1GJYe_AqQFIAANLeat3BuQ=)

As an Air Force officer, trauma surgeon, father, and husband, I’ve been on the frontlines dealing with the issues our country is facing. I know what’s at stake, and am ready to go to Congress to end gun violence, expand access to affordable health care, defend reproductive rights, and invest in our education system.

But the road ahead is not easy. Not only do Democrats need to flip five seats, but we must protect every seat we already have – including TX-32. Together we can keep our district blue and retake the House majority, name/team.

Will you help me in this final push before our end-of-year deadline? Chip in $5, or whatever you can, before midnight tonight to help us start the election year off strong so we can retake the House majority: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brian-williams-december-2023 &refcode2=dpwillis67@gmail.com**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76233030/447030562/1416552317?refcode=em23_231231_EOY8_fnd_gq_act___DBW_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_231231_EOY8_fnd_gq_act___DBW_ettx&utm_medium=email&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=&zip=&refcode2=15cd580e-42a8-ee11-bea1-002248221f54&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTVjZDU4MGUtNDJhOC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIxZjU0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=fJ63ncDSe1Hnd6jgQ8Ptd1GJYe_AqQFIAANLeat3BuQ=)

Have a safe and happy New Year,

Dr. Brian Williams

name: Sarah McBride
subject: A toast
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
This is the last time my team or I are going to email you this year, so I wanted to do something a bit special. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76233273/447032330/-1448094795?amounts=3,7,10,15,20,25,35&refcode=EM_FL_MCB_20231231_fr_EOY6_cand_nc_180da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjI0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjAwMjc2Ni00MmE4LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjFmNTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4XFWnB6U-vqp0GBg2hhBoM3aqotFjhBywnlbbxIBHLA=)
---
Counting down the seconds and toasting with a sparkling beverage. Embracing a friend or a loved one when the clock strikes midnight. Sitting on the couch in your coziest pajamas and slippers watching Anderson Cooper and Andy Cohen ring in the New Year. However you’re spending your evening, I hope you’re doing it safely. **Tonight, I’m hanging out with my closest friends who I’ve known my entire life.** We’re toasting to a lot of things in 2024 — good health, good friends, and a good year. And I just wanted to quickly share a New Year’s Eve toast. We’re going to toast to YOU, the great people who’ve supported my campaign through and through. We’ll toast to our democracy — the greatest experiment. In all its messiness, we must work to secure and evolve it to one that works for all of us. We’ll toast to our LGBTQ+ siblings — and disenfranchised groups across the country. To having a strong community (family of origin _or_ found family) and that the dreams of our future soon become reality. **2024 will be here in 5... 4... 3... 2... 1... clean_body: This is the last time my team or I are going to email you this year, so I wanted to do something a bit special. | = Counting down the seconds and toasting with a sparkling beverage. Embracing a friend or a loved one when the clock strikes midnight. Sitting on the couch in your coziest pajamas and slippers watching Anderson Cooper and Andy Cohen ring in the New Year. However you’re spending your evening, I hope you’re doing it safely. Tonight, I’m hanging out with my closest friends who I’ve known my entire life. We’re toasting to a lot of things in 2024 — good health, good friends, and a good year. And I just wanted to quickly share a New Year’s Eve toast. We’re going to toast to YOU, the great people who’ve supported my campaign through and through. We’ll toast to our democracy — the greatest experiment. In all its messiness, we must work to secure and evolve it to one that works for all of us. We’ll toast to our LGBTQ+ siblings — and disenfranchised groups across the country. To having a strong community (family of origin or found family) and that the dreams of our future soon become reality. 2024 will be here in 5... 4... 3... 2... 1... So, I have my last request of the year: = There's no donation too small — every dollar adds up and helps us build the team to win this race next year. | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = See you in 2024! \- Sarah = = | Sarah McBride serves her home state in the Delaware State Senate, where she has passed historic paid leave, gun safety, and nondiscrimination laws. Our current projections show we are on track to reach our fundraising goals by midnight tonight, but only if we keep up the pace during these final hours. So, if there was ever a time to make your first donation to help Elissa defend this seat, it’s now.

| Peter -
---
| **I’m so tired of hyperbolic, overwrought, apocalyptic emails from candidates asking for money.**

As crazy as it seems, ridiculous subject lines like the one in this email are becoming commonplace.

But **_let’s cut the crap_** : No matter what Chicken Little politicians want you to believe, **the sky is not falling**. And if it were, donating a few bucks won’t keep it from happening.

So, let’s talk facts. We live in an amazing country filled with wonderful people. **But we ARE facing some very real threats **from rising inflation and skyrocketing housing costs to the crisis at the Southern border.

You can make a real difference in helping fix those problems by donating to my campaign for Congress.

I’ve worked in **pro-liberty** , **fiscally conservative** nonprofits for more than two decades. As an economist and policy analyst, **I’ve promoted America’s energy independence, slashed wasteful foreign aid, and encouraged parental choice in education**.

In reality, members of Congress don’t write the bills that become law; people like me do. **That’s why I have real solutions to the problems I mentioned earlier. **For example, I’m ready to:
* **Reduce Inflation** by _slashing wasteful spending_ so we can stop printing money and devaluing our currency.

* **Cut Energy Prices** by _eliminating green energy mandates_ and _expanding domestic oil and gas production_.

* **Lower Housing Prices** by putting some of the _89% of Clark County owned by the federal government_ back in the hands of Nevadans.

* **Secure Our Border** by _ending_ _amnesty_ , _giving states the authority to enforce immigration laws_ , and increasing personnel and resources available to Customs and Border Protection.

I’m also considered one of America’s leading government watchdogs. **I’ve worked with lawmakers to save taxpayers more than $60 billion in my career.**

By supporting my campaign, **you’re ensuring that we will have _a watchdog on the inside_** – someone who knows how our tax dollars are spent and what government can do to become more efficient. I will lead the charge to balance the budget and lower taxes.

Additionally, Nevada’s 3rd congressional district – the district I’m running to represent – is considered a **must-win seat for Republicans** to maintain control of the U.S. House of Representatives.

A [donation to my campaign](https://DrewForNevada.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=faca3bfedb5031bc3491ebbc8&id=20d379668b&e=fc26432468) not only helps me promote liberty, personal responsibility, and smaller government on Capitol Hill, it also helps ensure the GOP keeps power away from extremist Democrats.

**_Can I count on your donation of $7, $40, or $199 tonight?_**

If you don’t contribute, the world won’t end. But we’ll all be worse off if I’m not in Congress _fighting for our beliefs and standing up for our shared values_.

Please don’t wait! **Midnight tonight is the end of a crucial fundraising period.** There’s never been a more significant time to [support our campaign](https://DrewForNevada.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=faca3bfedb5031bc3491ebbc8&id=2743f91d5d&e=fc26432468).

Visit [www.DrewForNevada.com](https://DrewForNevada.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=faca3bfedb5031bc3491ebbc8&id=4e8d3cb5e5&e=fc26432468) to donate. If you prefer to send your contribution by mail, please send a check to **Drew for Nevada, 5325 S. Fort Apache Road, Suite D-31, Las Vegas, NV 89148**.

Sarah and I wish you a 2024 filled with happiness, health, prosperity, and liberty.

Happy New Year!
Drew

---

| P.S. _Every dollar you give today will fund our critical ballot-collecting effort._
In 2022, I became **the** **first Republican in 14 years** elected to the Clark County Commission – one of the most powerful local governments in America. A week later, after election officials accepted tens of thousands of late-arriving mail ballots, my nearly 3,000-vote victory turned into a 336-vote defeat. This happened because more than 20,000 Republicans in my district did not vote. **_WE WILL NOT LET THAT HAPPEN IN 2024!_**

With your support, we will fund a grassroots effort to collect the ballots of Republican voters who may not otherwise vote. _This will ensure victory for me and other great limited government candidates up and down the ballot!_
