name: Adam
subject: A moment of brevity
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| I can’t wait to take this movement to the U.S. Senate, and I’m glad to have you alongside me.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=4941%2E5257348%2EdYq3gs)
Derek — We are hours away from our 11:59 PM fundraising deadline, so I’ll keep this short (my team challenged me to stay under 100 words, let’s see if I can do it).
All year, we’ve built a movement of, by, and for Californians. For people who want to see the economy work for them. Who want affordable healthcare and housing. Who want better wages and working conditions.
**I can’t wait to take this movement to the U.S. Senate, and I’m glad to have you alongside me.**
**Please, ahead of our 11:59 PM deadline, chip in to my campaign. You can use this link:[secure.actblue.com/donate/dec2023_abs_em](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=dec2023_abs_em.181qVM&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC90_20231230_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=4941%2E5257348%2EdYq3gs)**
Thank you, and happy new year.
— Adam
_P.S. 119 words. I was close!_

name: John Padora
subject: One last email
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Padora for Colorado
body:
Lauren Boebert just jumped into this race, adding another level of unhinged extremism to a GOP primary already filled with right-wing extremists. Will you rush a donation to help me reach my new $25,000 goal so that I have the resources to defeat her?
__ | | | Hi there, team. I know you’re looking forward to popping champagne and ringing in the New Year, but I needed to reach out one more time ahead of our fundraising deadline. Lauren Boebert just jumped into this race, adding another level of unhinged extremism to a GOP primary already filled with right-wing extremists. **[Will you rush a donation to help me reach my new $25,000 goal so that I have the resources to defeat her?](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=095ca8efc1d447b59e00fdaf96222f6d&_e=2Mc3SKnY5PZl0iSPOK6sKddkjbQG6QhFX_GBctVUooRxv6w7Q-Chz__Se_8l_qKbF1a936dWubEguWIQ9xYSQaYmRElVCX3amRG9k5ORQzTh6-zAbzmYb2Bqyks5N1dScvFGmO2dsADsCvZKUiHfs91f2otdGqVUcsBS_aCmehsxcgiigANYZtgkDMOBEHB0XHzNI8y3FULGSTcb4Ju0O4m5nIhsIas3tNgTuW31Pl4PeZA7aaTzXXrS9W_njafigWZaSZpACu9gykOTS_0AhEv_iIvz3-nfUAkKsdO0eVE5cni2hYcCsNAtITMD0GipRy2nscqiPOqJEdEF10ogTmeaT3RlpFPV4FhZTBxjogbPTQ_a3QkulKRHss8DJosYdZfbNWcryxtAuPnHgjgKfd2yIIKMcOVd1ABhECmLUGk%3D)** Next month we will publish an FEC report that’ll demonstrate how strong of a campaign we’re running and whether we’ll be able to defeat Boebert and her big-money GOP backers. **[So, can I count on you to chip in to my campaign before my end-of-year deadline?](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=095ca8efc1d447b59e00fdaf96222f6d&_e=2Mc3SKnY5PZl0iSPOK6sKddkjbQG6QhFX_GBctVUooRxv6w7Q-Chz__Se_8l_qKbF1a936dWubEguWIQ9xYSQaYmRElVCX3amRG9k5ORQzTh6-zAbzmYb2Bqyks5N1dScvFGmO2dsADsCvZKUiHfs91f2otdGqVUcsBS_aCmehsxcgiigANYZtgkDMOBEHB0XHzNI8y3FULGSTcb4Ju0O4m5nIhsIas3tNgTuW31Pl4PeZA7aaTzXXrS9W_njafigWZaSZpACu9gykOTS_0AhFe8wxZ4IdbAExK9rz6upF_kCHQOLe_Z_RJ1jJ8A331WzV-ubLRKxYtHmPu5NFERsu7Wq_JjPQh8emenBdtZBdxJnbsPh-BtsiSvRiivpvNekqfFVCCX_9gIuOwNhe7HIkC_Jv1EyFIa6Y-TaSPGW20%3D)** I appreciate anything you’re able to give. If you can, please donate before midnight tonight so we can reach our LAST deadline of 2023. -JR \-------Forwarded Message-------- From: Hung (Personal) To: JR Subject: Checking in Date: December 31, 2023 Hey JR, I just wanted to check in to see if we have met our goal yet? I know tonight's the biggest deadline we've had so far. Thanks man, Hung | | Paid for by Hung Cao for Virginia | | Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

Peter,
Looking back on the past year, not a day went by where I wasn’t inspired by this movement.
Our organizing has always been grounded in building long-term trust with voters. We reach out to folks most campaigns don’t think about reaching out to, and we don’t leave people behind.
As we face critical elections up and down the ballot next year, our work has never been more important. We must prove that we’re ready to come out of the gate at our full capacity in 2024 – and that means hitting this final end-of-year budget target.
**I just spoke with my campaign team, and they let me know we’re still about $3,800 short. So before the ball drops tonight, I’m reaching out one last time:**
[**Will you take advantage of your Political Contribution Refund (PCR) and make a REFUNDABLE $50 DONATION by midnight so we can close the gap and finish 2023 strong?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76233496/447034476/201425405?refcode=body&amount=50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS85MDI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMzQ1ZDMyZS00M2E4LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjFmNTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RD0BOx8Uvg3i6rt2gqfXcaVJ-3KOeBVJ4ZFgPS3HFQw=)

body:

Friend,

This afternoon Ike emailed you about how close we are to reaching our goal of $175,000 raised in the four days since Boebert announced she was moving to our district.

[ ](https://mccorkle.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGztcwJvWfFnVYy2EmP7hoQY51-ue1ka01B9JGpAW5jL3Ew&e=0120ca2529c09955473d28f088272fa4&utm_source=mccorkle&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=shutdown_to_bf_mega_10&n=2)
---
_Ike canceled his NYE plans for tonight and is still calling donors as of 5:48 PM MT. He even asked us for Hawaii donor lists so he can keep calling until as late as possible😂_
---
We’ve made some significant headway and we closed a _$6394 deficit over the last hour_ (presently we stand at $170,678 raised) but now that it’s already 8 PM on the east coast more and more people are (rightfully) checking out for their NYE celebrations, and we’ve noticed a **drastic drop** in donations coming in.

_Before the clock strikes midnight we are mounting one final push. Here's how close we are:_

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, we’re a few
hours away from our end-of-year deadline when the clock strikes midnight,
and we’re so close to reaching our $75,000 grassroots fundraising goal!

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231231-2.qrXuas&refcode=em20231231-32610&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=3&t=1001&akid=32610%2E1203867%2ErZAIUa ]This is our last chance: please rush $3 now to ensure we
hit our goal before 2023 ends and help set Justice Democrats up for
success in 2024!

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231231-2.qrXuas&refcode=em20231231-32610&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=3&t=1020&akid=32610%2E1203867%2ErZAIUa ]Contribute $3

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time.

There are other ways to make an impact in support of peace and equality in
Israel and Palestine: please urge your member of Congress to support a
ceasefire through [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/139873?t=1021&akid=32610%2E1203867%2ErZAIUa ]Adalah Justice Project’s petition or by calling them

name: George Whitesides (personal)
subject: The last time I’ll ask this year:
body:
Peter, it’s hard to believe that we ring in 2024 in a few short hours!

I’m celebrating here at home with my family, but right now I’m still on the clock because come midnight, our final FEC fundraising deadline of the year hits.

I just got off the phone with my campaign manager, and we’re only $3,500 short of our digital fundraising goal. We can make up the difference, but only if everyone reading this email does their part.

Can I count on you to chip in $3 when it matters most? Here’s a personalized link to donate: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gw-q4-2023?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76234012/447038086/-233825198?refcode=em-12.31.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOWUwZTU0My00NWE4LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjFmNTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GsqUfwsHisOtjxQ3mqjQkwfiwUAzNyaov1cVtXdTGps=)

Looking back on the last several months since announcing our run for CA-27, I can't help but feel proud of the coalition we’ve built – thousands of supporters on the ground, dozens of Congressional leaders, and plenty of local organizations here in the district.

Our race is rated one of the most competitive in the country. And with only five seats separating power in the House, CA-27 may very well make or break control of the majority.

We can’t afford to lose momentum with so many counting on us to oust Mike Garcia. We have to hit tonight’s goal – which is why I’m reaching out.

This is a crucial moment and I would be honored if you gave your first donation to our campaign before the clock strikes midnight. Can I count on you to chip in $3?

Please, follow this link to give toward our end-of-year goal: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gw-q4-2023?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76234014/447038089/-233825198?refcode=em-12.31.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOWUwZTU0My00NWE4LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjFmNTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GsqUfwsHisOtjxQ3mqjQkwfiwUAzNyaov1cVtXdTGps=)

Thank you, and Happy New Year!

George

* * *

George Whitesides for Congress
P.O. Box 221776
Newhall, CA 91322
United States
We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to [unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/7Lng7fM74EmfvnJSCPSYrg2?unsubscribedata=FV%2BPnbFNS46OycoFGGJ7WCrwfdFFoE90HN15nCWSwLXjlpp5%2BeuVL8LSnkpnwvLT6A%2F6TJfocJ9UGc7pUIhO7Z%2FLQiBgkmWFDwD63lXeBU74svSGesjEsM%2BAg2ANn8t1YREVZ3W11liyHkHlK1rMkUTyk4lY%2BxYBvnVo3JeTcbRc2rU2BLEN9RKbSdTwZsU2%2BiH%2FcnUOEoFvf1TSQnT4pfwLDiYH7sAQTxcfOG1GZokZUGrts3UBohohBpj0b9wCiYy9bIfPOmKDyuCBpTLI51tq0lHFel1y6OMHy8ZUMBiExq8WV5Pd0kxS9oss7Yr7IiqM4SD4REDBqCxCK1VkggdyABQ%2FiGFFMRAtAqCBXkq53mbZwnQ9DLEJL24QnsU513wHpSnv0N3IwOXb%2FbRdScdvMrZDBvFxqCH8PzH4CvNvSCTm2u%2FJ7286AV%2FmEgJs).

name: Kim
subject: reaching out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kim Nguyen for Congress
body:
Hi,

Our December FEC deadline is only hours away, and my team just reached out to let me know that we’re still $1,436 away from hitting our goal.

With so much at stake, we can’t afford to come up short.

Will you help me flip this seat and defeat MAGA Michelle in 2024 by rushing a donation of $10 or any amount at the link below?

https://go.votekimnguyen.com/a/december-2023

What we report will be heavily scrutinized to see if I have the resources to compete — and win — against MAGA Michelle and her right-wing machine.

Thank you for helping us prove the strength of our campaign,

Kim

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kbn-footer?refcode=footer&amount=25]

Democrat Kim Bernice Nguyen is running for Congress in CA-45, one of the most competitive districts in the entire nation. The daughter of a Vietnamese refugee and a Mexican immigrant, Kim's story is the quintessential California tale of sacrifice, hard work, and dedication to community. At just 25, she became the youngest person ever elected to the Garden Grove City Council. Now, she's running for Congress to reduce prescription drug costs, increase housing affordability, invest in working families, and strengthen our democracy.

Paid for by Kim Nguyen for Congress

Kim Nguyen for Congress
3843 S. Bristol St #604
Santa Ana, CA 92704
United States

name: Alcala, Camille
subject: (no subject)
body:
Hi there,
I know it’s getting late, but I just took a look at our ActBlue and we’re only $1,876.37 away from our FEC Filing Deadline goal.
If you haven’t made your donation yet, here are three final reasons to please consider getting your gift in before our midnight deadline:
(1) Republicans know that *ALL* their hopes of keeping their House Majority in 2024 depend on California.
(2) If we have the resources to mobilize in key districts, we *CAN* flip the U.S. House from red to blue right here in California.
(3) But right now, because California trends blue at the Presidential level, not enough Democrats are paying attention to our state.
That’s it. Flipping the U.S. House blue next year depends on California, and we can’t do it without our support and investment.
Are you in? I’m dropping my personal ActBlue link below. I hope to see your donation come in before midnight.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-dec23?refcode=20231230_FR_45DO_PlainText&amount=75 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-dec23?refcode=20231230_FR_45DO_PlainText&amount=75]
Thank you,
Camille
--
Camille Alcala (she/her/hers)
Finance Director
California Democratic Party

body:
# [#]Hi there, it’s Josh. I wanted to reach out personally and remind you that our last fundraising deadline of the year is tonight at midnight.

This is our opportunity to prove to the NRCC that we have what it takes (and more) to put up a strong fight in 2024. What we raise now will set the tone for the next year and remainder of the race.

We need to prove our grassroots strength right now if we want to hold this seat in 2024. Time and time again, your tremendous support and generosity have allowed me to continue fighting for Jersey Values and bipartisan solutions in Congress — I have no doubt we can do it again.

Midnight is only a few hours away – and we need your support if we want to show we have what it takes as we head into 2024. Can you chip in $ or any amount right away? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jg-fr-2312?amount=]

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jg-fr-2312?amount= [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jg-fr-2312?amount=]

Thank you for your continued support,

Josh

body:

Peter Willis,

It's New Year's Eve, so I'll get directly to the point.

AIPAC is promising to spend "at least" $100 million defeating progressive Peace candidates brave enough to call for peace in Gaza.

With lives on the line, we need to have the back of progressives, which is why Our Revolution is committed to raising money to have their back against AIPAC's attacks.

That's why I'm asking you to help us close our $5,559 budget gap before tonight's end-of-year fundraising deadline. name: Donald J. Trump
subject: BREAKING: NEW BAN?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
You won’t believe this...

You won’t believe this... | | | [](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=aa7199dc648b4f3286cfc1376c258905&_e=yVUEnmBvHFh8ZIqm1WMzQmZlJ5zRJ64M8ToJE2C9htcQ9a4RxQkCKV-awgf3wwQQHFjtRWlkPcL40Y0-qIbYFp36WhH_BCFofalouvpQpvsNGZTYSl38nvevJt_PAIr4QUt40iAcE7BXmQjBOr92Rm2ZEdAXX8fswkJlV1BU_UI83u0ILzrqXoW0G9U19z3cdazYFfnXjImHsCMts2n7BI6493UCVStDx6reepol-vX4gZvYuR6uzud5xwMXDfrLWKNqKu7rcs-_yiDKl1OzwR0vVtnnbqXgPIS_wscEFhw_LnV7iLQUEZZqrZEc-4ht3LVYbDkmFgYxo1RC7LGy7bfvjUMUPNyfrqDLHxG_9IjlW2YrjDsK9Xn28Oecj9455ZLbegLq1fstxsUDs88efA%3D%3D)
---
| | Friend, it's no secret...

---
Crooked Joe, his Department of "Justice," and the Radical Democrats have already INTERFERED in the 2024 election - _and we haven 't even closed the books on 2023 yet._
---
They've wrongfully indicted and arrested their leading opponent _(yours truly)_ four times, taken a mugshot of me, are seeking the "corporate death penalty" against me and my family, and are even trying to JAIL me for 1,000 years all for putting _YOU_ first.
---
_In these sick peoples ' eyes, the greatest crime you can commit is to fight tirelessly to make our country GREAT AGAIN._
---
**And now, the very same villains who have weaponized the courts and politicized our justice system like a Third World Marxist Dictatorship, are demanding I be** _**BANNED**_**from raising****"****_political issues or arguments in front of the jury_ "****in the D.C. Witch Hunt.**
---
Yes, you read that right, Friend...
---
The people who are trying to IMPRISON me for life as an innocent man all for _politics_ , are asking a judge to ban me from speaking about... _politics_.
---
Crooked Joe's desperation is like clockwork...
---
As we continue to CRUSH him by double digits in all the polls, the vicious witch hunts continue to heat up like never before.
---
**But right now, with the FINAL FEC-mandated deadline of the year nearly upon us, we have the chance to cement** _**_this_**_****_**_moment_**_**as the moment we proved no matter how many times they attack my First Amendment rights, or phony witch hunts they concoct, or sham trials they drag me through, we will NEVER,****_EVER_****SURRENDER our country to the Left 's tyranny! **
---
If you're struggling at this time because of the crooks, thugs, and fools currently destroying our country from within, then please don't even think about donating. _I mean it!_ I want you to take care of your family and yourself first.
---
**[But if you can, please make a contribution before the FEC-mandated end-of-year deadline to peacefully DEFEND our movement from the never-ending witch hunts and vicious acts of ELECTION INTERFERENCE- and together, we will SAVE AMERICA!](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=aa7199dc648b4f3286cfc1376c258905&_e=yVUEnmBvHFh8ZIqm1WMzQmZlJ5zRJ64M8ToJE2C9htcQ9a4RxQkCKV-awgf3wwQQHFjtRWlkPcL40Y0-qIbYFp36WhH_BCFofalouvpQpvsNGZTYSl38nvevJt_PAIr4QUt40iAcE7BXmQjBOr92Rm2ZEdAXX8fswkJlV1BU_UI83u0ILzrqXoW0G9U19z3cdazYFfnXjImHsCMts2n7BI6493UCVStDx6reepol-vX4gZvYuR6uzud5xwMXDfrLBEBNP9gQ_OZ1HYwBtIQnJIdUWExQbiscHj3sdMPEvtTCdWxOMW5LBIalOIZbTJRNpZxhKwcIP4v0KsJ1Ma86slVD05mMR9yf5MHRqhzPkkLx2dobaZUz8uRZ2kczdkmcTZDj_L4etxzzpB7OLFPXPA%3D%3D)**
---

clean_body: You won’t believe this... You won’t believe this... | | | | | Friend, it's no secret... Crooked Joe, his Department of "Justice," and the Radical Democrats have already INTERFERED in the 2024 election - and we haven 't even closed the books on 2023 yet. They've wrongfully indicted and arrested their leading opponent (yours truly) four times, taken a mugshot of me, are seeking the "corporate death penalty" against me and my family, and are even trying to JAIL me for 1,000 years all for putting YOU first. In these sick peoples ' eyes, the greatest crime you can commit is to fight tirelessly to make our country GREAT AGAIN. And now, the very same villains who have weaponized the courts and politicized our justice system like a Third World Marxist Dictatorship, are demanding I be BANNEDfrom raising"political issues or arguments in front of the jury "in the D.C. Witch Hunt. Yes, you read that right, Friend... The people who are trying to IMPRISON me for life as an innocent man all for politics , are asking a judge to ban me from speaking about... politics. Crooked Joe's desperation is like clockwork... As we continue to CRUSH him by double digits in all the polls, the vicious witch hunts continue to heat up like never before. But right now, with the FINAL FEC-mandated deadline of the year nearly upon us, we have the chance to cement this**momentas the moment we proved no matter how many times they attack my First Amendment rights, or phony witch hunts they concoct, or sham trials they drag me through, we will NEVER,**EVERSURRENDER our country to the Left 's tyranny! If you're struggling at this time because of the crooks, thugs, and fools currently destroying our country from within, then please don't even think about donating. I mean it! name: Team Pramila
subject: Happy New Year’s Eve!

body:
While many might be preparing for the night’s celebration with family and friends, our team has been working hard.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20231231-3340-footer&t=1&akid=3340%2E420207%2EWZfPQ9)
Happy New Year's Eve, Peter.
While many might be preparing for the night’s celebration with family and friends, our team has been working hard — making one final push for our 2023 fundraising.

Thank you,
Team Pramila

Hey there — there are only a few hours left in 2023, so I wanted to make sure I asked: **will you be our last donor of 2023? I’ll explain a bit more in a minute.** **Here’s a direct link to make your contribution:**[**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/azd-em-dec23?dpwillis67@gmail.com**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76234742/447041206/1907298925?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC90_20231231_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmQ4MjMyYzQtNDhhOC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIxZjU0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=BUPP1B2Hv9kczgqKaa3Hgzc8YR31w0kXi6RuKTp-CWQ=) Once tonight’s deadline expires, we’ll have to submit our fundraising reports to the FEC, showing them all of the grassroots donors that are powering our fight to flip Arizona blue. These reports are vital — they show just how strong our movement is, and Republicans and pundits across the map will be tuned in to see how fundraising is shaking out in a key battleground states, including Arizona. Once 2024 is here, we’ll officially be in what we call an “on-year” and we’ll have to kick into high gear to re-elect President Biden, help to secure abortion access across Arizona, and flip the state legislature blue by electing Democrats up and down the ballot. If you’ve been waiting to jump off the sidelines, please consider pitching in and making sure your name is on our list of supporters before the end of 2023. [**On average, folks are pitching in less than $25 to power this movement. clean_body: | = Hey there — there are only a few hours left in 2023, so I wanted to make sure I asked: will you be our last donor of 2023? I’ll explain a bit more in a minute. Here’s a direct link to make your contribution:= Once tonight’s deadline expires, we’ll have to submit our fundraising reports to the FEC, showing them all of the grassroots donors that are powering our fight to flip Arizona blue. These reports are vital — they show just how strong our movement is, and Republicans and pundits across the map will be tuned in to see how fundraising is shaking out in a key battleground states, including Arizona. Once 2024 is here, we’ll officially be in what we call an “on-year” and we’ll have to kick into high gear to re-elect President Biden, help to secure abortion access across Arizona, and flip the state legislature blue by electing Democrats up and down the ballot. If you’ve been waiting to jump off the sidelines, please consider pitching in and making sure your name is on our list of supporters before the end of 2023. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = Thank you, for all of your support this year. I’m grateful you’re in this with us. — Morgan Dick, Executive Director = Arizona Democratic Party PO Box 36123 Phoenix, AZ 85067-6123 United States mailto:info@azdem.org | Paid for by Arizona Democrats

subject: Just one last ask of the year

body:
Just $1 to help close out our last and final goal of the year! Happy New Year's Eve, Peter! I promise I'll be brief. I know reading political emails probably wasn't on your to-do list today. Thank you for taking a moment during this busy time and for steadfastly standing with me in every election. I'm going to make one last ask this year. We have no room for error next year. There is so much at stake. Staying on track with fundraising helps ensure a win here in the 8th district, and is critical if we are going to put Democrats back in charge in the House. This FEC end-of-year goal is the last chance we have this year to show the strength of this grassroots team. **So, I'm asking one last time before the ball drops this evening, ringing in a whole new year: Will you chip in even just $1 to help us reach our end-of-year goal?[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/schrier-december23-eom](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76234772/447041304/1020945093?refcode=em23_231231_EOY5_fndd_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_231231_EOY5_fndd_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=bf469308-49a8-ee11-bea1-002248221f54&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZjQ2OTMwOC00OWE4LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjFmNTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OI_Za_RsbPNXgg-ZhR2MCLcASC47eDmsOeW4y4XCny0=)** Thank you,

Roger Williams is a Christian, conservative, pro-life, and second amendment supporter taking Texas values to Washington, D.C. He is a small business owner with over 45 years of experience and is running for Congress to create economic growth, jobs, and provide strong leadership. Roger worked alongside President Trump to fight against high taxes, rising energy prices, and soaring healthcare costs. His passion for conservative leadership led him to support Republican candidates from the White House to the county courthouse. Roger serves on the Board of Trustees for the Bush School of Government and Public Service at Texas A&M University, the Texas Christian University Board of Trustees, and the National Football Foundation and College Football Hall of Fame Board of Directors.

clean_body: | | | | | Roger Williams is a Christian, conservative, pro-life, and second amendment supporter taking Texas values to Washington, D.C. He is a small business owner with over 45 years of experience and is running for Congress to create economic growth, jobs, and provide strong leadership. Roger worked alongside President Trump to fight against high taxes, rising energy prices, and soaring healthcare costs. His passion for conservative leadership led him to support Republican candidates from the White House to the county courthouse. Roger serves on the Board of Trustees for the Bush School of Government and Public Service at Texas A&M University, the Texas Christian University Board of Trustees, and the National Football Foundation and College Football Hall of Fame Board of Directors. | "Facebook" | "Twitter" ---|--- | | ⬇DONATE BY CHECK⬇ ROGER WILLIAMS FOR U.S. CONGRESS 10 N. body:
Last Chance to Support our Cause | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/6cb7a6f59350/only-6-hours-left?e=273c9a71fb)
---
| [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/6cb7a6f59350/only-6-hours-left?e=273c9a71fb)
---
| | [ ](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=ca20c858a8&e=273c9a71fb)
---
| Peter,

We are in the final stretch, with only hours left until our end-of-quarter deadline. This is your last chance to make a difference and support our cause. [Will you join us in this crucial fight?](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=55d1adb476&e=273c9a71fb)

Our military personnel selflessly serve our nation and protect our freedoms. They deserve our unwavering support, resources, and respect. By contributing to our campaign, you will help us ensure that they have the necessary resources for training, equipment, and healthcare.

Furthermore, our nation is facing a border crisis that threatens our national security and undermines the rule of law. Your donation will enable us to champion legislation that prioritizes border security, enforcing our immigration laws and protecting our citizens.

Don't let this opportunity pass you by.

[Every dollar counts, and your support will directly impact our efforts to support our military and secure our borders.](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=f85d24224c&e=273c9a71fb)

Thank you for your unwavering support. Together, we can make a real difference.
---
| [ ](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=2dbc001859&e=273c9a71fb)

clean_body: Last Chance to Support our Cause | | | | | | | Peter, We are in the final stretch, with only hours left until our end-of-quarter deadline. This is your last chance to make a difference and support our cause. Our military personnel selflessly serve our nation and protect our freedoms. They deserve our unwavering support, resources, and respect. By contributing to our campaign, you will help us ensure that they have the necessary resources for training, equipment, and healthcare. Furthermore, our nation is facing a border crisis that threatens our national security and undermines the rule of law. Your donation will enable us to champion legislation that prioritizes border security, enforcing our immigration laws and protecting our citizens. Don't let this opportunity pass you by. Thank you for your unwavering support. Together, we can make a real difference. | | | For Freedom, | | David Flippo, Lt. Col. (USAF Ret.) Candidate for U.S. Congress, NV-4 | | | | | | | | | | | | "Paid for by The Committee To Elect David Flippo" | | Copyright © 2023 Committee To Elect David Flippo, All rights reserved.

Down to the wire! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/3ab6d011431c/the-deadline-is-in-6-hours?e=54a81bd33c)

| Dear Peter,
---
| | We are down to the wire! In just 6 hours, our End of Year fundraising campaign for the U.S. House of Representatives will come to an end. [This is our final chance to make a difference and secure a better future for our country.](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=475de7459e&e=54a81bd33c)

[Your financial support has brought us this far,](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=0d700121cf&e=54a81bd33c) and we are incredibly grateful for your dedication. But we need your help.

With only hours left, it's crucial that we reach our goal and ensure that our campaign has the resources we need to win.

Together, we can make history. [Your contribution, no matter the size](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=6fb1f57741&e=54a81bd33c), will have a significant impact on the outcome of the upcoming elections.

name: =?utf-8?B?VGlt4oCZcyBpUGhvbmU=?=
subject: (no subject)
disclaimer_text: paid for by Tim Walz for Governor
body:
Peter, Sorry to interrupt your New Year’s Eve, but I just got an update from my campaign team, and I had to reach out right away.
| Peter, Sorry to interrupt your New Year’s Eve, but I just got an update from my campaign team, and I had to reach out right away. With just hours to go before our first and only public reporting deadline of 2023, we’re still trailing our goal by just over $4,000. We’ve made up significant ground since this morning, but we’re going to need to dig just a little bit deeper. Will you rush a donation by 11:59 pm to help us finish strong? Here’s the link: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eoy-tw-email](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76235603/447043223/1114975602?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOGRiMzg2OS00YWE4LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjFmNTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eJyZdyHcCIsNjCtx4zLCGyDOxdebb-G0edZgopk_308=) As I look back on the past year, I’m overwhelmed with gratitude – for you, this team, and the opportunity to serve this state. Nothing we do is possible without your support, and I can’t thank you enough. Let’s get this done. Happy New Year! Tim Walz Sent from my iPhone
** ** | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Governor Walz and Lt. Governor Flanagan have overcome unprecedented challenges to provide historic investments in education, create new, good-paying jobs, and increase access to health care. name: Cory Booker
subject: Will you help me support Mazie before tonight’s deadline?
body:
|
#
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76235863/447043484/-2102377403?refcode=AU_MKH_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20231231_PM2_T1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMGYxNDNkZC00YWE4LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjFmNTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ctifihEswlkLs35UXo7khh-aPC29YW088fbjuOyd5ZM=) Hey Peter, this is Cory Booker. I’m reaching out today because Mazie is facing her most important FEC end-of-quarter deadline of the year tonight, and she’s counting on your support to make the most of these last few hours. So before I ask you to [**add a donation and join me in supporting Mazie’s re-election campaign** ,](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76235864/447043485/-2102377403?refcode=AU_MKH_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20231231_PM2_T1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMGYxNDNkZC00YWE4LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjFmNTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ctifihEswlkLs35UXo7khh-aPC29YW088fbjuOyd5ZM=) I just wanted to say a few quick words about one of my best friends and colleagues. In 2018, I was appointed to the Judiciary Committee alongside then-Senator Kamala Harris. At the time, Mazie was the only other member of color serving on the committee. The three of us quickly formed a special bond. We had a shared understanding of just how powerful it was for our diverse and unique voices to be included in debating and crafting the most consequential, wide-reaching legislation that the American people have entrusted us to deliver. **And Mazie and I both know that we would never have this opportunity if not for the sacrifices our parents made for us.** We would not be here without the deeply painful choice that Mazie’s mother made to escape her abusive marriage in Japan and bring her daughter to Hawaii to give her a better life. We wouldn’t be here without my mother’s activism during Civil Rights Movement sit-ins and marches. In Mazie, I’ve found a trusted and valued colleague who is as dedicated as I am to building a future where no parent is forced to make unjust sacrifices for their children. Where this country belongs equally to all of us. Through her service, dedication, and energetic work ethic, Mazie makes Hawaii proud every day. She is a true fighter for working families, and I see every day how serious she takes the task of giving a voice to those who don’t have enough representation in Washington — especially AAPI and Native Hawaiian communities. [**So Peter, I hope you’ll join me in supporting Mazie’s re-election campaign by chipping in any amount before tonight’s 11:59 PM end-of-quarter deadline. This job wouldn’t be the same without her!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76235865/447043486/-2102377403?refcode=AU_MKH_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20231231_PM2_T1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMGYxNDNkZC00YWE4LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjFmNTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ctifihEswlkLs35UXo7khh-aPC29YW088fbjuOyd5ZM=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | ****[Chip in $10 now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76235866/447043487/-2102377403?express_lane=true&amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_MKH_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20231231_PM2_T1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMGYxNDNkZC00YWE4LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjFmNTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ctifihEswlkLs35UXo7khh-aPC29YW088fbjuOyd5ZM=)****

name: ami (personal)
subject: before the ball drops
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bera for Congress
body:
| Peter,

We’ve only got a few more hours until our biggest FEC deadline of the year.

What that amounts to is that we have just a few more hours to make a strong statement that the GOP's extremism will not win in 2024.

But I just got off the phone with my team and we still need to raise about $1,500 to reach our first official goal of 2024.

Can I count on you to help us hit this goal by chipping in $15 or whatever you can before MIDNIGHT?

**_[beraforcongress.com/final-deadline/](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76236477/447044188/726841306?amount=15&source=EM_NBI_AB_20231231_FR_2.12_WL_candidate_NA_NA_eoy&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS85MDU3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDc2NzA4YS00Y2E4LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjFmNTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3wsf3hlFoPio_fAOpofNq1T-98SbfJ6bQ3s78f_26R8=)_**

Thank you for standing with me.

Be well,

Ami

name: Lucas
subject: We’re getting down to the wire
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
I just checked ActBlue.
#
Hey Peter, it’s Lucas.
I just checked ActBlue and, as of right now, we’re still a few dozen donations away from hitting our 40,000 donation end-of-quarter goal.
I’m so grateful that I’ve always been able to count on supporters like you in times like these. But we’re getting down to the wire and most people probably aren’t checking their email right now, so I’m counting on you, Peter:
**[Can you rush your first donation of $10 or anything at all to my campaign right now? Hitting this goal means we’ll have the resources to keep reaching voters with our message and standing up to the GOP insiders doing everything in their power to tear down what we’re building together.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/40607?refcode=em20231231-4505&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4505%2E614464%2E8_96qp)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/40608?refcode=em20231231-4505&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=2&akid=4505%2E614464%2E8_96qp) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/40608?refcode=em20231231-4505&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=3&akid=4505%2E614464%2E8_96qp) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/40608?refcode=em20231231-4505&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=4&akid=4505%2E614464%2E8_96qp) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/40608?refcode=em20231231-4505&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=5&akid=4505%2E614464%2E8_96qp) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/40608?refcode=em20231231-4505&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=6&akid=4505%2E614464%2E8_96qp) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/40608?refcode=em20231231-4505&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=7&akid=4505%2E614464%2E8_96qp) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/40607?refcode=em20231231-4505&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=8&akid=4505%2E614464%2E8_96qp)
---
Whether you donate $10, $100, or even just $1 — your contribution will help us keep building a historic grassroots movement that can defeat Josh Hawley and finally take back Missouri’s Senate seat for working people across our state.
I’ll never take your support for granted, Peter.
Thanks for everything. Now let’s hit this goal!
— Lucas

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20231231-4505-footer&t=9&refcode2=4505_614464_8_96qp&akid=4505%2E614464%2E8_96qp)**

Laura Friedman

body:

| |

name: Josh Harder
subject: my final email of the year
body:
Hey Peter,

Happy New Years Eve, I can’t believe it’s almost 2024. 😳 We’ve officially made it to the big election year!

Tonight is also a big moment for our campaign. Our final end-of-year fundraising deadline is at 9 PT/12 ET and I really need your help because we’re still over 100 donations away from our goal.

You can make a donation here [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/JHCA-09-Email-Dec2023-FR-December?&refcode=E5597-20231231-NewYearsEve-SL-DeadlineEOQ&amount=25] - and here is why I need your support:

Right now, we’re on the verge of sending in our final fundraising report of the year to the Federal Election Commission. Last quarter, my opponent was the #2 GOP raiser in the country. We can’t afford to miss our goal or else I will be outraised for the first time since I was elected to Congress.

We also have to be prepared for an onslaught of outside spending. Republicans have already spent more than six figures on attacks against me this year (including a disgusting new hit piece this week...) and it’s only going to get worse in the new year. That’s why tonight’s deadline is so important.

So before the ball drops, I’m asking: Will you be one of the final 100 supporters I need to chip in so we can reach our end-of-year goal and keep the momentum in this race? It’s a pivotal moment for us in this toss-up seat!

I’ll leave my personal link here to say thanks in the New Year: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/JHCA-09-Email-Dec2023-FR-December?&refcode=E5597-20231231-NewYearsEve-SL-DeadlineEOQ&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/JHCA-09-Email-Dec2023-FR-December?&refcode=E5597-20231231-NewYearsEve-SL-DeadlineEOQ&amount=25]

See you in 2024!
- Josh

Josh Harder for Congress
PO Box 4220
Manteca, CA 95337
United States

name: Ruben Gallego for Arizona
subject: Humbly asking for $3 before midnight. Yes, just $3.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
We are still short of our goals. These are not arbitrary. They are what we need to WIN.
#

Peter -
$3.
That is the contribution Ruben Gallego is HUMBLY asking you to make before our deadline at midnight tonight. Yes, just $3. One time. Before midnight. Please.
$3 to help us catch up on the fundraising shortfall we’ve hit this month before our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline at midnight.
$3 because Kyrsten Sinema took in millions this year without breaking a sweat and a warchest of more than $10 million, and Kari Lake is in the race.
$3 because after CNN named Arizona one of the top states to flip in 2024, Ruben will be a target for both and this campaign is funded by lots and lots of people giving $3.
Today, more than 3,000 people have given their $3, but we’re still short of our goals before our critical FEC deadline. So they’re really hoping you’ll join them and do the same. Please.
[**Can Ruben Gallego count on you to make your first $3 contribution before our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline ends at midnight tonight?**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-dec23.csjDeB&refcode=em231231-6-safe&t=1&akid=1641%2E734936%2EYyByb5)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._
[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1044?c0=ruben-em-dec23.THMJwK&amount=3&refcode=em231231-6-safe&t=2&akid=1641%2E734936%2EYyByb5)
Thank you in advance for chipping in. It means the world to Ruben, and to our chances.
\- Gallego for Arizona

name: Why did you ignore us? [FFR]
subject: Jamie Raskin needs your help ＡＳＡＰ
disclaimer_text: paid for and provided in kind by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P
body:
Don’t abandon Raskin in his time of need!
| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=20585%2E4449941%2EO117Xb)
---
Hey,

Last week, we sent you our urgent public opinion poll on Rep. Jamie Raskin.

**But our records indicate that you didn’t respond.** Without your response, we’re still [5] local responses short and our dataset for your state is invalid.

Your response is vital to updating our 2024 Election Strategy. **[_Click HERE or use the button below to complete your poll »_](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/approve_raskin?source=FFR_20231231_EMPOLL_E5_T0_NS_RS&t=7&akid=20585%2E4449941%2EO117Xb)** | [COMPLETE POLL NOW »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/approve_raskin?source=FFR_20231231_EMPOLL_E5_T0_NS_RS&t=8&akid=20585%2E4449941%2EO117Xb)
---
I’ve attached the original poll below for your records. Thanks,

Andrew

Fight for Reform
\---------- Forwarded message \---------
From: 🔴 IMPEACHMENT UPDATE (via FFR)
Subject: Jamie Raskin gave the GOP one last chance...
To: Top Democrats
[]()
**Raskin met with the GOP,_in good faith_ , to convince them to end this _WASTE_ of taxpayer money.**

But instead of listening to him, _the GOP is doubling down on their impeachment scheme and attacking Raskin to send his approval rating PLUMMETING!_
**So we’re conducting an urgent poll to disrupt their efforts:**
* * *
**[_Do you approve of Rep. Jamie Raskin?_](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/approve_raskin?source=FFR_20231231_EMPOLL_E5_T0_NS_RS&t=9&akid=20585%2E4449941%2EO117Xb)**
**[YES, I ABSOLUTELY DO! »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/approve_raskin?source=FFR_20231231_EMPOLL_E5_T0_NS_RS&t=10&akid=20585%2E4449941%2EO117Xb)**
---
**[NO, I DO NOT »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/approve_raskin?source=FFR_20231231_EMPOLL_E5_T0_NS_RS&t=11&akid=20585%2E4449941%2EO117Xb)**
**[I’M UNSURE »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/approve_raskin?source=FFR_20231231_EMPOLL_E5_T0_NS_RS&t=12&akid=20585%2E4449941%2EO117Xb)**
***YOU MUST RESPOND WITHIN 5 MINUTES AFTER OPENING THIS MESSAGE***
* * *
Listen, MAGA Republicans are willing to do *ANYTHING* to help Donald Trump claw his way back into the White House!

_Including IMPEACHING President Bident and undermining the entire democratic process!_

**That’s why the GOP is INFURIATED that a Democratic trooper like Rep. Raskin would try to stop their scheme!**
**[_We can’t let them sink his approval ratings and chances at re-election when our democracy is hinging on the bravery and grit of Democrats like him. So please don’t delay, take our critical Jamie Raskin approval poll ASAP! »_](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/approve_raskin?source=FFR_20231231_EMPOLL_E5_T0_NS_RS&t=13&akid=20585%2E4449941%2EO117Xb)**
***YOU MUST RESPOND WITHIN 5 MINUTES AFTER OPENING THIS MESSAGE***
We look forward to reading your responses,

– Fight for Reform

Friend,

You've probably received a ton of emails from candidates and elected
officials from across the country today. This is the third email I've sent
out, but it's for a good reason. With under 2 hours from the end of the
quarter, our campaign is just 127 donations away from our goal! My
campaign manager Ben is sweating bullets, but I know we can make it.

serious our campaign is. I've spent my whole life fighting for economic

Can you donate $1 or more to help us bring in our final 127 donations?

Thank you for your support,

— Qasim

name: Grassroots Fundraising Update (via JoeBiden.com)
subject: Our final email of 2023
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
We have to ask: Will you answer our final call-to-action of 2023? | | |
---
Peter -- You’re reading the last email we’ll send you this year, and it’s one of the most important ones we’ve sent you. Because when we wake up tomorrow, it will be January. If we're going to beat Donald Trump -- or whichever extreme candidate wins the Republican nomination -- we've got to make every day count. According to our records, we still need to pull in a few more donations from 18326 in order to hit our final fundraising goal of 2023 at midnight. This deadline is not just one of our most important deadlines because our end-of-quarter fundraising numbers will go public -- it's also our last chance to make sure we go into the new year with every resource at our disposal to win this race. clean_body: We have to ask: Will you answer our final call-to-action of 2023? | | | Peter -- You’re reading the last email we’ll send you this year, and it’s one of the most important ones we’ve sent you. Because when we wake up tomorrow, it will be January. If we're going to beat Donald Trump -- or whichever extreme candidate wins the Republican nomination -- we've got to make every day count. According to our records, we still need to pull in a few more donations from 18326 in order to hit our final fundraising goal of 2023 at midnight. This deadline is not just one of our most important deadlines because our end-of-quarter fundraising numbers will go public -- it's also our last chance to make sure we go into the new year with every resource at our disposal to win this race. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Thank you for being on this team with us, Team Biden-Harris

Dear Peter,
**As the clock winds down on 2023, we find ourselves at a pivotal moment in our campaign for liberty and the restoration of America.**
Your steadfast support has brought us closer to our $6 Million goal, _but time is of the essence_.
__This is your final opportunity__ to make a difference before the clock strikes midnight on December 31. We urgently need your help to secure ballot access in all 50 states, a critical step in the journey toward a renewed America.
The challenges ahead are significant, and the costs are substantial. To face these challenges head-on, we estimate needing up to $18,000,000. Your contribution, no matter the size, will play a decisive role in reaching this ambitious goal.
[Now is the time to act. Join us in these final hours and make a lasting impact on the future of our great nation.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=yr_end_12_31_23_email_4rs_2_nd&n=3)

clean_body: Will you help us protect it? Peter, I decided to bump this email from earlier today because we are in the closing hours of our triple match for the Redwood Land Fund. As we move into 2024 and beyond, environmental issues and the need to protect our natural world will continue to be a challenge. But not a challenge without a solution. Protecting the grandest forests on Earth helps store carbon to fight climate change in the years ahead, and ensures that natural places will be protected for our posterity to enjoy and be inspired by. Ring in the new year with the knowledge that this is a future you’re helping make possible. Thank you, and best wishes for a happy and healthy 2024. -Sam From: Redwoods Match Team <membership@savetheredwoods.org> Sent: Sunday, December 31, 2023 5:13:02 PM To: You Subject: 🌲Go 🌲 Go 🌲 Go We're so close, will you help set us up for success? When this thermometer tops out, it will indicate that we’ve reached our year-end goal and made the most of our $100,000 triple-match for the Redwood Land Fund. At this moment, we have at least two opportunities on the horizon to purchase unprotected redwood forests in 2024.** The Redwood Land Fund is the engine behind our conservation work. We never want to say we let a prized redwood property slip by. Thank you for being a crucial part of preserving the redwood forests for generations to come. Redwoods Match Team | | | | ---|---|---|--- Save the Redwoods League 111 Sutter Street, 11th Floor San Francisco, CA 94104 United States tel:415-362-2352 | |

name: Ike McCorkle
subject: so close
body:
I am anxiously refreshing ActBlue to see if we’ll get over the line and the clock is ticking dangerously close to midnight on the east coast (when the FEC deadline is)

| | | [ ](https://mccorkle.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGztcwJvWfFnVYy2EmP7hoQY5_NzKl_CqVsZFmoi2Xjq_NA&e=0120ca2529c09955473d28f088272fa4&utm_source=mccorkle&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_bf_10&n=1)

Friend,

Firstly, please accept my most sincere apologies for sending you so many emails today on NYE of all days.

Democrats from across the country have gotten us _sooooo close_ to meeting our goal over the past few hours and I am SO impressed and beyond grateful. _But it's not time to celebrate yet_.

Presently we are just **$362 dollars** short of our goal.

The clock is ticking dangerously close to midnight on the east coast (when the FEC deadline is) and I am anxiously refreshing ActBlue to see if we’ll get over the line.

**It’s been 20 minutes since we received our last donation and I’m worried that we won’t get there.**

---
[ ](https://mccorkle.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGztcwJvWfFnVYy2EmP7hoQY5_NzKl_CqVsZFmoi2Xjq_NA&e=0120ca2529c09955473d28f088272fa4&utm_source=mccorkle&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_bf_10&n=2)
---
We are in our final sprint and I know that we can close this gap by midnight. _If literally just 15 people chip in $25_ we will reach our goal before the deadline tonight.
---
| [](https://mccorkle.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGztPLrVYQeQdwsB5TDQqpqUXrjx7mVmyEoCwh3TuEA-WmCHO4Bf2h56en28mpe-ojwFtxqIN5OVElLstKQcBRRn4vuPnxUbDTu9UsSkoAwuB4A&e=0120ca2529c09955473d28f088272fa4&utm_source=mccorkle&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_bf_10&n=3 "Rush $25") [Rush $25](https://mccorkle.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGztPLrVYQeQdwsB5TDQqpqUXrjx7mVmyEoCwh3TuEA-WmCHO4Bf2h56en28mpe-ojwFtxqIN5OVElLstKQcBRRn4vuPnxUbDTu9UsSkoAwuB4A&e=0120ca2529c09955473d28f088272fa4&utm_source=mccorkle&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_bf_10&n=3)

---
Or if you can save the day for us and are able to contribute the entire $362 we have left, you can do so through this secure personalized link: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mccorkleforcolorado?dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://mccorkle.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGztcwJvWfFnVYy2EmP7hoQY57pNxalWQwOl0Vw-aAK1Sl42kipuG2SigGsIuJpE0vPA&e=0120ca2529c09955473d28f088272fa4&utm_source=mccorkle&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_bf_10&n=5) When you are up against Boebert every dollar counts, whether it’s $1 or $500, your support is going to have a massively outsized impact for us at this critical moment.

**2024 Will be the year we rid Congress of national disgrace Lauren Boebert once and for all.** _Semper Fi and happy new years!_

Isaac "Ike" McCorkle
Combat Wounded
U.S. Marine Corps, Retired
Democratic Candidate for CO-04

| Peter,

The deadline is fast approaching! Y[ou have until midnight tonight to make a contribution and support our campaign. This is your final opportunity to join us in our mission to support our military and secure our borders.](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=39ce2f0950&e=273c9a71fb)

Our military personnel embody the values of honor, duty, and sacrifice. They protect our freedoms and safeguard our American way of life. Your generous contribution will ensure they have the support, resources, and respect they deserve.

Additionally, our nation is facing a border crisis that threatens our national security and the stability of our communities. By supporting our campaign, you will help us advocate for legislation that prioritizes border security, enforcing our immigration laws and protecting our citizens.

Time is running out, but [your support can still make a difference.](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=310f723d09&e=273c9a71fb)

Every dollar counts, and [your donation will directly impact our efforts to support our military and secure our borders.](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=ab143628c0&e=273c9a71fb)

Thank you for your unwavering support. Together, we can make a lasting impact.

name: Salud Carbajal
subject: This New Year's Eve
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Salud Carbajal for Congress
body:
Happy New Year’s Eve!

2023 has gone by in a blink of an eye, and I hope you are safely celebrating this last day of the year with friends and loved ones.

Before the year ends, my fundraising team asked me to reach out to you about our fundraising deadline one more time.

Can you visit https://secure.ngpvan.com/zmwtXan58kG2nPCZu2OmHw2 to make one last final contribution of the year?

Your support means a lot and will help us start 2024 off strong.

I have enjoyed staying in touch, and am grateful for your generosity this past year. I hope you and yours have a fun New Year’s Eve and Happy New Year!

Sincerely,
Salud

Paid for by Salud Carbajal for Congress
PO Box 1290, Santa Barbara, CA 93102

name: Letitia James
subject: I'm so disappointed, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY 2026
body:
Peter, I don't even know what happened here.
---
A few days ago, I reached out to this powerful community with an update – my end-of-quarter deadline is getting closer and I need to raise $10,000 by midnight tonight.
From the get-go, dozens of supporters made donations to help me meet my goal. But then, out of nowhere, donations came to a standstill – causing us to be on the verge of falling short of our goal for December.
I’ll be honest: I’m disappointed that we may fall short, but I _refuse _to let it get the best of us. I’m confident in the size and strength of this grassroots team – **and that’s why I’m asking you to help us make up the gap on our final $2,479 left with only hours to go.**
**Peter, I’m counting on _you_ to be one of the people I need to make a donation, so please: **[**Will you donate any amount before 11:59 p.m. to support our fight for progress?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76252971/447052949/-2022127741?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1293-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMGRjYWY4MC02N2E4LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjFmNTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XxbUjqsTQHvZe8OaTDSZ-01C_cU2XOhhsA-61Dnm5aQ=)

Letitia

**[582] fearless fighters from your area have chipped in this year to support Attorney General James' work.** Thanks to the support of your peers, the attorney general has been able to take the powerful and corrupt to court, secure real wins for everyday Americans from manipulative corporations and organizations, and fight to protect our fundamental rights, like reproductive freedom for all.
But the reality is, 2024 will be our toughest year yet for progress – and we truly need _every_ single supporter who is in the position to give to help fund Letitia James' work.
Once again, the White House, Senate, and House of Representatives are all at stake in 2024 – but next year will be unlike any before. With things like our reproductive rights, voting rights, and social services under attack, losing control of Washington could be _catastrophic_ for millions of Americans.
**And that is exactly why it is vital that we support strong, fearless fighters at the state level, like Attorney General James.** She's working tirelessly to ensure that New York _remains_ a beacon of progress while also going toe to toe with other far-right attorneys general to expand these protections beyond New York.
**But this fight will only grow harder. So we have to ask, before the year ends:**** ****[Can we count on you to make your first donation of 2023 now to help fund Attorney General James' impactful work?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76252976/447052954/-2022127741?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1293-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMGRjYWY4MC02N2E4LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjFmNTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XxbUjqsTQHvZe8OaTDSZ-01C_cU2XOhhsA-61Dnm5aQ=)**

subject: We need help this afternoon.

body:
Please, Patriot...
No images? [Click here](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-e-xtjyua-didthutlhu-u/) [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xtjyua-didthutlhu-r/)
### Friend,
### It was a _**YUGE**_ morning!
### We're well on our way to making our 2023 Year-End Goal.
### We're only $1,200 away, but less than 12 hours to make it.
[FINISH STRONG IN 2023](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xtjyua-didthutlhu-y/)
### In 2024, the road to the White House and majorities in the US Senate and House run **STRAIGHT** through Wisconsin.
### Beyond that, the Republican nomination for President will **OCCUR IN MILWAUKEE**.
### Republicans are invested in Wisconsin, but we need help from you to keep up the momentum to be successful in April's municipal elections **AND** November's General Election.
### It's cliched, but 2024 **WILL** be the single most important election in Wisconsin's history. Our state has decided the President of the United States in the last two elections, and in 2024 we will--once again--easily be the state that decides the country's leader.
[CLOSE THE GAP RIGHT NOW](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xtjyua-didthutlhu-j/)
### This election, four more years of Bidenomics, open borders, crime-ridden cities, and weaponized legal systems are on the ballot. And, it is up to **US** in Wisconsin to set the country straight. We need everyone on the team, though, to make it happen.
### Wishing you a happy, healthy, and **WINNING** New Year in 2024!
### -Team WisGOP
[HELP THE CAUSE](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xtjyua-didthutlhu-t/) [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xtjyua-didthutlhu-i/)[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xtjyua-didthutlhu-d/)[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xtjyua-didthutlhu-h/)[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xtjyua-didthutlhu-k/) PAID FOR BY THE REPUBLICAN PARTY OF WISCONSIN NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. name: American Action News
subject: Big Pharma and the federal government
body:
In America, various industries have close ties to government regulators.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z332qndkquofff6a0fak5udbnqa9qu5do7cecddg_rp22sh2s8i6eo31chg66o75c1h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

In America, various industries have close ties to government regulators.

The pharmaceutical industry is one of the most notable and most troubling.

Last year alone, "Big Pharma" spent over $373 million on lobbying--much more than any other industry.

While the Constitution certainly protects the rights to free speech and to petition the government, it was never intended to grant the special privileges that are characteristic of today's bureaucratic, administrative state.

In addition, Big Pharma's reputation has come under attack in the wake of America's opioid epidemic--since 1999, more than 600,000 people have died from opioid overdoses in the U.S. and Canada alone--and the COVID pandemic.

Given these current controversies, we decided to host a conference to consider the rise of Big Pharma, its role in the declining state of American health, and ideas for reform.

**The result is a free online video series that reveals the truth about Big Pharma.**

When you watch this free video series, you'll learn about the collaboration between the federal government and pharmaceutical companies, the content of the "Pfizer documents," and the origins of Big Pharma and the opioid epidemic.

You'll also gain valuable insights into Anthony Fauci and the public health establishment from Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.

**You can receive instant access to this free video series right now using this secure link:**

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/big-pharma-cca/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zo43t0sa179gjdg4huqp0kf0ai7lauoh9f205s8g_rp22sh2s8i6eo31chg66o75c1h2bs)**

We filmed the series at a recent Center for Constructive Alternatives conference on the Hillsdale campus. You will not have to watch for long to discover why it was one of our most popular and well-attended events.

**Please use the secure link above to receive your Big Pharma video series. When you complete the form, we will email you the series so you can watch it immediately.**

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844**
**

---
| |
---

American Action News

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear Friend, In America, various industries have close ties to government regulators. The pharmaceutical industry is one of the most notable and most troubling. Last year alone, "Big Pharma" spent over $373 million on lobbying--much more than any other industry. While the Constitution certainly protects the rights to free speech and to petition the government, it was never intended to grant the special privileges that are characteristic of today's bureaucratic, administrative state. In addition, Big Pharma's reputation has come under attack in the wake of America's opioid epidemic--since 1999, more than 600,000 people have died from opioid overdoses in the U.S. and Canada alone--and the COVID pandemic. Given these current controversies, we decided to host a conference to consider the rise of Big Pharma, its role in the declining state of American health, and ideas for reform. The result is a free online video series that reveals the truth about Big Pharma. When you watch this free video series, you'll learn about the collaboration between the federal government and pharmaceutical companies, the content of the "Pfizer documents," and the origins of Big Pharma and the opioid epidemic. You'll also gain valuable insights into Anthony Fauci and the public health establishment from Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. You can receive instant access to this free video series right now using this secure link: We filmed the series at a recent Center for Constructive Alternatives conference on the Hillsdale campus. You will not have to watch for long to discover why it was one of our most popular and well-attended events. Please use the secure link above to receive your Big Pharma video series. When you complete the form, we will email you the series so you can watch it immediately. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 | | American Action News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Where is America in the End Times?
body:
Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?

| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmfhhf9mfjigqbj9aejjjot59d75tvt1coutp8h8_rp22sh2s8i6eo31chg66o75chh2bs)
---
Hello Friend,

Take a moment to look around. It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 - trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator.

Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?

I want to remind you, Friend, that this chaotic time is fleeting. The shadows will fade, and a new day will dawn. The King of Kings, our Savior, will return.

That's the heart of Revelation.

Each day on this earth shapes us for what's to come - a grand finale. Amidst today's messiness and uncertainty, remember the promise that our story's end is already secured, regardless of the present turmoil or future darkness.

Revelation intricately unveils where our stories lead.

It's a captivating book filled with symbols, creatures, and events yet to unfold. But remember Revelation 1:3 - there's a blessing for those who read, listen, and follow its words because the time is near.

This isn't just a prophecy; it's a blessing-filled journey.

Revelation isn't just about revealing future events; it's about revealing Jesus Christ.

When Jesus came as a man, His divine brilliance was veiled by humanity. It's like dimming a lamp's light. But when He returns, that veil will lift, and we'll see His true glory. That's Revelation's essence.

As the great reveal approaches, I'm here to guide you and your loved ones through the remarkable events preceding the revelation of our King.

In my brand-new book, _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ , I tackle five common questions about the end times. We'll delve into:

1\. America's Fate: Will America stand for Christ or fall for the Antichrist?
2\. The Day of the Lord: How should we live in anticipation of this apocalyptic event?
3\. The Marriage of the Lamb: What unfolds before and after the rapture?
4\. Gog and Magog: How can we honor God in our lives amid their appearance?
5\. The Tree of Life: What's the significance of this tree in the New Jerusalem?

Understanding these mysteries will anchor you in hope, bolster your trust in God's promises, and equip you to share with the unsure.

In addition to this new book, I would like to share with you "The Major Characters of the End Times," as a token of my gratitude for your support. This full-color, large print booklet introduces key players during the rapture, tribulation, second coming, and final judgment - vital for understanding the grand narrative.
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqjte57jhn0tsus725pvb91jm7rfk4ms4tj8790g_rp22sh2s8i6eo31chg66o75chh2bs)I would like to send you my brand-new book _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ and my brand-new resource "The Major Characters of the End Times" as a thank you for your generous support of $10 or more to the ministry of _Pathway to Victory_.
Make your generous gift here: [https://secure.ptv.org/mysteries-of-the-end-times-generous-gift-1-dr-robert-jeffress](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zej8djun2ifehmn83lqr050jank7r9ps5b3dvhug_rp22sh2s8i6eo31chg66o75chh2bs)

_Pathway to Victory_ is committed to equipping believers with biblical teaching and reaching the unsaved by spreading the Good News of Jesus Christ through the most effective means available: radio, television, digital, and print. Your gifts fuel that important work and enable people worldwide to experience an intimate walk with Christ. Thank you for your faithful support.

May our study of Revelation prepare, strengthen, and inspire you. Come quickly, Lord Jesus.

Sharing the Truth of God's Word, ____
---
| | Dr. Robert Jeffress Senior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas
---

GOP Presidential
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: American Defense News
subject: Who controls whom?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

| | | This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zhbpteac8m3fsv6m4tppiolf62knhd15930qlvcg_rp22sh2s8i6eo31chg66o75c1h2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection **by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zv5hb5lrs6j21op3m39vnc8bo57ohke2oub1o0r8_rp22sh2s8i6eo31chg66o75c1h2bs)**
## Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?
[YES](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zg9t2ekt0q8jiv45i1bg06imcbe4u65us59e7e40_rp22sh2s8i6eo31chg66o75c1h2bs) [NO](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zvaiiv9avil8lu1unu93j92rss8ek978e5j1ufu8_rp22sh2s8i6eo31chg66o75c1h2bs) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zot6t1trhssv2bpi9bfqv6c0746og4pot9u9qllg_rp22sh2s8i6eo31chg66o75c1h2bs)**
** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

American Defense News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z0ntmmbvb4ae5ka8q1di6a4hdqgiav0l2dkican0_rp22sh2s8i6eo31chg66o75c1h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmuin7djle8r7ccjkm8qjf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpi9df4c9h6cpj4sdh2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zrd1o697jlp03mks6ge4qh87uf4ba1nc64ecviag_rp22sh2s8i6eo31chg66o75c1h2bs)_

name: 1600 Daily
subject: C.S. Lewis's Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions

| This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zhks866f1qsjnifavbs2bhjkhamem4480hhodqo8_rp22sh2s8i6eo31chg66o75chh2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That’s why we produced “[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z97m3vi8ce21l7p3s2vj9ap48mu4todle5qdaq4o_rp22sh2s8i6eo31chg66o75chh2bs)” which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zgo29jvb55f8mb9ogj6tpqruuv25v62tlhjlorog_rp22sh2s8i6eo31chg66o75chh2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis’s profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis’s The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis’s Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis’s beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis’s own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That’s why I hope you’ll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zh0ar47kqfs4bav9hca0oh6qavvs58cl2g355rbg_rp22sh2s8i6eo31chg66o75chh2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

1600 Daily
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
