name: American Update
subject: Google’s “ChatGPT” could make you rich
body:
ChatGPT took the world by storm.

| Dear Reader, ChatGPT took the world by storm. It reached one million users in just 5 days. That's faster than Netflix... Faster than Instagram... And faster than Facebook. And it could soon generate $1 billion in revenue a year. ChatGPT kicked off an AI boom, which Forbes reports could add $15.7 trillion to the world economy by 2030. But get this... Google is about to launch a new AI project that's 5X better than ChatGPT. [And I've found a way for you to profit from it. ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c689767%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qVEp8fFDB8GfCuddQb4ECA&sysid=1) Google paid me over $1.5 million in 2022 ([click here to see the 1099 tax form that proves it](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c689768%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=SkDFfdgMtLw%2fci8PnC%2fkjw&sysid=1)). And through my knowledge of Google, I've discovered a company that's supplying a key piece of technology that makes Google's new AI project possible. I'm confident anyone who [gets shares in this Google supplier today could see massive gains. ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c689769%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=agrqZW8H87EObMN2lGZ%2biw&sysid=1) But you need to act now. Google's new AI project is going live as we speak. Over 92% of internet users use Google. That's 4.3 billion people. And I believe as Google rolls out this new AI project to all these people, [this little-known supplier could skyrocket. ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c689760%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=nKyUCb%2bcPaODlHRNXYEyNQ&sysid=1) This will impact a LOT of people. And it could make a lot of people rich in the process. But this roll-out will only happen once. **[Get the details here before it's too late.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c689761%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=MDx6YEHr1NmD7MILM775mA&sysid=1)** Regards, Colin Tedards
Editor, _Brownstone Research_

name: American Update
subject: Food shortages are coming
body:
This might be your only warning.

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_“Food shortages are coming.”_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c689777%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=u0yJ22iaOVg%2b0eO2IKXEIg&sysid=1). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c689778%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=VKDIX8rNeOjbC%2b973B%2bv1A&sysid=1) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c689779%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=IErIh8ciahSJG7OiT53bmw&sysid=1) on these survival food kits while you can.

name: American Briefing
subject: Big Pharma and the federal government
body:
In America, various industries have close ties to government regulators.

This sponsored message from American Briefing is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z8snbpacf197aqeudve8u8ke1pttmi7iikpmfbio_rp22sh2s8i6eo31chi60ob2cjh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

In America, various industries have close ties to government regulators.

The pharmaceutical industry is one of the most notable and most troubling.

Last year alone, "Big Pharma" spent over $373 million on lobbying--much more than any other industry.

While the Constitution certainly protects the rights to free speech and to petition the government, it was never intended to grant the special privileges that are characteristic of today's bureaucratic, administrative state.

In addition, Big Pharma's reputation has come under attack in the wake of America's opioid epidemic--since 1999, more than 600,000 people have died from opioid overdoses in the U.S. and Canada alone--and the COVID pandemic.

Given these current controversies, we decided to host a conference to consider the rise of Big Pharma, its role in the declining state of American health, and ideas for reform.

**The result is a free online video series that reveals the truth about Big Pharma.**

When you watch this free video series, you'll learn about the collaboration between the federal government and pharmaceutical companies, the content of the "Pfizer documents," and the origins of Big Pharma and the opioid epidemic.

You'll also gain valuable insights into Anthony Fauci and the public health establishment from Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.

**You can receive instant access to this free video series right now using this secure link:**

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/big-pharma-cca/](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zerb1hjn7rav4inlhead5oehujidj626gdlp6bp8_rp22sh2s8i6eo31chi60ob2cjh2bs)**

We filmed the series at a recent Center for Constructive Alternatives conference on the Hillsdale campus. You will not have to watch for long to discover why it was one of our most popular and well-attended events.

**Please use the secure link above to receive your Big Pharma video series. When you complete the form, we will email you the series so you can watch it immediately.**

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844**
**

---
| |
---

American Briefing
---

name: ICYMI News
subject: C.S. Lewis's Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions

| This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zb3lhceubj667tbea9oqf306gch3jukk0tnf33lo_rp22sh2s8i6eo31chi60ob6c3h2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That’s why we produced “[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zogtqmtr4kfroto0qq0r23eb81q1cb9horfp3l30_rp22sh2s8i6eo31chi60ob6c3h2bs)” which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zg4kdn87kme2ighk1e34s419pe7dib9q88bvr4h0_rp22sh2s8i6eo31chi60ob6c3h2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis’s profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis’s The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis’s Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis’s beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis’s own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That’s why I hope you’ll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z84mro3ls839170fmm7sinolgno879stqm58g52o_rp22sh2s8i6eo31chi60ob6c3h2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

# **[Suspects attempt D.C. area carjacking, but things go awry when they target an armed off-duty cop](http://trk.libertyledger._c2V5aWQ9MTEwMzkxIn0/Xy-xUjgaMRj4It6tELjuiA)**
---
Carjackings have been all the rage with would-be car thieves lately, as the violent encounters have soared since the start of the COVID-19 pandemic. A couple of young D.C. area suspects tried to get in on the action in Maryland recently, but got an unexpected surprise instead: an armed off-duty cop who sent the pair scurrying when he fired at them as they tried to force his family out of the car. The incident reportedly occurred around 5:00pm Thursday in Oxon Hill, Maryland, just outside of Washington, D.C.

# **[Bill Maher and Seth MacFarlane cross swords in heated debate over COVID vaccine efficacy: 'Djokovic didn't need it!'](http://trk.libertyledger._WMAPD6K45m1rZeAPasCTg)**
---
Bill Maher brashly challenged "Family Guy" creator Seth McFarlane on the effectiveness and safety of the COVID vaccine. Maher declared on his "Club Random" podcast: "I would think this country did not allow for natural immunity to be considered. And I know this is a subject dear to your heart. Like, even if you had the disease, you still had to get a vaccine. That’s powerfully stupid. They don’t do that in Europe."MacFarlane claimed that the theory of natural immunity for COVID-19 was "debunked.

name: ICYMI News
subject: Who controls whom?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

| | | This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zaplfn0r7oun5h36j8nnp96du4r4pbjk74stuujg_rp22sh2s8i6eo31chi60ob6c3h2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection **by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ztuhvuftsskttb4f17uih5m06k24t42gf188rd10_rp22sh2s8i6eo31chi60ob6c3h2bs)**
## Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?
[YES](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zu5qmjir75h17lk9qd7upe3bqauprmusplugmg1g_rp22sh2s8i6eo31chi60ob6c3h2bs) [NO](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zjnndpkm0k1sadk9ofmmgsaiugql1hjopmlp05i0_rp22sh2s8i6eo31chi60ob6c3h2bs) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zmcvpc99j8o3od15t3e0jljbclhr0cvsc6h5k9qg_rp22sh2s8i6eo31chi60ob6c3h2bs)**
** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

ICYMI News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z5va633loa2df5jad3272unpnffm5apc8utqhon8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkir39tdkmeqjetjjkorrbdt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8oj2cpgm0pb246h22sh2s8i6eo31chi60ob6c3h2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8un6ovnqgkt3ti453ud9bktk40deb9glbi6ktq0_rp22sh2s8i6eo31chi60ob6c3h2bs)_

name: 1600 Daily
subject: Survey on the Department of Justice
body:
The survey will only take a few moments of your time

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdcu49ujnl4dtj18sbotfg3tu8ikh57v3625ebdo_rp22sh2s8i6eo31chi60ob6cjh2bs) Dear Friend, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration 's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it...
* Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights

* Hides the corruption of the ruling class

* Attacks those with traditional viewpoints

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zen1di3tg9se5poa7js2bhhrn6ro5uqscm63h438_rp22sh2s8i6eo31chi60ob6cjh2bs)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide

After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z3c9s5mf8fhv766kinr9ji0vkk8r95tk0l8vh85g_rp22sh2s8i6eo31chi60ob6cjh2bs)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| 1600 Daily
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: The Declaration of Independence argues that the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights and that just government is founded on the consent of the governed. Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat. A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is reaching and teaching millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions. These efforts include: Teaching bright and principled students --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, classical liberal arts education, including a required course on the Constitution Distributing Imprimis , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon Producing and promoting free online courses for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics Providing a classical K-12 curriculum with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our National Survey on the Department of Justice and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to reach and teach millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached National Survey on the Department of Justice , which you can access at this secure link: ** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 | | 1600 Daily 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

---
# FROM THE DESK OF ALAN DERSHOWITZ
---
| | Dear Reader,I am a lifelong supporter and defender of Israel. I do so on moral grounds, because of our shared values and because she has many vicious enemies. In particular, I've found much of the mainstream press coverage of Israel to be appalling. It's often misleading, inaccurate, and just plain biased. **Now, as Israel faces a desperate fight for its future, I’ve increasingly found myself turning to the outstanding and unique coverage of The New York Sun**.
---
| | [Join the Sun Now →](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z87gbmri6hn2sr6vbc58b75eko9itbgi6ic27feo_rp22sh2s8i6eo31chi60ob6cjh2bs)
---
| | The Sun takes the side of right over popular. I consider the Sun to be one of Israel’s most ardent defenders in the American press. It’s for this reason that when I have something to say, I often turn to the Sun. They have carried a number of my columns since the attack on October 7th (I've written many). **The voice of the Sun is precious and far too rare.** I’ve been impressed by its impact and influence, but I know it is the David in this battle, facing many Goliaths. It’s a battle that the Sun must win and I have pledged my support.**The Sun’s success will be a triumph over falsehood**. To succeed, we need you to join. I highly encourage you to become a member of the Sun today.

name: American Action News
subject: The key to Lincoln’s rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills

| This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z47rg21lhrv9c8u3aq7qvci6n7l1h0vnob3ac2e8_rp22sh2s8i6eo31chi60ob6cjh2bs)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.” **
Through** “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgf2lcf17gjelqgeoqpte0jf6r4cf2m6m55j19a8_rp22sh2s8i6eo31chi60ob6cjh2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znv2nsqicpferpc7cu0s18ig9uvmulsl5am08vvg_rp22sh2s8i6eo31chi60ob6cjh2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Your America
subject: Important Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning.

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_“Food shortages are coming.”_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38561%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ph%2frsWNHG786A7RUUF%2bNvQ&sysid=1). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38562%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=z2qmEPQu7nG9wygCnqe3cQ&sysid=1) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38563%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ecwKEBdhdbGiYb91p5bhlg&sysid=1) on these survival food kits while you can.
---

name: Pro Life Update
subject: C.S. Lewis's Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions

| This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zm9rht4e257s566h28954mu1553ol8ibo57ptm88_rp22sh2s8i6eo31chi62o32c3h2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That’s why we produced “[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z835plh368epmttfa99o73mfkigita65qr23nueo_rp22sh2s8i6eo31chi62o32c3h2bs)” which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z65s0h3g6vis11iqotcj5d6t16r88hdrjaqqa1bg_rp22sh2s8i6eo31chi62o32c3h2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis’s profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis’s The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis’s Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis’s beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis’s own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That’s why I hope you’ll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zp4fm8ode1dvn3lhd1i1p6cse2n8g3kj211vp7h0_rp22sh2s8i6eo31chi62o32c3h2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Pro Life Update
---

name: Kevin D. Roberts
subject: An opportunity to save our nation
body:
Unfortunately, a conservative victory in the next election is not enough to save our country.

| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zkksukl9jecj9kopl8c2vrqpakr8datrkv9qbv80_rp22sh2s8i6eo31chi62o32cdh2bs)
---
Dear Fellow Patriot,

The next presidential administration could be a turning point for our country.

After years of inflation, open borders, reckless spending, and rampant crime, America desperately needs effective governance grounded in our founding principles.

Unfortunately, a conservative victory in the next election is not enough to save our country.

That's because today, the deep state controls D.C.

**Regardless of who is in office, career bureaucrats in our federal agencies like the Justice Department, Environmental Protection Agency, and the State Department independently push their own leftist agendas.

** In order to implement common-sense, conservative policies, we must have a plan to rein in these agencies and replace these leftist bureaucrats with principled conservatives.

The Heritage Foundation has that plan--called Project 2025.

**Through Project 2025, The Heritage Foundation has united 80 conservative organizations and is leading the charge for the next presidential transition plan.**

Heritage's policy scholars created a comprehensive policy book and a plan to implement it starting day one of the next administration.

These policies include securing our borders, ensuring election integrity, and reversing the growth of regulations, spending, and inflation.

Additionally, we're identifying and training qualified patriots to staff the next administration and replace the leftist bureaucrats - ending their control of the deep state.

**The radical leftist mainstream media has published several panicked articles attacking Heritage and Project 2025.**

But as we like to say, if the leftist media is angry at you, you're over the target.

As 2024 rapidly approaches, we're kicking Project 2025 into high gear.

Will you help us make this much needed program a massive success? Will you support Project 2025 with a special gift today?
**
****If you 're ready to ensure the next presidential administration can enact conservative policies you and I believe in, please make a tax-deductible year-end gift to The Heritage Foundation using the secure link below.

[https://secured.heritage.org/eoy-campaign/](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zormles91k4hbcn12d5gnloimbuv29kbngilhnj0_rp22sh2s8i6eo31chi62o32cdh2bs)**

Sincerely,

Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.
President, The Heritage Foundation

**P.S. Next year is a critical year and here at The Heritage Foundation, we 're ramping up our Project 2025 efforts to save America. Please make a tax-deductible contribution today to help us defeat the leftist deep state and create major conservative victories for America using this secure link below: [https://secured.heritage.org/eoy-campaign/](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8fijtrao0r43flpk37l0rgnjflf4cgk0lpnoh9g_rp22sh2s8i6eo31chi62o32cdh2bs)

name: American Action News
subject: Google’s “ChatGPT” could make you rich
body:
ChatGPT took the world by storm.

| Dear Reader, ChatGPT took the world by storm. It reached one million users in just 5 days. That's faster than Netflix... Faster than Instagram... And faster than Facebook. And it could soon generate $1 billion in revenue a year. ChatGPT kicked off an AI boom, which Forbes reports could add $15.7 trillion to the world economy by 2030. But get this... Google is about to launch a new AI project that's 5X better than ChatGPT. [And I've found a way for you to profit from it.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrekist87997jr2sv6efk513a34no3tq2q0csfd8_rp22sh2s8i6eo31chi62o32c3h2bs) Google paid me over $1.5 million in 2022 ([click here to see the 1099 tax form that proves it](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp204isbkq6bb733njj3rlas3403iqsarsbk6mfg_rp22sh2s8i6eo31chi62o32c3h2bs)). And through my knowledge of Google, I've discovered a company that's supplying a key piece of technology that makes Google's new AI project possible. I'm confident anyone who [gets shares in this Google supplier today could see massive gains.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfjp0bbsbf3b2alue2v0b51jc7k5cpvutsv86s7o_rp22sh2s8i6eo31chi62o32c3h2bs) But you need to act now. Google's new AI project is going live as we speak. Over 92% of internet users use Google. That's 4.3 billion people. name: Your America
subject: The key to Lincoln’s rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills

| This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38579%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Fo2dCeq06CgTec%2fz1zAk7w&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.” **
Through** “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38570%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=LFvzdTpWsUvNrOD6c6itJg&sysid=1)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38571%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=bnqTNE3UjyIV7Wh3DyFp9A&sysid=1)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: I want to know your thoughts
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zg1jhr1e0ttoe8q1ns9rdptg7kb063qe4tkbi2r0_rp22sh2s8i6eo31chi6eor2c9h2bs)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zi2lcnf25pj3dusa4ulg5ebgskakb9kh43ssfs50_rp22sh2s8i6eo31chi6eor2c9h2bs) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zq4l8nom1le0n9u8gp1ugbv0ai8s9rsb5bnd7sh8_rp22sh2s8i6eo31chi6eor2c9h2bs)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zltsam8s3kc8dsgfqlup7ccsedli01grf3pjgo68_rp22sh2s8i6eo31chi6eor2c9h2bs)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA Faith
subject: When a culture move further from Jesus
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.)
---
Fellow American We’re living in a pivotal time. In many ways we are witnessing the dystopian nightmare of a culture moving further from Jesus -- not closer to Jesus. **_As believers in Biblical truth, we need to speak up to current Western civilization and all of humanity!_** To help equip Pastors and congregations to put our Christian faith into action, TPUSA Faith hosts **_Freedom Night in America_**. Through this monthly series, a guest speaker joins me to engage in discussions around topics such as sexuality, gender, and family life. **[Freedom Night in America is on a mission to strengthen the church and fight for liberty — which is God’s idea, not man’s idea. Will you support our Freedom Night series with your gift of $35, $50, $100, $250, or $500 today?](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.-AWaNg)**
---
[Support Freedom Night in America ](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.)
---
[](http://trk.faithandlibertymail._2Y3NJRgIjkzm_g)
---
**_God’s Word is the ultimate truth._** But radicals who bow at the altar of “wokeism” disagree. Gov. Gavin Newsome may soon sign legislation that would allow the government to take children away from parents who oppose their “gender transition.” Congregants at the Cathedral of Hope Protestant Church in Dallas, TX were led in a prayer pledging allegiance to drag queens and the LGBTQ+ movement. This is blasphemy. **But there is hope!** Thousands of American churches are aligned with TPUSA Faith’s mission to restore Biblical values, but they currently lack both engagement and opportunities to make a positive political and cultural change in our nation. **[Your gift of $35 or more will support TPUSA Faith in securing speakers for Freedom Night in America who stand for Biblical truth and will empower Pastors and churches to put their faith into action.](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.-SCI6Mhw90Lexjdg)**
---
[](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.)
---
Christians founded this country, Fellow American. Fifty-five of the 56 signers of the Declaration of Independence were Bible-believing, church-attending Christians. They applied biblical principles and wisdom in the founding of our great nation, and for nearly 250 years, our country has experienced the blessings of liberty in abundance. But today, those biblical principles are under constant attack by decadent, humanistic, and amoral movements -- and if we don’t defend the foundational truths that have made our nation great, we’re going to reap the consequences. As the inheritors of the Founding Fathers’ vision, it’s our turn to own our faith and stand up for Biblical truth. Resistance to tyranny is Biblical, and we must speak up! **[With your generous support today, TPUSA Faith will continue reaching, engaging, and equipping Christians to share their faith and to be bold in the public arena on behalf of Biblical principles.](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.-GZMm3WqFtptRPTwTQ)** Thank you for your support! God bless you, Charlie KirkTurning Point USA Faith

[](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.)
---

---

Phoenix, Arizona 85044

As the inheritors of the Founding Fathers’ vision, it’s our turn to own our faith and stand up for Biblical truth. Resistance to tyranny is Biblical, and we must speak up! Thank you for your support! God bless you, Charlie KirkTurning Point USA Faith 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044 Faith & Liberty PO Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178 If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us to unsubscribe.

subject: The Battle for Truth Starts Now
body:
I am a lifelong supporter and defender of Israel.

# FROM THE DESK OF ALAN DERSHOWITZ
---
| | Dear Reader, I am a lifelong supporter and defender of Israel. I do so on moral grounds, because of our shared values and because she has many vicious enemies. In particular, I've found much of the mainstream press coverage of Israel to be appalling. It's often misleading, inaccurate, and just plain biased. **Now, as Israel faces a desperate fight for its future, I’ve increasingly found myself turning to the outstanding and unique coverage of The New York Sun**.
---
| | [Join the Sun Now →](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38581%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RqXyLLNDoY1mNt0uekRGlA&sysid=1)
---
| | The Sun takes the side of right over popular. I consider the Sun to be one of Israel’s most ardent defenders in the American press. It’s for this reason that when I have something to say, I often turn to the Sun. They have carried a number of my columns since the attack on October 7th (I've written many). **The voice of the Sun is precious and far too rare.** I’ve been impressed by its impact and influence, but I know it is the David in this battle, facing many Goliaths. It’s a battle that the Sun must win and I have pledged my support. **The Sun’s success will be a triumph over falsehood**. To succeed, we need you to join. I highly encourage you to become a member of the Sun today.
---

body:
CRISIS CONFIRMED: The lowest number of Americans in decades identify as Republicans, millions walking away from the Republican Party.
This is nothing short of a crisis, Fellow American.

Republicans are WALKING AWAY in droves from our Republican Partyparty. It is a crisis as we head into this critical presidential election year.

We need to know from you, Fellow American, are you walking away from the Republican Partyparty in 2024?

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Wishing you a happy 2024!
body:
| | | [](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
---
---
From all of us at Tea Party Patriots Action to you and your family, I’d like to wish you a safe and Happy New Year! We’ve been through a lot in the past few years, but we’re looking forward to a great 2024. I’m thrilled to have you on board as we head into this vitally important election year. Together, we can take back our country and build a better future for all freedom-loving Americans. Hope you enjoy a wonderful New Year’s Day with your loved ones! In Liberty,Jenny Beth Martin

Together, we can take back our country and build a better future for all freedom-loving Americans. Hope you enjoy a wonderful New Year’s Day with your loved ones! In Liberty,Jenny Beth Martin | | | | | Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc. operates as a social welfare organization under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. name: Kevin D. Roberts
subject: How you can defeat radical leftism
body:
Unfortunately, a conservative victory in the next election is not enough to save our country.

| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9e3f216b66e24878b73ed0369f2b861b&_e=oU1zGvsylK7pubovS1sivP5Y6rmhq7kwbOYQuqtNxeIBLmgVf6XYxm-H74VANtr1Nf1_3cgR83Vsd5oyGn2bcVMdrBtfPWSrhHdKVujWM2OwJovxQOTufwisUs1o4_-e54D2DMGpEND8Z83w37_dGpCuMi9qnkkb7xJp7jjk4Tzih2_LIFv0kiAf-F8LYWo2RjG9IljNHMvvgdPZn2J8OfiKG76HSmHQ7mFynx-s12IfJANqwyfb9eFCkvXZfOUt3iUL_E3MAv3kA-kdy08-2NV785QWWAzuvo_zzY1FtkwgULPqA6rPPBDEHaDLZthCSibZWXitGt8B88mxEw0miDmc6a9RErLhdPOEj96_EAo%3D)

Dear Fellow Patriot,

The next presidential administration could be a turning point for our country.

After years of inflation, open borders, reckless spending, and rampant crime, America desperately needs effective governance grounded in our founding principles.

Unfortunately, a conservative victory in the next election is not enough to save our country.

That's because today, the deep state controls D.C.

**Regardless of who is in office, career bureaucrats in our federal agencies like the Justice Department, Environmental Protection Agency, and the State Department independently push their own leftist agendas.

** In order to implement common-sense, conservative policies, we must have a plan to rein in these agencies and replace these leftist bureaucrats with principled conservatives.

The Heritage Foundation has that plan--called Project 2025.

**Through Project 2025, The Heritage Foundation has united 80 conservative organizations and is leading the charge for the next presidential transition plan.**

Heritage's policy scholars created a comprehensive policy book and a plan to implement it starting day one of the next administration.

These policies include securing our borders, ensuring election integrity, and reversing the growth of regulations, spending, and inflation.

Additionally, we're identifying and training qualified patriots to staff the next administration and replace the leftist bureaucrats - ending their control of the deep state.

**The radical leftist mainstream media has published several panicked articles attacking Heritage and Project 2025.**

But as we like to say, if the leftist media is angry at you, you're over the target.

As 2024 rapidly approaches, we're kicking Project 2025 into high gear.

Will you help us make this much needed program a massive success? Will you support Project 2025 with a special gift today?
**
****If you 're ready to ensure the next presidential administration can enact conservative policies you and I believe in, please make a tax-deductible year-end gift to The Heritage Foundation using the secure link below.

Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.
President, The Heritage Foundation

# MONDAY, JANUARY 1, 2024
---|---
**Happy New Year**! On this date in 1914, the first scheduled commercial airline flight in the U.S took place, flying travelers 18 miles in a two-seat plane from St. Petersburg to Tampa in 23 minutes. ([See Photos](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFurDAQQNGvgc7IYxuWLVy8Zrt9bUo0i8cwkY2RPVqUv4-SOvVtrs7Hc3kiJz62_5jJSywLrsJvWkCBMm5xffCRyJDtycNNO4AZZuh3_3ohgImzvVsM1k6v2eqIOE4rRjPf7z17o43ToAH0OIEegtajcW6OIYJ22nROU2ApdfgsfMhOMX2VN9VhLblPfhc5W2f_debRmcd1XUM7caWf2pkHTNN4U1epKTQVuTZRa8mZ6sqYFHJNfJCSndRWCYWaqFwyHdIUHyom3nYZdsmprz6cF6fEbbp1Tm8ZOf0uyF8e3wEAAP__pHBitQ)) Have you signed up for _The Flyover_ yet? ## U.S. Sinks Three Rebel Boats in Red Sea
The U.S. Navy sank three Houthi boats in the Red Sea on Sunday, [killing 10 Yemeni rebels](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGSozAQRL8GsqE0g2xwQHAJmS-9kBrQyOgsECWNTd3fX3k33bC7k37vz326c4hhf_zmTQb1aeJFw1smBASyk63d4EVI2loG7IxF7LHHeh0c3npp55v1xrJduiv1M9Pcunlu-8V2dRjIkDVoEM3liqZxxlzI2t47j8YaqqwRFzTl5m8Ku67i47_0ltwsaavjsKoepWp_VTRWNJ7n2WR5qeTy2T9NytFVNG7BuSggXPSTWHJ5wsGvIgWyOCjCUL4hC7BXybCml64BWJWXJyxpVw67ZChrOIAMtYAELVY01nlwxxliDOXaVdY8Ng7x66D-ZOt_AAAA___ZqGvh) after the boats attacked a Singapore-flagged container ship owned by Maersk, a Danish shipping company. The action was the [most significant engagement yet](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7Fy6yAQQNGvQR2a3dXa4hUUr6Fz2pQaDItFgo1HYCv--0xSp77FnfN-Wk4-l3y7vPmr2J7q4kPPT1lQoyZeeIg2iZBMg1icgRENGhxWawwcIUn4B3Rg5DDzHCZOyGfv2bAM2RIQAwIiHI4IYwQ4ELNJMSEwkGKQmHvdxo-ab32VVF71KdsY6nUodu393tT0X5FT5PZ9H_1Xru2nKnIENClySIrchIrcWh99zXqTs5Smfe8-fOpH0zf_fOlNom7ih83G-55Lye04K4bL1efyu-t_2b8DAAD__8SPWBc) for U.S. forces as part of an international effort to keep the shipping lanes open in the region. _" We're going to act in self-defense going forward,"_ a U.S. official said. Following the attack, Maersk announced it would pause any shipping in the Red Sea for at least 48 hours to assess the situation.
## World Population Hits 8 Billion Today
The world's population will [pass 8 billion people today](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGOozAQQL8GOkczg8FQuLgmXa69Etl4JvjkYGRM0P79Kltv-fSap_fvMT9cTHF7_nUvtlXy7JYa3zyjQkV61m2wwkzctWzRgEYcccR2tb3gwkg-cBh4EjRDQGe8k8mDF_ZttASkAQER-gHhFgB60nqUIAgaqNHAIdZcbv9z3OrKkr7ym8ttya822bXW_Wi6Pw3dG7q7fePr-KgPlBqXxA3dr1xSUHvez-RqzJtaeDvOQ_mzsDvVs-SrrsqT60jEGD9J53gyZpl0B6iFyY991xYb9iumFI_BNBqeLxfTT0b97cl3AAAA___e0WLa), with 75 million people born worldwide in 2023, a growth rate of just under 1%, according to the U.S. Census Bureau. The population in the United States grew by 1.7 million, a growth rate of 0.53%, to a total population of 336 million. Analysts say the decade of the 2020s could see the slowest population growth in U.S. history. Census analysts say the U.S. sees a one-person increase in overall population every 24 seconds. The nation is projected to reach [a high of nearly 370 million people](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFutDAQhJ_GdEZe29z5Che_9AulubRRKmTY9eHIYAR7R3j7iNTpRvo0o0_zce_uIeU0P97DRJ5j6cLA6UUdSJDadrZCH4k0mYo8XJUFcOCgGj26ADEAwGAtRuOcGxowN4y9AQcYquS10laBAlDNBVSNSjXaWhcxgrJKC6sIE5e1_ipp5pFiPsqL1nooU5X9yLxswvwTuhW63fe9Hvptpn07udDtGYVun5tcyvLMgVOZJX0vNDCh5CK5LNKYRk4p55P1h5xplweFdZMYDnn6neumjRwewvz_fGst9TeEa7V6XPazuF2uwqrHFFL-FeO_XvoJAAD___d8Z6I) by 2080 and then will start edging downward.
## List: 50 New Year's Resolution Ideas
The new year is here, but it's not too late to make a resolution. [Here is a list](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0DFv8yAQgOFfgzcsjmCHDAzf4i3f2tE6wRGuBRNhYiv_vmrnzu_y6vm4r3fkzNvjPxZyPdYVfeeDVpAgtVnNEFwk0nQZyMFVGQALFobkbgR2DnG2Fsx81RTRWLj5i8bJEng_sNNKGwUKQE0zqDEoNWljbAwRlFFaGEWBe23jZ-WtJ4r5XQ9qo69lyC71_tzF5Z_Qi9DLeZ5j5kgJ_ddY20PoBVtnn2kXevG1lNfGHjvXTehlUnKjU74J2y4b7TW_forkQLhL3IJM9ZToE9NBktAn2ROVMfWSh-bC8-SceZ-vwqhHQc6_T_0voO8AAAD__1aUaKY) of the 50 most popular New Year's resolutions and a few tips on how to make them stick. The usual suspects top the list (_get in shape, eat healthier_ , etc), but some are a bit more unique (_stop holding grudges, become more romantic_ , and _become tidier_). [Read the full list here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0DFv8yAQgOFfgzcsjmCHDAzf4i3f2tE6wRGuBRNhYiv_vmrnzu_y6vm4r3fkzNvjPxZyPdYVfeeDVpAgtVnNEFwk0nQZyMFVGQALFobkbgR2DnG2Fsx81RTRWLj5i8bJEng_sNNKGwUKQE0zqDEoNWljbAwRlFFaGEWBe23jZ-WtJ4r5XQ9qo69lyC71_tzF5Z_Qi9DLeZ5j5kgJ_ddY20PoBVtnn2kXevG1lNfGHjvXTehlUnKjU74J2y4b7TW_forkQLhL3IJM9ZToE9NBktAn2ROVMfWSh-bC8-SceZ-vwqhHQc6_T_0voO8AAAD__1aUaKY).

On this date in 1914, the first scheduled commercial airline flight in the U.S took place, flying travelers 18 miles in a two-seat plane from St. Petersburg to Tampa in 23 minutes. () Have you signed up for The Flyover yet? If not, you can fix that . Today's edition is brought to you by . Editor's note : Today marks The Flyover's first edition of the new year, and it's shorter than normal due to staff spending time with family during the holiday. Tomorrow's edition will be shortened as well, and we'll be back to normal on Wednesday. Enjoy! | U.S. Sinks Three Rebel Boats in Red Sea The U.S. Navy sank three Houthi boats in the Red Sea on Sunday, after the boats attacked a Singapore-flagged container ship owned by Maersk, a Danish shipping company. The action was the for U.S. forces as part of an international effort to keep the shipping lanes open in the region. " We're going to act in self-defense going forward," a U.S. official said. Following the attack, Maersk announced it would pause any shipping in the Red Sea for at least 48 hours to assess the situation. World Population Hits 8 Billion Today The world's population will , with 75 million people born worldwide in 2023, a growth rate of just under 1%, according to the U.S. Census Bureau. The population in the United States grew by 1.7 million, a growth rate of 0.53%, to a total population of 336 million. Analysts say the decade of the 2020s could see the slowest population growth in U.S. history. Census analysts say the U.S. sees a one-person increase in overall population every 24 seconds. The nation is projected to reach by 2080 and then will start edging downward. List: 50 New Year's Resolution Ideas The new year is here, but it's not too late to make a resolution. of the 50 most popular New Year's resolutions and a few tips on how to make them stick. The usual suspects top the list (get in shape, eat healthier , etc), but some are a bit more unique (stop holding grudges, become more romantic , and become tidier). . | | Friend - Happy New Year! Did you make it to midnight last night?

Did you break any resolutions yet? As we step into 2024, my resolution remains steadfast: to tirelessly protect the rights, freedoms, and values of southern Minnesota. I know that in this mission, I can count on your support. With the election year upon us, we're gearing up to spread our message, counter left-wing propaganda in the media, and highlight our conservative leadership for Minnesotans in stark contrast to the failed socialism coming from DC. But, for today, let's take a pause from the political battleground. It's a day for rest, football, and, perhaps, _reluctantly_ putting away a few decorations. I'm genuinely excited about the journey we're embarking on this year, and I hope you share that enthusiasm. Here's to a fantastic start to 2024! Best, Brad Finstad

| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=9d833306eb104b2699b640ca7ac76461&_e=QhkEx4mnKCGaJ0PDP-1HWZNcO3Tgb9FET2ZYnH1sOIQsYlTO55c0H23dQxiGz2a4-HbXYQjHMInPxObUKa3ePNFGTkE3wq2zXzEAD6yTf9asr7SQsOH5kr9iaN4aMOa6bk6dpoXtmzsL-TKys-6z0Ku9YQ1qhGeVn7sj2DvQ1HOkEjk9QuDQ7CYqkFwVIiQrWalCWxYZVhqItg9uh2MarbSItiASZBf5Wkk9I0jrGBv2yEsqjqikFLCNDwwltoKgcQpXMlYQgHRH43S37R0FpmRxWYKu55q0cRlGf-ZHo_K-d1L0TSVmHoQ9_6OBgfTeWen5n-AWCYrvQcRYTbY1fz7dW26SQkN1QI6RwcBd4l0_2Ez_ml1C3sMPZf63nzXxDknB58KwXXiZDy5VVznORfik4h-kjhy-ayIP9OaE14eXEwapoMKE84l9PkmAJQ3_)" which you can now own on DVD.

| [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=9d833306eb104b2699b640ca7ac76461&_e=QhkEx4mnKCGaJ0PDP-1HWZNcO3Tgb9FET2ZYnH1sOIQsYlTO55c0H23dQxiGz2a4-HbXYQjHMInPxObUKa3ePNFGTkE3wq2zXzEAD6yTf9asr7SQsOH5kr9iaN4aMOa6bk6dpoXtmzsL-TKys-6z0Ku9YQ1qhGeVn7sj2DvQ1HOkEjk9QuDQ7CYqkFwVIiQrWalCWxYZVhqItg9uh2MarbSItiASZBf5Wkk9I0jrGBv2yEsqjqikFLCNDwwltoKgcQpXMlYQgHRH43S37R0FpnRqEBlDTQ1gwKHAhT_hFoTNaHDguy-spLaRhLcjNBgSBws6YJybcZQVBA5FeqqMFfE3BRx1pA9L2MUY1cjTnVhK4vVfMATWe6e1f_az_SfasWsYFKXoMIz5XBkwXPRy4eHVa9IeNRYMzlWt2xHIH6dgHGXfUtlNk7hf0fZs3Dad)

| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=9d833306eb104b2699b640ca7ac76461&_e=QhkEx4mnKCGaJ0PDP-1HWZNcO3Tgb9FET2ZYnH1sOIQsYlTO55c0H23dQxiGz2a4-HbXYQjHMInPxObUKa3ePNFGTkE3wq2zXzEAD6yTf9asr7SQsOH5kr9iaN4aMOa6bk6dpoXtmzsL-TKys-6z0Ku9YQ1qhGeVn7sj2DvQ1HOkEjk9QuDQ7CYqkFwVIiQrWalCWxYZVhqItg9uh2MarbSItiASZBf5Wkk9I0jrGBv2yEsqjqikFLCNDwwltoKgcQpXMlYQgHRH43S37R0FpjLfJhuOvT7eBvyHOTf52BA0u6k3BRQ9CByOJOCZHEADq2Wvy6ou9H6tzPfvMtYSzKaWs_85tl3ei7gso9i1fwNVkwVJom4Z2SlSq9fyTwWFBG6MLCTXlXQy_8aRal8n8PpHZWQHGRbZYZmSwp-5yuv08TzH8xkenr9grC-vCCpl).

name: Full Mag News
subject: Big Pharma and the federal government
body:
In America, various industries have close ties to government regulators.

This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c1c67ca672024b42ba232112dbc88223&_e=kWeawBisxI2AjgqZbKr-vYs5HUSYbLRh9G7ItMlxTDQqiZyYVEgdQJ6jlJHQcZic9vCB00yBri2FNSOehC_NN32I0nyLMNdNtYNxFl95r6JWqfZnOTSR-wuq_Wa-5YyH7akQsqNWYioSibrzPklSpkARovaFpf5BYxvgeow1eQ_gIkC69oP2-UoyXtuAMVlIfHeKiTCT1GItLDkTEJhHV3aUmC2o8LwPueCEAHSF2y4jueFjQEesUvC0kwKac36lhMMDDc7DzL7T3FIq3fp_m0S-c-R02mbg0MR1S3_rioeRqlbhRcp6SKeFyvckaCaXvCbf2akf9iw1QR0F_9J0BEZERsolkEJ6C2d_EPzE1yvChRYBLtS-evi2JDhCvRn5)
---
| | Dear Friend,

In America, various industries have close ties to government regulators.

The pharmaceutical industry is one of the most notable and most troubling.

Last year alone, "Big Pharma" spent over $373 million on lobbying--much more than any other industry.

While the Constitution certainly protects the rights to free speech and to petition the government, it was never intended to grant the special privileges that are characteristic of today's bureaucratic, administrative state.

In addition, Big Pharma's reputation has come under attack in the wake of America's opioid epidemic--since 1999, more than 600,000 people have died from opioid overdoses in the U.S. and Canada alone--and the COVID pandemic.

Given these current controversies, we decided to host a conference to consider the rise of Big Pharma, its role in the declining state of American health, and ideas for reform.

**The result is a free online video series that reveals the truth about Big Pharma.**

When you watch this free video series, you'll learn about the collaboration between the federal government and pharmaceutical companies, the content of the "Pfizer documents," and the origins of Big Pharma and the opioid epidemic.

You'll also gain valuable insights into Anthony Fauci and the public health establishment from Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.

**You can receive instant access to this free video series right now using this secure link:**

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/big-pharma-cca/](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c1c67ca672024b42ba232112dbc88223&_e=kWeawBisxI2AjgqZbKr-vYs5HUSYbLRh9G7ItMlxTDQqiZyYVEgdQJ6jlJHQcZic9vCB00yBri2FNSOehC_NN32I0nyLMNdNtYNxFl95r6JWqfZnOTSR-wuq_Wa-5YyH7akQsqNWYioSibrzPklSpkARovaFpf5BYxvgeow1eQ_gIkC69oP2-UoyXtuAMVlIfHeKiTCT1GItLDkTEJhHV3aUmC2o8LwPueCEAHSF2y46YE1I0zm01cXKTzzGsVkLWURlLFQo43D4h9XZEYSvjcdON4_JfkQ7NRD5mfkpPe2plqBku_ezycRxm7WPLBrR5nGaoD_HEbShKAA63SJ4c_f7WuCKMlLo0ZYn6NAeGG_C6UDF8ku68ojbcnxTAohL)**

We filmed the series at a recent Center for Constructive Alternatives conference on the Hillsdale campus. You will not have to watch for long to discover why it was one of our most popular and well-attended events.

**Please use the secure link above to receive your Big Pharma video series. When you complete the form, we will email you the series so you can watch it immediately.**

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844**

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: Survey on the Department of Justice
body:
The survey will only take a few moments of your time

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d4f4288335f34a04883df02f6d8d82a5&_e=zMFjtXTngi39uh5CBvQqKSeHop_b6njRCZZcww9EFCU2O-rRdmI-0wKtoYX3axhppQ01xmmorki-zIfcp64vSf3IpoynmCkHKxQSCulCDsFANoVYyzyi5g-rI48ya071pQ5v_Ai8uS733NrFn7FOU5uI1w9X0_5WK0GhpMBsuBndEsdrJVAglaCV87LMG7OKDei8qJXzF4AUXAYCo3aq6CCEnJOIi-HYlo25cqsBKXpAGD3_BxsJz3nmC7ozyF-xnfOzCt3JlJCU0oYQRdy8mnVpY2mjKGx9HkIa7TSW8QPFYglpchvEcyKEZxrrrFtKbWbOWVrCiQMdAxoAs1Sk3MKVgAWhEjBQzQjFQKy04Prklkkio_vGs8mX3WnENWKR1sMJ24MfgIkdiRKgBrx-hQ%3D%3D) Dear Friend, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration 's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it... Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights
Hides the corruption of the ruling class
Attacks those with traditional viewpoints **That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d4f4288335f34a04883df02f6d8d82a5&_e=zMFjtXTngi39uh5CBvQqKSeHop_b6njRCZZcww9EFCU2O-rRdmI-0wKtoYX3axhppQ01xmmorki-zIfcp64vSf3IpoynmCkHKxQSCulCDsFANoVYyzyi5g-rI48ya071pQ5v_Ai8uS733NrFn7FOU5uI1w9X0_5WK0GhpMBsuBndEsdrJVAglaCV87LMG7OKDei8qJXzF4AUXAYCo3aq6CCEnJOIi-HYlo25cqsBKXpA5NYvjIsCAzkIvnYQSmbyzAYfGH9yCnoEUesOWDT74iIy58-rrjNKKenomF21Hb-vdE83B1m8e1JGUDtxSq8vTFywR4ezoWXDMeobEimiD1bpZYpDM0ZrXENgs6uFSEhvGiKsKFw-vxCHJ2hhSEV0tQ34yTktJmsCXajnEs0qzA%3D%3D)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include: **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution
**Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon
**Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics
**Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d4f4288335f34a04883df02f6d8d82a5&_e=zMFjtXTngi39uh5CBvQqKSeHop_b6njRCZZcww9EFCU2O-rRdmI-0wKtoYX3axhppQ01xmmorki-zIfcp64vSf3IpoynmCkHKxQSCulCDsFANoVYyzyi5g-rI48ya071pQ5v_Ai8uS733NrFn7FOU5uI1w9X0_5WK0GhpMBsuBndEsdrJVAglaCV87LMG7OKDei8qJXzF4AUXAYCo3aq6CCEnJOIi-HYlo25cqsBKXrqvC67cEcNLL4n5PmayM7uBdhaBDFrWfmvpJisgL1hehz65_6UCz3TBr4OafLqKEef47SPJmd07ADXWdxptvl6lVAqky9yhJY8qRbH2rbASRv8PMG2J0xRQROe0O-Vm2YQ5945SHQy8BnEPR1FnQGyuhBlh6mwwBobfd9w_Mqtgg%3D%3D)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

name: Kevin D. Roberts
subject: How you can defeat radical leftism
body:
Unfortunately, a conservative victory in the next election is not enough to save our country.

| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=016632e047734197b0e26fc1982faf71&_e=zYPZjHfgzi0W-TeNcQp7X8HCP4Kc8uXJkQ3jtTqhLcaBsbF_G64EL6giLFfCcNQEISDKaYsePymjl_dyV1FIU84_QF1BWXXnso1ZnVXN12Ri9Fmp_pd_ANW0OrTbJuCCUrQD5Pe-K4L3pqJHn8fD4dxekdEGp_pA2kME0BwQps7fw4mZUNzxgM5F4hANJGlsZ0M_q27Qn-ZybFauoAVTtqZs_bBavLx-EKpeC58uQlZG2N7f7blvPFw_WZjn2ifFG4hcGgcFu6xnTAYFEwKfxVGQhQVbfINCLTInrb4HPyplkYhU_LxJytJbfkyTHXoGv4go8g4OcHQvglnAInYwmq9v2yHaX2wEVvCNvf78KZ0%3D)
---
Dear Fellow Patriot,

The next presidential administration could be a turning point for our country.

After years of inflation, open borders, reckless spending, and rampant crime, America desperately needs effective governance grounded in our founding principles.

Unfortunately, a conservative victory in the next election is not enough to save our country.

That's because today, the deep state controls D.C.

**Regardless of who is in office, career bureaucrats in our federal agencies like the Justice Department, Environmental Protection Agency, and the State Department independently push their own leftist agendas.

** In order to implement common-sense, conservative policies, we must have a plan to rein in these agencies and replace these leftist bureaucrats with principled conservatives.

The Heritage Foundation has that plan--called Project 2025.

**Through Project 2025, The Heritage Foundation has united 80 conservative organizations and is leading the charge for the next presidential transition plan.**

Heritage's policy scholars created a comprehensive policy book and a plan to implement it starting day one of the next administration.

These policies include securing our borders, ensuring election integrity, and reversing the growth of regulations, spending, and inflation.

Additionally, we're identifying and training qualified patriots to staff the next administration and replace the leftist bureaucrats - ending their control of the deep state.

**The radical leftist mainstream media has published several panicked articles attacking Heritage and Project 2025.**

But as we like to say, if the leftist media is angry at you, you're over the target.

As 2024 rapidly approaches, we're kicking Project 2025 into high gear.

Will you help us make this much needed program a massive success? Will you support Project 2025 with a special gift today?
**
****If you 're ready to ensure the next presidential administration can enact conservative policies you and I believe in, please make a tax-deductible year-end gift to The Heritage Foundation using the secure link below.

[https://secured.heritage.org/eoy-campaign/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=016632e047734197b0e26fc1982faf71&_e=zYPZjHfgzi0W-TeNcQp7X8HCP4Kc8uXJkQ3jtTqhLcaBsbF_G64EL6giLFfCcNQEISDKaYsePymjl_dyV1FIU84_QF1BWXXnso1ZnVXN12Ri9Fmp_pd_ANW0OrTbJuCCUrQD5Pe-K4L3pqJHn8fD4dxekdEGp_pA2kME0BwQps7fw4mZUNzxgM5F4hANJGlsZ0M_q27Qn-ZybFauoAVTttG7c4GB9u0gviKKHQPkeKhk69WT_JrwAQ8u4wXBJhPKQyTpI1HTEeHI3hxhvy4vHaNWSxt-nPASlBdel4CnpHfYXw6iCNtjzWva9X4zR23N-VeYyC5d9nC0DnC33KBi03IYxwNJJpSKbFP-w3WAcRg%3D)**

Sincerely,

Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.
President, The Heritage Foundation

**P.S. Next year is a critical year and here at The Heritage Foundation, we 're ramping up our Project 2025 efforts to save America.
