name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Survey on the Department of Justice
body:
The survey will only take a few moments of your time

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=71958158a9034c1bbf0fb2c68ec4b9fc&_e=jX43UDYRNFAcU_HhjEe1nqJE7ujJ5I2WRu_9gOqdEK9q5ZuGr60XBHgWxVxhVOsXffG7lHj8r1RDRPW2sgjzI8lNDAp5m48neVJpEiw_ZgRa2J3aC20X8jA1eO0iTyPOiXNRrJsQHlL8o5Z1Sz2MdgfLkKN9NttfekHBgT-ErL6HugzFLaHl-3opK7WLfC9zoQC0lYDYhz365NdLVee9No-gtuK-XH_xjtefcN_hRnUBFAozOgaV-cG_n9d4aO8CCCbaX9JQP4Lfj8obIPYgjCUEiMp0jl3KUZSGb8UgQc4DLIxj7HDl3L2LsE_OOG-A1pdiN2_JZMpoVJ67gp2DrWRScqJFf2fAyEiR12-dQE0_A8OPKFzW94bG_UA8DWDo4EFYW7arpjAZqJrRSg3hWg%3D%3D) Dear Friend, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration 's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it... Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights
Hides the corruption of the ruling class
Attacks those with traditional viewpoints **That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=71958158a9034c1bbf0fb2c68ec4b9fc&_e=jX43UDYRNFAcU_HhjEe1nqJE7ujJ5I2WRu_9gOqdEK9q5ZuGr60XBHgWxVxhVOsXffG7lHj8r1RDRPW2sgjzI8lNDAp5m48neVJpEiw_ZgRa2J3aC20X8jA1eO0iTyPOiXNRrJsQHlL8o5Z1Sz2MdgfLkKN9NttfekHBgT-ErL6HugzFLaHl-3opK7WLfC9zoQC0lYDYhz365NdLVee9No-gtuK-XH_xjtefcN_hRnXZRTOBHodFTMdsTrnGP0OshLdQTpsRWSuB78GZqbbKckw29Tsnin59m_bsdQXKO_egfLUtn8vpRGktxcbsj1DulV9zLTj0jzIBKBGg0qaoAeWjpoWMdMozP6zFZQ31UqtYPRmIXDCGTAwmMc9GsoQkdXp0P64f2cu8iS2OYl58ZQ%3D%3D)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include: **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution
**Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon
**Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics
**Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=71958158a9034c1bbf0fb2c68ec4b9fc&_e=jX43UDYRNFAcU_HhjEe1nqJE7ujJ5I2WRu_9gOqdEK9q5ZuGr60XBHgWxVxhVOsXffG7lHj8r1RDRPW2sgjzI8lNDAp5m48neVJpEiw_ZgRa2J3aC20X8jA1eO0iTyPOiXNRrJsQHlL8o5Z1Sz2MdgfLkKN9NttfekHBgT-ErL6HugzFLaHl-3opK7WLfC9zoQC0lYDYhz365NdLVee9No-gtuK-XH_xjtefcN_hRnX1G5jCb-5uU2-FdlH8b-FelNMp30FJD-QDzRTVhvOK0oHkO5tA4NP4-Ur57xlR5Ycwun3OAWLU8-XTA3vSotYLBIeJF50Z97aWhk2C5k3T1wpM5HmJ6wdyv76JDcKfjBARA-1PhwS0y1c-xmGRXUgoH8fRn2RjKULFFVjlJ3HD-g%3D%3D)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Are you ready for the end times?
body:
May our study of Revelation prepare, strengthen, and inspire you. Come quickly, Lord Jesus.

| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=59ec3fa1a9ea4761a06a3e2a423f5ed5&_e=z_a13VqR8aZbQlAZmycucZqB4DKEwN8PrB7uuUUbLvbmCuGgioY1AmMG3uRaGbOGGex3_WrKoUuxDE3-g87CWeiH7gfxTg7DavWiVJ4k94QeaQjUo2Egg6GbFg8tLSt5F_9cBSnnqziN6L5THFN33JNo4TlkDXMlZiQG1YF3hiw3tuYHV75dqgJSABoLv-gXL1lgY9WCfQJneyrsoy9d9X-O75W1Xnacl9jsG93tDTlZSTHaqELDdPSbNAWci8zBATfVkUW-1FTf1V9XrBWs6yrj1o-woMTS2kJ3W8OvCUZyaruo-KDMu77eodn3CAa17uVoMsSbeqXTV9a6uNde9tOfrE-qQTkMAu8cS33AyKWk_UOI_mOy74Fp5Osay6lAgx3nTKLbKldd39IuwEdyA1UGtgjPlzH7zxGyDJisl3BZRE97fbWbjF0yPzgdUB7w)
---
Hello Friend,

Take a moment to look around. It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 - trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator.

Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?

I want to remind you, Friend, that this chaotic time is fleeting. The shadows will fade, and a new day will dawn. The King of Kings, our Savior, will return.

That's the heart of Revelation.

Each day on this earth shapes us for what's to come - a grand finale. Amidst today's messiness and uncertainty, remember the promise that our story's end is already secured, regardless of the present turmoil or future darkness.

Revelation intricately unveils where our stories lead.

It's a captivating book filled with symbols, creatures, and events yet to unfold. But remember Revelation 1:3 - there's a blessing for those who read, listen, and follow its words because the time is near.

This isn't just a prophecy; it's a blessing-filled journey.

Revelation isn't just about revealing future events; it's about revealing Jesus Christ.

When Jesus came as a man, His divine brilliance was veiled by humanity. It's like dimming a lamp's light. But when He returns, that veil will lift, and we'll see His true glory. That's Revelation's essence.

As the great reveal approaches, I'm here to guide you and your loved ones through the remarkable events preceding the revelation of our King.

In my brand-new book, _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ , I tackle five common questions about the end times. We'll delve into:

1\. America's Fate: Will America stand for Christ or fall for the Antichrist?
2\. The Day of the Lord: How should we live in anticipation of this apocalyptic event?
3\. The Marriage of the Lamb: What unfolds before and after the rapture?
4\. Gog and Magog: How can we honor God in our lives amid their appearance?
5\. The Tree of Life: What's the significance of this tree in the New Jerusalem?

Understanding these mysteries will anchor you in hope, bolster your trust in God's promises, and equip you to share with the unsure.

In addition to this new book, I would like to share with you "The Major Characters of the End Times," as a token of my gratitude for your support. This full-color, large print booklet introduces key players during the rapture, tribulation, second coming, and final judgment - vital for understanding the grand narrative. [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=59ec3fa1a9ea4761a06a3e2a423f5ed5&_e=z_a13VqR8aZbQlAZmycucZqB4DKEwN8PrB7uuUUbLvbmCuGgioY1AmMG3uRaGbOGGex3_WrKoUuxDE3-g87CWeiH7gfxTg7DavWiVJ4k94QeaQjUo2Egg6GbFg8tLSt5F_9cBSnnqziN6L5THFN33JNo4TlkDXMlZiQG1YF3hiw3tuYHV75dqgJSABoLv-gXL1lgY9WCfQJneyrsoy9d9X-O75W1Xnacl9jsG93tDTlZSTHaqELDdPSbNAWci8zBATfVkUW-1FTf1V9XrBWs69MoRDi-wo2-ADTGMdbpvwvS0zqpe1y2zPoo5620X8ms6H7u_oEPtQSVp95_sY9AxJdv9myJI5xqnXYyD3Czh5emGzTAfdMuJTCkqbonm6-BIPlmOiWiLiFFLBCSWiD5YfhKaaZsYXSYaIv2CGPCtfGzEfwy_n67lHuLx2BOWftU) I would like to send you my brand-new book _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ and my brand-new resource "The Major Characters of the End Times" as a thank you for your generous support of $10 or more to the ministry of _Pathway to Victory_.
Make your generous gift here: [https://secure.ptv.org/mysteries-of-the-end-times-generous-gift-1-dr-robert-jeffress](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=59ec3fa1a9ea4761a06a3e2a423f5ed5&_e=z_a13VqR8aZbQlAZmycucZqB4DKEwN8PrB7uuUUbLvbmCuGgioY1AmMG3uRaGbOGGex3_WrKoUuxDE3-g87CWeiH7gfxTg7DavWiVJ4k94QeaQjUo2Egg6GbFg8tLSt5F_9cBSnnqziN6L5THFN33JNo4TlkDXMlZiQG1YF3hiw3tuYHV75dqgJSABoLv-gXL1lgY9WCfQJneyrsoy9d9X-O75W1Xnacl9jsG93tDTlZSTHaqELDdPSbNAWci8zBATfVkUW-1FTf1V9XrBWs68YYdZbL0j2M44gAqsVi_Gj2l72CQb8XRMkBA4VvsPwtR9nRfMuaQttkObECdFWJzRWfvUMFsPz7zXY1Z3P72e0S_eFVEFSQSgVkjJZuHn9FQFDL51MW_pUwNcjGAz4kFlMNK2aS4Ymr85ebP8S1txTyKETjKDFpzWnSZKvnuORh)

_Pathway to Victory_ is committed to equipping believers with biblical teaching and reaching the unsaved by spreading the Good News of Jesus Christ through the most effective means available: radio, television, digital, and print. Your gifts fuel that important work and enable people worldwide to experience an intimate walk with Christ. Thank you for your faithful support.

May our study of Revelation prepare, strengthen, and inspire you. Come quickly, Lord Jesus.

Sharing the Truth of God's Word, ____
---
| | Dr. Robert Jeffress Senior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas
---

Defend the Constitution
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=59ec3fa1a9ea4761a06a3e2a423f5ed5&_t=ChrevIKz52CR2lYxQNt9NxIBZRO19g5JjJmug0S1BEmjV5Zi5GgBbKhDMsFQqrVRF76Qc2O25BDlr_IGyYgX-McvZFHwGZgiMcPn5YcIbFsXsV6O3IEkP4dMM-c6cPp6_yRujja_4a5GqMB29q9acPQwl0ZzqA1xbtLTlQMb-qg%3D)

name: Hillsdale College via Conservatives Give
subject: Survey on the Department of Justice
body:
The survey will only take a few moments of your time

This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7f7cfebc626142eba1f0f72c6c355b2b&_e=M-iVXvlHn8HQRXP1yJh8td6zlsQR9zkare0t_RTLEajB2gA_uy1VLhud3OXIz1i37rFzkiCGRCIPOjPHaCLTc2vS6BZApUuPONWZWsi1aSYdN9eH6P6MjNnppNAXENeSyCOk9tWAgBib9LN3LQpGSHiIEqJKMe1jqFgTwoPaLJk-wYsAMqXfvxz8EUtqIf2P6DjPSbY291Pv0gMpETPVtM40HUsMCkj7CzWS-LVFkqYdV-MorrkIIrJmbiFHJG3CUeNM9g43JRn6tz8ifcbleMFPghC7nYguNuTB-ojbm9GAOplnEb4-WrBY1T0i8_52gvJQ5TjdWFYL6aAFSi-p2oVmkUCrqqRmwtoF3wGhhU1IBz7giAC9y6WlOXryL5YPl4M6DaMUub4u8owqDEaSeQ%3D%3D) Dear Friend, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration 's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it... Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights
Hides the corruption of the ruling class
Attacks those with traditional viewpoints **That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7f7cfebc626142eba1f0f72c6c355b2b&_e=M-iVXvlHn8HQRXP1yJh8td6zlsQR9zkare0t_RTLEajB2gA_uy1VLhud3OXIz1i37rFzkiCGRCIPOjPHaCLTc2vS6BZApUuPONWZWsi1aSYdN9eH6P6MjNnppNAXENeSyCOk9tWAgBib9LN3LQpGSHiIEqJKMe1jqFgTwoPaLJk-wYsAMqXfvxz8EUtqIf2P6DjPSbY291Pv0gMpETPVtM40HUsMCkj7CzWS-LVFkqZmPdQk9kFdXZSgxGRlg6l16jfNlxU8r6WDXEyDHJnljz7xuCLGgF6QF-RzAwH8x0zRWtrH3ZGG7mdhZabw-jGhbLQrCUXvuuKTlKBHG8Js6_ArXkQK7fkJHRmemGeJcW_MKvFRFKR4naH8LjI2cAZTnJf_2T2YwwqTTQRP9u-dKQ%3D%3D)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include: **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution
**Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon
**Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics
**Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7f7cfebc626142eba1f0f72c6c355b2b&_e=M-iVXvlHn8HQRXP1yJh8td6zlsQR9zkare0t_RTLEajB2gA_uy1VLhud3OXIz1i37rFzkiCGRCIPOjPHaCLTc2vS6BZApUuPONWZWsi1aSYdN9eH6P6MjNnppNAXENeSyCOk9tWAgBib9LN3LQpGSHiIEqJKMe1jqFgTwoPaLJk-wYsAMqXfvxz8EUtqIf2P6DjPSbY291Pv0gMpETPVtM40HUsMCkj7CzWS-LVFkqYo26s9kcivqzfUvmwaoGJYFfauWWmvCvwai7TCrk4Bxg6K9_hYLdDCMxA_HGyqzt5WVDewyFADW5DgVB5jT0ZrFnV5rrkDu9BYRd_9HleBlBZIFvpq_uGCzv6RhQxv0_m7YQiVQm2WdVCH93eawEvCvqMcReiJR55pcB18Bc0Pzg%3D%3D)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| Conservatives Give

name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: 2024 - what should Mississippi conservatives aim for this year?
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/successsequence-11571531?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| Dear Friend,

Happy New Year!

**Last year, Mississippi Republicans won an overwhelming majority. 2024 could be the year when they use that majority to deliver the kind of big, strategic change our state needs.**

Here are half a dozen things that Mississippi conservatives could actually make happen:

**1\. Education Freedom:** 2024 could be the year that we give every family in the state control over their child’s share of education tax dollars, through an Education Freedom Account. Arkansas passed legislation to do precisely that last year. Tennessee and Louisiana are poised to do something similar. **Rather than trailing behind, Mississippi lawmakers should take the lead, delivering big, strategic change to improve education in this state, too. **

**MCPP recently held a public rally for education freedom, with Corey DeAngelis and local educators, helping mainstream the idea. Recent polls now show overwhelming public support. **
---
|
---
_Education freedom is for everybody._
| **2\. Affordable healthcare:** Too many families in Mississippi cannot get health coverage. Rather than hosing federal dollars at the problem, we need to look at what states like Florida are doing to innovate, with alternatives to insurance-based healthcare. This means ending the restrictive Certificate of Need laws that prevent new low cost health care providers from operating. It also means allowing nurse practitioners more autonomy. **MCPP will soon publish a roadmap on how to go about removing CON laws. **

**3\. Abolish DEI (Diversity, Equity & Inclusion):** In recent months we have seem appalling behaviour by ‘woke’ academics at several leading universities. It is now clear that DEI is destroying American academia. So why are public universities in Mississippi still running DEI programs? The Governor of Oklahoma recently issued an order terminating funding for DEI programs in public universities in that state. **Mississippi needs to stop the rot in public universities and end DEI programs in 2024.**
---
|
---
_Reagan would not have tolerated DEI dividing America. Mississippi conservatives should not either._
| **4\. Tax cuts:** In 2023 Mississippi had a large state budget surplus. Rather than wait for politicians to think up new ways to spend that surplus, we need to see tax cuts in 2024. One option would be a further reduction in the state income tax. **MCPP will be advocating for a sensible budget that does not increase spending irresponsibly.**

While those are our top four priorities for 2024, here are some other things we would like to see our law makers deliver:

* **Women’s Bill of Rights / Parents Bill of Rights:** Early last year, we invited Riley Gaines to speak in Jackson as part of our campaign to mainstream the idea of protecting women’s rights. We are thrilled to see so many people come out in support of the idea of building on the safeguards already contained within the Mississippi Fairness Act.

---
|
---
_We brought Riley to Jackson._
|
* **PERS reform:** The laws of math make the current public employee retirement scheme (PERS) unsustainable. Mississippi needs reforms so that young people starting work in the public sector have defined contribution, rather than defined benefit, pensions. Unless we make this change now, our grandchildren will end up with a massive tax bill. **2024 is the year when we need to see sensible changes made to PERS.**

* **Young Enterprise Act:** Mississippi ought to do more to encourage young people to become entrepreneurs. One way to do this could be to exempt minors from having to obtain costly permits and licenses, or collect and remit sales taxes, when they want to run a small business. A few years ago, such a proposal was considered in the state legislature. We would love to see it revived.

* **Ballot initiative:** Citizens in our state used to have a right of ballot initiative. Over a thirty year period, almost 70 initiative attempts to change the state constitution were made, with only three being successful. A failure to update the rules for triggering such initiatives means that we no longer have this right in practice. **MCPP would like to see the right of ballot initiative restored, allowing citizens to change state law. **

**If Mississippi conservatives passed these eight or so laws, they would transform our state for the better. No longer would we be considered a laggard by some, but as a leader. **

Let’s make it happen!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=5c70b3fe21&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO

|

Tax cuts: In 2023 Mississippi had a large state budget surplus. Rather than wait for politicians to think up new ways to spend that surplus, we need to see tax cuts in 2024. One option would be a further reduction in the state income tax. MCPP will be advocating for a sensible budget that does not increase spending irresponsibly. While those are our top four priorities for 2024, here are some other things we would like to see our law makers deliver: Women’s Bill of Rights / Parents Bill of Rights: Early last year, we invited Riley Gaines to speak in Jackson as part of our campaign to mainstream the idea of protecting women’s rights. We are thrilled to see so many people come out in support of the idea of building on the safeguards already contained within the Mississippi Fairness Act. | We brought Riley to Jackson. | PERS reform: The laws of math make the current public employee retirement scheme (PERS) unsustainable. Mississippi needs reforms so that young people starting work in the public sector have defined contribution, rather than defined benefit, pensions. Unless we make this change now, our grandchildren will end up with a massive tax bill. 2024 is the year when we need to see sensible changes made to PERS. Young Enterprise Act: Mississippi ought to do more to encourage young people to become entrepreneurs. One way to do this could be to exempt minors from having to obtain costly permits and licenses, or collect and remit sales taxes, when they want to run a small business. A few years ago, such a proposal was considered in the state legislature. We would love to see it revived. Ballot initiative: Citizens in our state used to have a right of ballot initiative. Over a thirty year period, almost 70 initiative attempts to change the state constitution were made, with only three being successful. A failure to update the rules for triggering such initiatives means that we no longer have this right in practice. MCPP would like to see the right of ballot initiative restored, allowing citizens to change state law. If Mississippi conservatives passed these eight or so laws, they would transform our state for the better. No longer would we be considered a laggard by some, but as a leader. Let’s make it happen! | "Forward this email to a friend!" | | Warm regards, Douglas Carswell President & CEO | | |

name: Robertson For Congress
subject: A New Year Message of Hope
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robertson for Congress](https://r20
body:
Together we can take back our country
| | | |
---
# Finding Hope in Troubled Times
---
We live in troubled times. It is easy to get depressed, discouraged, and downhearted. However, there are many reasons to have hope; hope that leads to "confidence, optimism, enthusiasm and patient perseverance" (Dieter F. Uchtdorf, November 2008).
Just look at what has happened in the United States and worldwide in just the past three years:
* A humiliating retreat in Afghanistan with billions of dollars of military equipment left to the Taliban. * Attacks on Ukraine and Israel, requiring them to defend their country's citizenry and sovereignty with our help. * China ratcheting up its threats to Taiwan and other Asian neighbors. * Iran, a sworn enemy, given billions by the Biden State Dept., which only helped encourage and finance Middle East violence. * American foreign policy is in shambles. Our enemies no longer fear us or our reaction to provocations. * A new axis of evil forming with Russia, China, North Korea, and Iran * The cost of groceries up by more than 25% * Near depletion of our strategic petroleum reserves * Partial shutdown of domestic oil and gas industries * Approaching 10,000,000 illegal border crossings costing hundreds of billions of dollars * Hundreds of thousands of Fentanyl deaths * An increase of $4,000,000,000,0000 (trillion) in the Federal debt * The spread of racism cloaked as "Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion" * A further decline of religion in the lives of Americans
That is a depressing list. It is easy to see why most Americans feel our Country is on the wrong track. I agree. However, there are still many reasons to have hope.
As we begin this new year, we should take stock of all we have to be grateful for. We still live in the greatest country in the history of the world. We have more freedoms and opportunities than most humans who have ever inhabited this planet. As Ronald Reagan said, "I've always thought New Year's Day was an especially American tradition, full of the optimism and hope we're famous for in our daily lives - an energy and confidence we call the American spirit. Perhaps because we know we control our own destiny, we believe deep down inside that working together we can make each new year better than the old." I agree!
Working together, we CAN take back our country. We can reverse course and return to freedom, family, faith, and prosperity. 2024 can be a pivotal year when we reignite the "American Spirit" and are once again filled with confidence, optimism, and enthusiasm!
Please join me as we take back our slice of America (Nevada's First Congressional District). Respond to this email if you can volunteer to support our campaign by sharing your time, talents, or money.
---

********

Please share this message with friends and neighbors. Have questions for me? Simply reply to this email to ask me a question.

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Are you ready for the end times?
body:
May our study of Revelation prepare, strengthen, and inspire you. Come quickly, Lord Jesus.

| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=cc544b89569d48fa8bd011a53d2872ab&_e=r19Xem75b6886J9hJvMxmdmyhrpEE6zEDxwo1DfjHr66xz-HIyQ3GRH-4esJYclRV4EnBREiZ_A4zHFu9HotGc1zDE1xOfkq_Vmebx94E6qDFPp3pqS6sxjkCTHPGSShwy0EnfGyoq9dXaBApprYQcVpeP0JE9-Is7EoQZldki-wrQrBfFpXqOgkpJHsLdMoUxxdcBEmfb_zHKfPHE0Jzoy5Uzze84mgtbN0RzyaE3BRbFymUqCLhJwwyHMYpDzKWWQXtmfQ-rfjMH8h52F9yM3biJ2DjQ0kmpHvzLeRE1r0nEGuFJO0RbQetWNsMH3kfQS1mOXd2-7PyMu_5dLGm-Ha0en_PG64rUBLt8M3CciBkh8gcBZI3JbUnblDQsyg-AmDmJHGUY8d_mPOTngX_jojgRUzgeKk0prs7gcoH77f_BjNk6SA2Sot48FwadGH)
---
Hello Friend,

Take a moment to look around. It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 - trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator.

Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?

I want to remind you, Friend, that this chaotic time is fleeting. The shadows will fade, and a new day will dawn. The King of Kings, our Savior, will return.

That's the heart of Revelation.

Each day on this earth shapes us for what's to come - a grand finale. Amidst today's messiness and uncertainty, remember the promise that our story's end is already secured, regardless of the present turmoil or future darkness.

Revelation intricately unveils where our stories lead.

It's a captivating book filled with symbols, creatures, and events yet to unfold. But remember Revelation 1:3 - there's a blessing for those who read, listen, and follow its words because the time is near.

This isn't just a prophecy; it's a blessing-filled journey.

Revelation isn't just about revealing future events; it's about revealing Jesus Christ.

When Jesus came as a man, His divine brilliance was veiled by humanity. It's like dimming a lamp's light. But when He returns, that veil will lift, and we'll see His true glory. That's Revelation's essence.

As the great reveal approaches, I'm here to guide you and your loved ones through the remarkable events preceding the revelation of our King.

In my brand-new book, _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ , I tackle five common questions about the end times. We'll delve into:

1\. America's Fate: Will America stand for Christ or fall for the Antichrist?
2\. The Day of the Lord: How should we live in anticipation of this apocalyptic event?
3\. The Marriage of the Lamb: What unfolds before and after the rapture?
4\. Gog and Magog: How can we honor God in our lives amid their appearance?
5\. The Tree of Life: What's the significance of this tree in the New Jerusalem?

Understanding these mysteries will anchor you in hope, bolster your trust in God's promises, and equip you to share with the unsure.

In addition to this new book, I would like to share with you "The Major Characters of the End Times," as a token of my gratitude for your support. This full-color, large print booklet introduces key players during the rapture, tribulation, second coming, and final judgment - vital for understanding the grand narrative. [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=cc544b89569d48fa8bd011a53d2872ab&_e=r19Xem75b6886J9hJvMxmdmyhrpEE6zEDxwo1DfjHr66xz-HIyQ3GRH-4esJYclRV4EnBREiZ_A4zHFu9HotGc1zDE1xOfkq_Vmebx94E6qDFPp3pqS6sxjkCTHPGSShwy0EnfGyoq9dXaBApprYQcVpeP0JE9-Is7EoQZldki-wrQrBfFpXqOgkpJHsLdMoUxxdcBEmfb_zHKfPHE0Jzoy5Uzze84mgtbN0RzyaE3BRbFymUqCLhJwwyHMYpDzKWWQXtmfQ-rfjMH8h52F9yM3biJ2DjQ0kmpHvzLeRE1oKfc8VCy0l6pob2q9UcoIZBw-Dip2WaJv6mAdO2IsJjc1ufABmXGMw_C_fMLqPS-odAbdopFda9o1ORtdoUThgb-4DnjUKSbr9oMNEM8JcBuW4TMmhpwOyQ9Pn_oxjXBZL35OHBBQAPZ_747gPYEqD) I would like to send you my brand-new book _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ and my brand-new resource "The Major Characters of the End Times" as a thank you for your generous support of $10 or more to the ministry of _Pathway to Victory_.

Dianne Feinstein’s return

| | Peter, Happy New Year!

I cannot express enough how grateful I am for all of your support.

Thanks to you, we were able to create an incredible movement in 2023.

Now in 2024, we’re looking ahead to victory, and I’m so excited to have you by my side during this journey.

We CAN take back the U.S. Senate, and I’ll fight until the very last vote is counted on Election Day.

This is going to be the best year yet, and it’s all thanks to our grassroots team. In Liberty,

name: Hillsdale College via Freedom Nation Today
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

| | | This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=900621935754445eaf9e232912ee6307&_e=K6E-Ld8j6hAWInaUGbgg2a0BpPZsM9Hzz56jtnPGeKs7ZqMWudxTYTNAD7lpB5HLSBAQUl2awZZjEzRH43omK93oF-n5CRrKPgKK-sKnLle7585Y8USvMX3c9B1hp9sV6uyUdLM6PrsTn2Boeoz0c2ETNWe6q5cvADBXM3wZJY3ezW0ffoLnenIs8_kCAXJ_bAMb3AFbB_0xA-qMM9q1MLMbLIujpzMQedP4sPaboEcjBjkHQ5Rfk4O6ZbD8kgQ9qiNfjuxcMxRfSlOqc3Z-Kogk-Xvu7BCK4pU7WFuWMCVZmfdBrPFaHF7WvVNXp3z7BZOtbdGVKbOwgzP2rYsQNPqB8m4bgFz_vgNiF3JedrJCrfCnECJiL0nlqXyQyPHx9QXWqhPlFnNwHWtCMVmd-R6O8H9v3Iuw29pcAF2S5Skph-Lc1qXZX7jfN4BtWuID)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=900621935754445eaf9e232912ee6307&_e=K6E-Ld8j6hAWInaUGbgg2a0BpPZsM9Hzz56jtnPGeKs7ZqMWudxTYTNAD7lpB5HLSBAQUl2awZZjEzRH43omK93oF-n5CRrKPgKK-sKnLle7585Y8USvMX3c9B1hp9sV6uyUdLM6PrsTn2Boeoz0c2ETNWe6q5cvADBXM3wZJY3ezW0ffoLnenIs8_kCAXJ_bAMb3AFbB_0xA-qMM9q1MLMbLIujpzMQedP4sPaboEcjBjkHQ5Rfk4O6ZbD8kgQ9qiNfjuxcMxRfSlOqc3Z-KrBmCyxCgLygiC1SwcrJ6RvzZT6wWsnIEzUjajN35LfyL0Y-blY4aVRGyiRtBAAce2TIOLBTbBMR1UR2fPAmtviddRUV8-CySe2kBjk9YXiFRgNBgXt1nbxm7OHM_KrqtPsAIhG8ve4Czbwq4_VYlNtFJLV3_PLpTudcWOv5GzfC)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=900621935754445eaf9e232912ee6307&_e=K6E-Ld8j6hAWInaUGbgg2a0BpPZsM9Hzz56jtnPGeKs7ZqMWudxTYTNAD7lpB5HLSBAQUl2awZZjEzRH43omK93oF-n5CRrKPgKK-sKnLle7585Y8USvMX3c9B1hp9sV6uyUdLM6PrsTn2Boeoz0c2ETNWe6q5cvADBXM3wZJY3ezW0ffoLnenIs8_kCAXJ_bAMb3AFbB_0xA-qMM9q1MLMbLIujpzMQedP4sPaboEcjBjkHQ5Rfk4O6ZbD8kgQ9qiNfjuxcMxRfSlOqc3Z-KsVnValTPGlfq3HP7zwuwsWEFl2EqQOVcqYtm4iLKvNOMOiHmBmnBdwuLinGo0aaXzP7QoyiCCClhdCNx1Qy1Y_xYK_xBr2VTIILtE6QTgGOeQElM4Cc8NRUCpSlzsw2GI2VAYmAHeODAIC4A2cPUUA3u_CKKq8Z7zyDTdUm66Lg)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=900621935754445eaf9e232912ee6307&_e=K6E-Ld8j6hAWInaUGbgg2a0BpPZsM9Hzz56jtnPGeKs7ZqMWudxTYTNAD7lpB5HLSBAQUl2awZZjEzRH43omK93oF-n5CRrKPgKK-sKnLle7585Y8USvMX3c9B1hp9sV6uyUdLM6PrsTn2Boeoz0c2ETNWe6q5cvADBXM3wZJY3ezW0ffoLnenIs8_kCAXJ_bAMb3AFbB_0xA-qMM9q1MLMbLIujpzMQedP4sPaboEcjBjkHQ5Rfk4O6ZbD8kgQ9qiNfjuxcMxRfSlOqc3Z-KnGC5ff2tyK8Qyx6npWuawTlNn8gkIpYy3dtIHNcnYSiR0J5nsnHzx6Rcd-bBdozV1CX_8xcbk0q_Zp17_OWvQHf8NktVWCtZ3Mo4aiJgqylCgLfDkzwQd-d_7g0IxvDRVzKytoK6ECCkPOGLVrUr-L2ULWVhz2GFP27g6eSAhxi).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

clean_body: C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read. | | | This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read. His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century. That's why we produced "" which you can now own on DVD. | | | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including: good and evil, conversion and faith, prayer and the Bible, suffering and death, * heaven and hell, and much more. Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis and After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man, and the co-editor of The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns! This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity. That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with . Best regards, Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College Freedom Nation Today 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

name: Conservatives Give
subject: The key to Lincoln’s rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills

| This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5af422fb2141484a8a4e9eb885d1afff&_e=YbZPZv9Kw5Ay5Q9i4U8hUmdlJ61cYkra-DqQgX04VvY8wVJTCMNk7ldp7VLNNpPj3bQGF9Qw9J46cg9o9_kb8ZpBJ0AtTXVc8ar9-Hyv7zC_jBemcLBtrq1UF9PPzY-eRtKJizhqI1SCo5WCOZWbTptst2Pjv4wVSPlu8_glhl7_mA4AYaYiv48tZanBJGAPMBonnxviYYbMVOtflz0ctFMvxA6zMZguVOdXgMBObOOmizCLs4uUgH672fsRAQwOON7hCEI8Z_p8D7tQac2NJEzfIYIWVksdnDF-rirGErUjfYo0jV7UOkCRGH-FdXMg8h4jLo_pC8VAk_nob2xevjbwPrHnXMmTu4JYk7jyp3C8bxmm1FYCnzfhPtQtDhiwHrlNDcBosgikqQgT8tz8MvZfQJ_hWGvKYi4u5BmXlqE%3D)
---
| | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father's cabin, and did not return until he could "give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight." By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That's why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **" Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry." ** Through** "Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,"** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.** Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5af422fb2141484a8a4e9eb885d1afff&_e=YbZPZv9Kw5Ay5Q9i4U8hUmdlJ61cYkra-DqQgX04VvY8wVJTCMNk7ldp7VLNNpPj3bQGF9Qw9J46cg9o9_kb8ZpBJ0AtTXVc8ar9-Hyv7zC_jBemcLBtrq1UF9PPzY-eRtKJizhqI1SCo5WCOZWbTptst2Pjv4wVSPlu8_glhl7_mA4AYaYiv48tZanBJGAPMBonnxviYYbMVOtflz0ctFMvxA6zMZguVOdXgMBObOOmizCLs4uUgH672fsRAQwOON7hCEI8Z_p8D7tQac2NJBGt8NZBqiZ3hlze1iAsCKwU74cKQGQ47qwVkWBnN8aFFARCLFY01RriPHS013OIHTQexaS3ZZ7J0lGIjR94y2fKjOa__7S0KQ8IB-v6bqxHA_dpUmrqCPYCrUFr4qbxo2ltHI6N5c1UhQtazFmq_hg%3D)
---

I've included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below: [_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5af422fb2141484a8a4e9eb885d1afff&_e=YbZPZv9Kw5Ay5Q9i4U8hUmdlJ61cYkra-DqQgX04VvY8wVJTCMNk7ldp7VLNNpPj3bQGF9Qw9J46cg9o9_kb8ZpBJ0AtTXVc8ar9-Hyv7zC_jBemcLBtrq1UF9PPzY-eRtKJizhqI1SCo5WCOZWbTptst2Pjv4wVSPlu8_glhl7_mA4AYaYiv48tZanBJGAPMBonnxviYYbMVOtflz0ctFMvxA6zMZguVOdXgMBObOOmizCLs4uUgH672fsRAQwOON7hCEI8Z_p8D7tQac2NJOhsOwIpA65RgoZwpK7dsGOsNiqr2w75df1etFa_4wiCa202S2_SQ3kH2rBtbA8cyKtBeiLxCzKvO-Qr47OWuSz_HMTrEDfc1ethX_zwszeL7EUaOOWWUo4fdhtd_oBDNycx8eAG_YU0-QCqqzbVlBM%3D) Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty. body:
https://www.dean24.com [https://www.dean24.com]
Hi Friend,
Happy New Year! 🎉 Your support has been the driving force behind our campaign. As we step into 2024, we want to express our gratitude.
This new year brings fresh opportunities for positive change in our country. Together, let's continue facing the challenges ahead with renewed hope and determination.
Our campaign has always been about more than politics — it's about a shared commitment to shaping a brighter future. Your insights matter, so keep them coming.
As the first primary approaches we will continue to engage with as many people as we can, listening to diverse voices and opinions. Together, we can overcome obstacles and build a future that reflects our shared values.
Wishing you and your loved ones a joyous New Year filled with growth, understanding, and progress.
Sincerely,
Dean Team

name: Russell Prescott
subject: Happy New Year
body:
Wishing you and your family a happy 2024
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015juT7i7o7QKnc5R5sm_SsXWX_QRzDFPKX0ABl9JXN62BNYdKLELUYF1-rEfFGtoi18A0W2EeA1WjvT_DYEFfoDMrnqBzz8EGelCkgQMMB3j3AZ56iynJFCSSUU_FRuF5O85cCrmTsDFC9CM8TZVildQLTWnTsJcJ&c=PyA84bT461gn0ZRzZATI6wBAC3Xo3kk6rbbq1Sed8ntzKnirke31VA==&ch=cFTlvrglPETTgmt05pWGnWPYIRN89x0KE1ILVC92vItHgcsGB4OYkw==)
---
| Peter,
As we bid farewell to 2023 and embrace 2024, I wanted to take a moment to extend my heartfelt wishes to you and your family for a Happy New Year.
The challenges of the past year have only strengthened our resolve, demonstrating that when we stand united, we can overcome any obstacle. As we turn the page on 2023, I am filled with optimism for what lies ahead.
In the spirit of the new year, let us recommit ourselves to the principles that bind us: empathy, cooperation, and a shared vision for a brighter tomorrow.
May 2024 be a year of growth, prosperity, and unity for us all. I want to wish you and your family a Happy New Year filled with joy, good health, and success. Together, let's make 2024 a year of hope, progress, and positive change.
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015juT7i7o7QKnc5R5sm_SsXWX_QRzDFPKX0ABl9JXN62BNYdKLELUYF1-rEfFGtoi18A0W2EeA1WjvT_DYEFfoDMrnqBzz8EGelCkgQMMB3j3AZ56iynJFCSSUU_FRuF5O85cCrmTsDFC9CM8TZVildQLTWnTsJcJ&c=PyA84bT461gn0ZRzZATI6wBAC3Xo3kk6rbbq1Sed8ntzKnirke31VA==&ch=cFTlvrglPETTgmt05pWGnWPYIRN89x0KE1ILVC92vItHgcsGB4OYkw==)
---
---
| Thanks, Russell Prescott Republican for Congress NH-01

| [PrescottforCongress.com](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015juT7i7o7QKnc5R5sm_SsXWX_QRzDFPKX0ABl9JXN62BNYdKLELUYMTQtdU39s7DgUq0wQc7XVMoX9qxwI1kNdjRZtBMHye4RykzRH_Xp1LFgtDISNCqcKp-Ok96i-IDgxI9M-LnLH51PcUGCyMAmO1mP38vVNEk&c=PyA84bT461gn0ZRzZATI6wBAC3Xo3kk6rbbq1Sed8ntzKnirke31VA==&ch=cFTlvrglPETTgmt05pWGnWPYIRN89x0KE1ILVC92vItHgcsGB4OYkw==)
---
| More about Russell Prescott: A New Hampshire native of the Seacoast, Russell Prescott grew up in Exeter and currently lives in Kingston. For several decades, he was the co-owner and vice-president of R.E. Prescott Company, a wholesale distributor and manufacturer of water treatment systems. He purchased the business in 2020 and is now the president and sole owner.
Russell practiced Professional Engineering for 30 years and designs many of the products his company manufactures. As a result, he holds several patents for removing arsenic and radon from water. The company, founded in 1954 by his father, employs approximately 50 people and has operated in the same Exeter building since 1963.
Wanting to give back to his community, Prescott served five terms as a New Hampshire State Senator, being first elected in 2000 for two terms. He was re-elected in 2010, 2012, and again in 2014. As Senator, he represented Senate Districts 19 and 23, including towns from Newmarket to Plaistow and Derry to Seabrook.
Prescott was then twice elected to the Executive Council, once in 2016 and again in 2018. He decided to retire from the Executive Council in 2021 after purchasing his company.
Russell enjoys home restoration and recently finished a restoration of a 1737 colonial barn and grist mill in his town. His community service included Exeter Rotary Club, Kingston Lions Club, and the board of directors for the Exeter Area Chamber of Commerce.
He and his wife, Susan, have been married for 41 years, and they have five grown children and seven grandchildren. Following in their grandfather's and father's footsteps, his oldest three children are heavily involved with the daily operation and vision of the family business.
---

clean_body: Wishing you and your family a happy 2024 | | | | == | Peter, As we bid farewell to 2023 and embrace 2024, I wanted to take a moment to extend my heartfelt wishes to you and your family for a Happy New Year. The challenges of the past year have only strengthened our resolve, demonstrating that when we stand united, we can overcome any obstacle. As we turn the page on 2023, I am filled with optimism for what lies ahead. In the spirit of the new year, let us recommit ourselves to the principles that bind us: empathy, cooperation, and a shared vision for a brighter tomorrow. May 2024 be a year of growth, prosperity, and unity for us all. I want to wish you and your family a Happy New Year filled with joy, good health, and success. Together, let's make 2024 a year of hope, progress, and positive change. | == | Thanks, Russell Prescott Republican for Congress NH-01 | | == | More about Russell Prescott: A New Hampshire native of the Seacoast, Russell Prescott grew up in Exeter and currently lives in Kingston. For several decades, he was the co-owner and vice-president of R.E. Prescott Company, a wholesale distributor and manufacturer of water treatment systems. He purchased the business in 2020 and is now the president and sole owner. Russell practiced Professional Engineering for 30 years and designs many of the products his company manufactures. As a result, he holds several patents for removing arsenic and radon from water. The company, founded in 1954 by his father, employs approximately 50 people and has operated in the same Exeter building since 1963. Wanting to give back to his community, Prescott served five terms as a New Hampshire State Senator, being first elected in 2000 for two terms. He was re-elected in 2010, 2012, and again in 2014. As Senator, he represented Senate Districts 19 and 23, including towns from Newmarket to Plaistow and Derry to Seabrook. Prescott was then twice elected to the Executive Council, once in 2016 and again in 2018. He decided to retire from the Executive Council in 2021 after purchasing his company. Russell enjoys home restoration and recently finished a restoration of a 1737 colonial barn and grist mill in his town. His community service included Exeter Rotary Club, Kingston Lions Club, and the board of directors for the Exeter Area Chamber of Commerce. He and his wife, Susan, have been married for 41 years, and they have five grown children and seven grandchildren. Following in their grandfather's and father's footsteps, his oldest three children are heavily involved with the daily operation and vision of the family business. | | == == == | | | | | | | Prescott for Congress | PO Box 26, Kingston, NH 03848 | | Sent by mailto:info@prescottforcongress.com powered by

Fellow Patriot,
As I welcome the first day of 2024 with endless excitement, I send my warmest wishes to you. May this New Year bring you an abundance of happiness and triumph!

Florida provides the warmth of the sun and a vibrant community spirit. Let's carry this positivity into the coming year, celebrating the opportunities it holds for each of us.

Happy New Year!
Thank you,

Kat Cammack Congresswoman FL-03

Kat Cammack is serving her second term representing the people of Northeastern Florida in Congress. She won the seat on a conservative platform of growing jobs, securing our southern border, standing up for law enforcement, defending our Second Amendment, promoting fiscal responsibility, and defending life.
Congresswoman Cammack sits on the House Committee on Energy and Commerce and House Committee on Agriculture, where she is the only Florida Republican serving the Sunshine State's farmers, ranchers, and producers. She was also appointed to the Select Subcommittee on the Weaponization of the Federal Government.
Kat and her husband Matt, who is a firefighter, paramedic, and SWAT medic, proudly call Gainesville, Florida home.

clean_body: | | | | let the adventure begin | Fellow Patriot, As I welcome the first day of 2024 with endless excitement, I send my warmest wishes to you. May this New Year bring you an abundance of happiness and triumph! Florida provides the warmth of the sun and a vibrant community spirit. Let's carry this positivity into the coming year, celebrating the opportunities it holds for each of us. Happy New Year! Thank you, | | Kat Cammack Congresswoman FL-03 | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | "Instagram" ---|---|--- | Kat Cammack is serving her second term representing the people of Northeastern Florida in Congress. She won the seat on a conservative platform of growing jobs, securing our southern border, standing up for law enforcement, defending our Second Amendment, promoting fiscal responsibility, and defending life. Congresswoman Cammack sits on the House Committee on Energy and Commerce and House Committee on Agriculture, where she is the only Florida Republican serving the Sunshine State's farmers, ranchers, and producers. She was also appointed to the Select Subcommittee on the Weaponization of the Federal Government. Kat and her husband Matt, who is a firefighter, paramedic, and SWAT medic, proudly call Gainesville, Florida home. | | FOLLOW KAT ONLINE | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | "Instagram" ---|---|--- Donate by Mail Kat For Congress 5200 NW 43rd Street SUITE 102-180 Gainesville, FL, 32606 | | [PAID FOR BY KAT FOR CONGRESS]() Kat Cammack 5200 NW 43rd st, suite 102-180, Gainesville, FL 32606 = \- =

---
Kat Cammack is serving her second term representing the people of Northeastern Florida in Congress. She won the seat on a conservative platform of growing jobs, securing our southern border, standing up for law enforcement, defending our Second Amendment, promoting fiscal responsibility, and defending life.
Congresswoman Cammack sits on the House Committee on Energy and Commerce and House Committee on Agriculture, where she is the only Florida Republican serving the Sunshine State's farmers, ranchers, and producers. She was also appointed to the Select Subcommittee on the Weaponization of the Federal Government.

name: Congressman Raja Krishnamoorthi
subject: Happy New Year!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Raja for Congress
body:
Dear Peter,

Happy New Year! I hope this message finds you and your family well, and that you’ve been able to enjoy a restful holiday season surrounded by loved ones.

The New Year is an opportunity for a fresh start. It is a time we look forward to new opportunities, even as we reflect on our blessings from the previous year.

Thank you for your continued support and friendship– I wouldn’t be where I am today without you. May your 2024 be healthy, joyous, and prosperous!

Warmest regards,

Raja

[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP05/1/73169/images/RFC%20Latest%20Graphic%202.jpg]

name: Col. Mike Waltz (Ret.)
subject: What are your core values?
body:
It’s a question that every person should ask themselves. | | | _**What are your core values?**_ It’s a question that every person should ask themselves as we begin this new year.

In Congress, too many politicians are driven by greed and power.

_But that will never be me._

I served our country as a Green Beret, and _the same values I held every day fighting for our freedom abroad I still hold in Washington D.C. every day._

I’m going tell your about which values are most important to me, and I hope you’ll take a moment to reflect on the values YOU bring to the ballot box when you vote.

**So, let’s start with one of the most important virtues you need in leadership:_sacrifice_. **

Serving as a Green Beret, I had to put my own needs and impulses to the side for the good of our country.

I spent many birthdays, holidays, and celebrations away from my family on the other side of the world.

_It was tough, but I wouldn’t trade it for anything._

Too many politicians today have never sacrificed anything.

They’re motivated by self interest, not the interests of our country.

**Let me be clear: I will always put service to my country and my constituents over my own personal gain.**

**[I’m on a mission to bring more leaders to Washington who put service over self, but I need your help. Can you pitch in now and help us win for real leaders?](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=bb0cf772ed7b4c9081954b52e03c2760&_e=MR3iiRcyEmXJTUeJzx7mItX6npVIBx6nhwILqUjHSk8TwtJq_W8DHBVaKTIfWYdPE5-fZmCg-KZtglBjbMYPzZpQSAK9a0Xh2OE16utFXFOuJFaXj_xpY8z9H-37O5ALR3XwK7UaAc3-rNPx9VTw1-eTdT6WliUKcA4WTOeYrTEOey8kmQvsRmdTGQaFDznDuntA8S4aSBuX4CNgCKYwEnlsuirzd3-KLACNoqpsIHvf6yM4SWqMahNeq_pjJtcGAt4l-oYzohOcSFVZno5oh1zGoj8hubhy1BPG_GGya_zDVW5tRCcf_XuEJOknOPdTMoQxTgGjVnI2BQ4KDXyR3CHqZog4jemNnI7uGYHFYkiVL9CiEoMhLbscm9I4na03)**

name: Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.
subject: Welcome to the New Year
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
I want to wish you and yours a very happy and healthy New Year.

|
---
| | | **I want to wish you and yours a very happy and healthy New Year.
**
---
|
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=new_year_1_1_24_email_1_2_nd&n=1)

[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=new_year_1_1_24_email_1_2_nd&n=3)
---
|
---
Dear Peter,
2024 is officially on and we’re just 309 days away from November 5, 2024 – Election Day.
But before I return to the campaign trail, I want to wish you and yours a very happy and healthy New Year.
I hope to see you and hear from you over the course of the ensuing months.
Given the opportunity to govern, you and I will have an opportunity to restore faith and trust in our Institutions by holding agencies accountable – we can win back the respect and admiration of a multitude of nations by minding our own business and bringing our troops home – and we can rebuild a resilient middle class built on an exceptional manufacturing base.
And we’re just getting started.
Thank you again for the trust you have placed in me. I could not do this without you standing by my side.
| |
---
---
Sincerely,
Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.
---

body:
...
Friend--I really wasn't sure who else to reach out to. We're only $45 away from meeting our goal for the entire YEAR of 2023. Can you please help us close the gap? If you've saved your payment information with WinRed, just click on the button below and your donation will go through immediately. [$45 Contribution](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xtjyuyd-didthutlhu-r/) Friend, we can't thank you enough for your help and ongoing support!Wishing you a happy and healthy New Year!-Lily S, Team WisGOPSent from my iPhone **From:** Team WisGOP <info@wisconsin-gop.com>
**Sent:** Sunday, December 31, 2023 12:45:44 PM
**To:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Subject:** We need help this afternoon.
### Friend,
### It was a _**YUGE**_ morning!
### We're well on our way to making our 2023 Year-End Goal.
### We're only $1,200 away, but less than 12 hours to make it.
### In 2024, the road to the White House and majorities in the US Senate and House run **STRAIGHT** through Wisconsin.
### Beyond that, the Republican nomination for President will **OCCUR IN MILWAUKEE**.
### Republicans are invested in Wisconsin, but we need help from you to keep up the momentum to be successful in April's municipal elections **AND** November's General Election.
### It's cliched, but 2024 **WILL** be the single most important election in Wisconsin's history. Our state has decided the President of the United States in the last two elections, and in 2024 we will--once again--easily be the state that decides the country's leader.
[CLOSE THE GAP RIGHT NOW](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xtjyuyd-didthutlhu-y/)
### This election, four more years of Bidenomics, open borders, crime-ridden cities, and weaponized legal systems are on the ballot. And, it is up to **US** in Wisconsin to set the country straight. We need everyone on the team, though, to make it happen.
### Wishing you a happy, healthy, and **WINNING** New Year in 2024!
### -Team WisGOP

name: Sarah Longwell
subject: My resolution
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican Accountability PAC Inc
body:
Our pro-democracy coalition gets stronger when we stand together, and we will need all the help we can get to win in 2024.
|
---
Friend,

Welcome to 2024—a year that, to be honest, I’ve been dreading. We’re beginning the last chapter in a story that started with Donald Trump’s unprecedented assault on America’s democratic system. No more waiting, no more resting, because he’s going to be twice as hard to beat the second time. Before this new year fully consumes me, I want to take a second to say **thank you.** In 2023, we were mentioned in hundreds of articles, placed dozens of billboards, produced countless videos, and took on the most extreme Republicans. None of it would have been possible without people like you. You put country over party, and we could not be more grateful. Our pro-democracy coalition gets stronger when we stand together, and we will need all the help we can get to win in 2024. Happy New Year, and thank you for your unwavering support. Sarah Longwell Republican Accountability PAC
---

name: Team DeSantis
subject: Welcome to 2024!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window.
https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=0b8692cffdf496464f7fee46c5f1a4e6d9afd4b93543782d65204ed2d3b9e994ab58532daf526b1543c8a65e04fcddb11fe032eb35f5634f4c0fbd748ade000caca761275bfe38d60f748ecd71f50767

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=3bcea781b53705b48db6b0fc7ece26017e3dceb6a78b18915bb43e6d3098b3a5abb37329f8ed328b71dd4dc5066ab74185fb3a6b7187bcb151290a57a7019c97

Happy New Year, friend! 🎊

On this New Year's Day, we are just two weeks out from the all-important Iowa Caucus. What our team will remember about the beginning of 2024 is...

- Packing in as many Iowa events as we can in two weeks.
- Reaching voters far and wide to encourage them to get out and support Ron DeSantis in the caucus.
- Putting every resource toward winning this critical contest on January 15th.

This year, the American people will be electing a new President; which means we will be working harder than ever to earn the support to save this country. As you take on the new year with a clear vision of what you want for YOUR future, we're going to need your support in these early days. As you take on the new year with a clear vision of what you want for YOUR future, we're going to need your support in these early days. Will you give what you can TODAY to help us get out the vote, spread the word, and raise what we need for Iowa Caucus? Chip in $15 right here:
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=3bcea781b53705b48db6b0fc7ece26017e3dceb6a78b18915bb43e6d3098b3a5abb37329f8ed328b71dd4dc5066ab74185fb3a6b7187bcb151290a57a7019c97
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=1bc7685219d78c82c971db0583b004de62f5c92b4244cc19ff18ca8b8be0f3338a2c04c2b8e68265cfbb48ff74a1478d972fd70e34e5c1eb35c6dd2b632277d5

We've come this far, and we're not backing down now. We need your help, friend. Our future depends on 2024.

Your Team DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=3bcea781b53705b48db6b0fc7ece26017e3dceb6a78b18915bb43e6d3098b3a5abb37329f8ed328b71dd4dc5066ab74185fb3a6b7187bcb151290a57a7019c97
Support Ron DeSantis for President

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=3bcea781b53705b48db6b0fc7ece26017e3dceb6a78b18915bb43e6d3098b3a5abb37329f8ed328b71dd4dc5066ab74185fb3a6b7187bcb151290a57a7019c97

🚨 ATTENTION 🚨

Heads up! We have pre-checked the monthly donor box on our fundraising page. Monthly donors make a HUGE difference for our team and help ups plan ahead.

If one donation was all it took to defeat Joe Biden next November then we wouldn't ask for your help more than we already have, but unfortunately it's going to take more than that to win.

Please keep this box checked so we that we can count on your support.

Volunteer!

We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=3bcea781b53705b4e7f4fd34103b2513f751712626a4389751c0f3fbd30210c20279187cb26d0ec8ccbe446ed304b46822e0d746bd55f0ae27ba53ac9652c5f3
Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=3bcea781b53705b48db6b0fc7ece26017e3dceb6a78b18915bb43e6d3098b3a5abb37329f8ed328b71dd4dc5066ab74185fb3a6b7187bcb151290a57a7019c97

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=3bcea781b53705b48db6b0fc7ece26017e3dceb6a78b18915bb43e6d3098b3a5abb37329f8ed328b71dd4dc5066ab74185fb3a6b7187bcb151290a57a7019c97

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

- I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
- This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
- I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.

I am so excited and ready to WIN in 2024!

Thank you,

Senator Rick Scott

clean_body: | | | | Deadline passed | Peter, It’s Ciro, Mike Lawler’s Campaign Manager. I am following up because I didn’t see your donation come in last night. You still have time to donate. Help us start off 2024 with your BEST CONTRIBUTION. | | | | | | | Thank you, Ciro, Team Lawler Sent from my iPhone | | | | | | Mike Lawler is a Republican running for reelection in New York’s 17th Congressional District. He is passionate about standing with law enforcement and making our communities more safe, protecting Social Security and Medicare, fixing our crumbling roads and bridges, and restoring the SALT deduction to lower taxes and make New York more affordable. | | USE THE ADDRESS BELOW TO CONTRIBUTE BY CHECK LAWLER FOR CONGRESS PO BOX 87 SOUTH SALEM, NY 10590 GET YOUR MIKE LAWLER, NO CUOMO MERCH No New Yorker wants to call our Tappan Zee Bridge the “Governor Mario M. Cuomo Bridge”. Proudly send the message that you want the bridge restored as the Tappan Zee. | Are you interested in staying up-to-date on Mike Lawler's reelection battle? Don't miss out on the latest news and updates from his campaign! By texting "Lawler" to 85007, you can receive regular updates on Mike's campaign, upcoming events, and important news about the race. Text "Lawler" to 85007 today and join the fight for a brighter future for New York!_ Do you know someone who would be interested in supporting Mike Lawler’s reelection campaign for Congress? Don't keep it to yourself! Spread the word and remind your friends and family to join the fight for America’s future. Simply forward this message to five of your friends or family members who you think would be interested in staying up-to-date with Mike's campaign. FORWARD THIS EMAIL As we get closer to the 2024 election, Mike Lawler is more motivated than ever to continue our journey toward a better future for all New Yorkers. To stay up-to-date with our latest news and events, we encourage you to text "Lawler" to 85007 and follow us on social media, where we share updates, thoughts, and news about our progress. You can also opt others in by providing their email address and we will send them regular updates and important news about the campaign. | go.txting.io/7jAGfc Let's work together to ensure that Mike Lawler has the support he needs to make a real difference for New York! | | | | | = \- ==

name: Diana
subject: re: your 1/1/24 invitation...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
This is time-sensitive.
| | | Hey there -- It's Diana, the Research Director here at the DSCC. I've got some BIG news: **We've selected YOU to represent Pennsylvania in a Democratic Strategy Interview for today, 1/1/24.**

Only a select few of our most committed grassroots Democrats were chosen for this _incredible_ opportunity, so you have a _rare_ chance to help shape our vital 2024 Senate strategy and defeat Republicans this year!

Today's survey closes at 11:59 PM, and **we won't have a complete dataset without your response! So please, click this personal link to enter your Democratic Strategy Interview by taking the survey now:
[www.dscc.org/DailyStrategyInterview24/#9716520](http://go.dscc.org/go/17112?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20240101-Diana-DianaDailyStrategy-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20240101-Diana-DianaDailyStrategy-Pros-sl1&akid=13010%2E9716520%2EsBf6e5)**

| **[START YOUR INTERVIEW](http://go.dscc.org/go/17112?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20240101-Diana-DianaDailyStrategy-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20240101-Diana-DianaDailyStrategy-Pros-sl1&akid=13010%2E9716520%2EsBf6e5)**
---

_**NOTE: Please do not share this link with anyone, as it may corrupt our data**_

Thank you for being a part of this team,

Diana, DSCC

* If you've recently responded or done so with a different email address, thank you! Online records may not be up to date, but don't worry -- your responses have been recorded.
| |

[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-senate-democrats-2023-q4-recurring?refcode=DPE-footer&amount=5&recurring=1&t=1&refcode2=13010_9716520_sBf6e5&akid=13010%2E9716520%2EsBf6e5)
* * *
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please **[click here](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-senate-democrats-2023-q4?refcode=DPE-footer&t=2&refcode2=13010_9716520_sBf6e5&akid=13010%2E9716520%2EsBf6e5)**.

name: Restore Our Nation
subject: Big Pharma and the federal government
body:
In America, various industries have close ties to government regulators.
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/-cLjH2LHx1s3Pniy43C2Rg~~/AARclAA~/RgRndYy0P0SbaHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L2JpZy1waGFybWEtY2NhLz9zYz0wMDk0MU4wMjQyTDA2RE9ERUVTJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9cHJvc3BlY3RpbmcmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249YmlncGhhcm1hJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVBBLVJPTjItMjAyNDAxMDFXA3NwY0IKZYOb3pJlsCsNaFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)
---
| | Dear Friend,

In America, various industries have close ties to government regulators.

The pharmaceutical industry is one of the most notable and most troubling.

Last year alone, "Big Pharma" spent over $373 million on lobbying--much more than any other industry.

While the Constitution certainly protects the rights to free speech and to petition the government, it was never intended to grant the special privileges that are characteristic of today's bureaucratic, administrative state.

In addition, Big Pharma's reputation has come under attack in the wake of America's opioid epidemic--since 1999, more than 600,000 people have died from opioid overdoses in the U.S. and Canada alone--and the COVID pandemic.

Given these current controversies, we decided to host a conference to consider the rise of Big Pharma, its role in the declining state of American health, and ideas for reform.

**The result is a free online video series that reveals the truth about Big Pharma.**

When you watch this free video series, you'll learn about the collaboration between the federal government and pharmaceutical companies, the content of the "Pfizer documents," and the origins of Big Pharma and the opioid epidemic.

You'll also gain valuable insights into Anthony Fauci and the public health establishment from Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.

**You can receive instant access to this free video series right now using this secure link:**

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/big-pharma-cca/](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/-cLjH2LHx1s3Pniy43C2Rg~~/AARclAA~/RgRndYy0P0SbaHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L2JpZy1waGFybWEtY2NhLz9zYz0wMDk0MU4wMjQyTDA2RE9ERUVTJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9cHJvc3BlY3RpbmcmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249YmlncGhhcm1hJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVBBLVJPTjItMjAyNDAxMDFXA3NwY0IKZYOb3pJlsCsNaFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)**

We filmed the series at a recent Center for Constructive Alternatives conference on the Hillsdale campus. You will not have to watch for long to discover why it was one of our most popular and well-attended events.

**Please use the secure link above to receive your Big Pharma video series. When you complete the form, we will email you the series so you can watch it immediately.**

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844**
**

---
| |
---

Restore Our Nation
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

I want to make sure you know a little bit about me and my story. I’m not a career politician—just a Veteran, Nurse Practitioner, and Mom who wants to make a difference in America. I grew tired of seeing the endless stream of false promises and fake agendas on TV…I think America deserves better—don’t you? I served in the Navy for 10 years, and afterward, I went back to school to become a Nurse Practitioner. It has always been my mission to serve all Americans in the best way possible. Now, as a recently elected Congresswoman, I’m taking my mission to Capitol Hill. But the far-Left doesn’t like me. They don’t care about making our nation’s future brighter for ALL Americans…they just care about their own WOKE agendas. This is why they will do whatever it takes to DEFEAT me in 2024. I won't EVER back down from a fight, and not one with so much at stake, but I don’t think I can win this alone. name: TN House Democrats
subject: A fresh start for TN
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tennessee House Democratic Caucus | Ronnie Glynn, Treasurer
body:
https://tnhousedems.com/ [https://tnhousedems.com/]
Happy new year! 2024 offers us a fresh start and great opportunity.
In 2023 we witnessed unprecedented attacks on our democracy, continued efforts to dismantle our public school system, a lack of courage to pass gun safety measures, and a host of harmful policies threatening the well-being of Tennessee families.
It has become abundantly clear to voters that Bill Lee and the GOP supermajority are out of touch with the people of Tennessee. These radicals running our state are flailing, having become accustomed to abusing their power and not being held accountable. They live in fear of what we Democrats can accomplish by working together. In fact, Republican House leadership is so scared of our united voice and efforts that the Speaker started directing public threats towards our leadership this week in an attempt to divide our Caucus. They will not succeed.
Chairman John Ray Clemmons and our entire Caucus leadership team are outworking the Republicans and have built a solid foundation for our 2024 campaigns and generated significant momentum for the upcoming election cycle. You have made this all possible.
We cannot afford to slow down now, so we are doing all we can right up until the gavel strikes to convene the next legislative session on January 9th. While Republicans are enjoying the holidays and recovering from their new year’s festivities, we are working.
The year ahead is promising, but it will only be successful if we keep working hard and remain united in the fight for our future. We need all the help you can provide before January 9th.
By clicking the link and donating today, you stand in solidarity with thousands of people who believe in this movement. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tnhousedems2024] Every dollar you donate will be invested in candidates who have a serious opportunity to win and help us break the Republican supermajority. With your support, we will build a better future for all Tennesseans.
Happy New Year, friend. 2024 is going to be a good year, as we work together to make progress in the fight to reclaim our state!
Warmly,
Your Tennessee House Democrats
SUPPORT OUR EFFORTS TO FLIP STATE HOUSE SEATS IN TENNESSEE! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tnhousedems2024]
Upcoming Event
Cocktails & Conversation

Time : 5:30 - 7:00 PM
Location: 901B Coral Rd. Nashville, TN 37204

subject: What issue should we focus on?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Banks for Senate
