As conservatives, we are committed to advancing the principles of limited government, fiscal accountability, and freedom. These principles should be the foundation of our legislative agenda. [**But we need to know which issue you think we should focus on.**](http://links.banksforsenate.com/u/click?_t=588630feb05642bf856633600a62821b&_m=7f4a5aba60384207b8dab7c6e0c0e4e6&_e=CNxipbfaofIMUc5DH6mnEKrI36Pu_WCkZSiPcxwCd8rqVSjJ3-1BWEyljUHDWHFM-nsxfaDkmcIEdhBgwoEkIByFpRCnodD1-4WbSx4hhFY_uj5VJ2w_yQvbg-wDLWb5O8EG7Y6CXM3mzeeOS3m-mKjTK6UUlO09ufSsaxfE_bvLuQtrDGt8I630x5IROvtkA2FTBJx_2oqDjTspXqTeUMz9EyZqvN_TFia0cyEfNoCBQmBx3y-tA0mSWcXsL-8_a9dBBGgBysDytLVI19e8EP0iIvg6WU9FUK_GUXnhvzkiGxDaBsQT3JZgOPNj989rK8opDj0ATtDHE5ydu-U2nfLeSOOwRlWFKmosRBaNUirCvGa00lNY0Cty0RPIm-WgaeU9HDpn_DqNwJnPH7zI0y5sO1bMeMdSloWabypAlAaxLCBChyufqLqujJC7h4TxI5nB_VI_lhBAU2wCD6HZk0It43bgx1zNLIuoipbMuvswwvc1xuLv8BMANlWLfxpJl00UYMgqySVIc1Tkkhv7h-wFxtO_SjH2Ei-5AFJv3HY%3D)

We are eager to hear your thoughts. [**_Please share your ideas so that we can make an informed decision that will benefit you._**](http://links.banksforsenate.com/u/click?_t=588630feb05642bf856633600a62821b&_m=7f4a5aba60384207b8dab7c6e0c0e4e6&_e=CNxipbfaofIMUc5DH6mnEKrI36Pu_WCkZSiPcxwCd8rqVSjJ3-1BWEyljUHDWHFM-nsxfaDkmcIEdhBgwoEkIByFpRCnodD1-4WbSx4hhFY_uj5VJ2w_yQvbg-wDLWb5O8EG7Y6CXM3mzeeOS3m-mKjTK6UUlO09ufSsaxfE_bvLuQtrDGt8I630x5IROvtkA2FTBJx_2oqDjTspXqTeUMz9EyZqvN_TFia0cyEfNoCBQmBx3y-tA0mSWcXsL-8_a9dBBGgBysDytLVI19e8EP0iIvg6WU9FUK_GUXnhvzkiGxDaBsQT3JZgOPNj989rK8opDj0ATtDHE5ydu-U2nfLeSOOwRlWFKmosRBaNUirCvGa00lNY0Cty0RPIm-WgaeU9HDpn_DqNwJnPH7zI0_gKW1LtPiy5-owIwwJltrcXUl1iAYBJZXsVuZJNc61S4ArkVpN16g2FoF28mReyKUfpblO6LnSr5fIG_LVGSlH4WIPmTj53U-aODa2DSaIscv_Hdqr8Qrc2J__GsEgVwpt3LCTDJYODvfr09mvCYqs%3D)

Dear Peter,
As we stand on the threshold of a new year, I am extending my sincerest wishes to you and your loved ones. May the coming year be filled with joy, prosperity, and success.
As we begin 2024, let us remember how far we have come, and continue our path to victory this year.
As a lifelong New Yorker, I am determined to fight for our state's future and grateful for the opportunity voters have given me to do just that, first in the State Assembly, and now in Congress.
---

clean_body: | | | | Let’s ring in 2024 on a united front | Dear Peter, As we stand on the threshold of a new year, I am extending my sincerest wishes to you and your loved ones. May the coming year be filled with joy, prosperity, and success. As we begin 2024, let us remember how far we have come, and continue our path to victory this year. As a lifelong New Yorker, I am determined to fight for our state's future and grateful for the opportunity voters have given me to do just that, first in the State Assembly, and now in Congress. Here's to a New Year filled with unity, shared goals, and collective triumphs. | | Thank you, Rep. Mike Lawler NY-17 | | | | | Mike Lawler is a Republican running for reelection in New York’s 17th Congressional District. He is passionate about standing with law enforcement and making our communities more safe, protecting Social Security and Medicare, fixing our crumbling roads and bridges, and restoring the SALT deduction to lower taxes and make New York more affordable. | | USE THE ADDRESS BELOW TO CONTRIBUTE BY CHECK LAWLER FOR CONGRESS PO BOX 87 SOUTH SALEM, NY 10590 GET YOUR MIKE LAWLER, NO CUOMO MERCH No New Yorker wants to call our Tappan Zee Bridge the “Governor Mario M. Cuomo Bridge”. Proudly send the message that you want the bridge restored as the Tappan Zee. | Are you interested in staying up-to-date on Mike Lawler's reelection battle? Don't miss out on the latest news and updates from his campaign! By texting "Lawler" to 85007, you can receive regular updates on Mike's campaign, upcoming events, and important news about the race. Text "Lawler" to 85007 today and join the fight for a brighter future for New York!_ Do you know someone who would be interested in supporting Mike Lawler’s reelection campaign for Congress? Don't keep it to yourself! Spread the word and remind your friends and family to join the fight for America’s future. Simply forward this message to five of your friends or family members who you think would be interested in staying up-to-date with Mike's campaign. FORWARD THIS EMAIL As we get closer to the 2024 election, Mike Lawler is more motivated than ever to continue our journey toward a better future for all New Yorkers. To stay up-to-date with our latest news and events, we encourage you to text "Lawler" to 85007 and follow us on social media, where we share updates, thoughts, and news about our progress. You can also opt others in by providing their email address and we will send them regular updates and important news about the campaign. | go.txting.io/7jAGfc Let's work together to ensure that Mike Lawler has the support he needs to make a real difference for New York! | | | | | = \- =

name: Senator Josh Hawley
subject: Wishing you and yours a Happy New Year!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee
body:
| | | Peter, On this New Year’s Day, I just wanted to show my true appreciation and thank you sincerely for all of your support.

I would not have the strength to keep fighting for the conservative cause without all of my loyal, conservative supporters, and the support of my amazing family.
---
---
So on this beautiful New Year’s Day, I just wanted to wish everyone a blissful and happy holiday, and a great start to the New Year. Again, thank you all greatly for your support.

God Bless,

Senator Josh Hawley
---

body:

Thanks to thousands of grassroots supporters, I feel optimistic as our campaign steps into 2024. In just over a month, Californians will begin voting in our primary, and in just over two months it will be Election Day.
Between now and then, I’ll be doing everything I can to reach every California voter. From events to ads, your support is powering our work.
Thanks again & Happy New Year!
Katie

name: Hillsdale College via Defend the Constitution
subject: How should we elect the President?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

| | This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=853a26144937468a8360666df9f494cd&_e=sb5e0-6Sqx4cQBe37OvKS0GbVz_zJESXiDG_nMnUIZSg768_Gax-zCetNRdPeGhtgvQutz_kdbwTP1Fcafj3D-dUGbjtTaLqleUP2qqTgeY5laAH5-u8LkYjn_821P_Xr-ca2HoC6KTKcLTFTOyb3ZxAX6lspERTte2wMrRiYGiALvsjDxHKiSPwfOZgCP6tjceJqHUTEBIGBjF20xe96IsCX0NbhxryJxspOjJrGNCuGPbFdUrBGJ6JbE6yff4U8M8jlMn6bXiTxVx59DekAwz0znPcWS7CoFpEWmcUGT38dTqwHKPD4Nur45nD7vz1_3bXlR8Ajxr0tp8dCVYPijFs1ZNNkjGZlS7pWp1T845RdJycWSpWHugbHnhRYqHA5bbLKYvqhRiiZBmaDxjzK2_BXwM31_1QZrfGVVsrXWI%3D)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection **by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=853a26144937468a8360666df9f494cd&_e=sb5e0-6Sqx4cQBe37OvKS0GbVz_zJESXiDG_nMnUIZSg768_Gax-zCetNRdPeGhtgvQutz_kdbwTP1Fcafj3D-dUGbjtTaLqleUP2qqTgeY5laAH5-u8LkYjn_821P_Xr-ca2HoC6KTKcLTFTOyb3ZxAX6lspERTte2wMrRiYGiALvsjDxHKiSPwfOZgCP6tjceJqHUTEBIGBjF20xe96IsCX0NbhxryJxspOjJrGNCuGPbFdUrBGJ6JbE6yff4UhSNmQrW9axkICT-2kA0rUVEArH7o6lwQvmsAMdR_CL8ONcHqUZCg05pJi4kigP85BSG4B4-w0gzGgSYco0pwQYJzWtMBoHMch6Kj6IHIjLKdIv2lx7FN8ZYV3e5eb7GBJYw-KI9PQQVxpjtBjLCcF1bcP8zQox29IUWvjy7l3fY%3D)**
## Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?
[YES](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=853a26144937468a8360666df9f494cd&_e=sb5e0-6Sqx4cQBe37OvKS0GbVz_zJESXiDG_nMnUIZSg768_Gax-zCetNRdPeGhtgvQutz_kdbwTP1Fcafj3D-dUGbjtTaLqleUP2qqTgeY5laAH5-u8LkYjn_821P_Xr-ca2HoC6KTKcLTFTOyb3ZxAX6lspERTte2wMrRiYGiALvsjDxHKiSPwfOZgCP6tjceJqHUTEBIGBjF20xe96IsCX0NbhxryJxspOjJrGNCuGPbFdUrBGJ6JbE6yff4UxoEv2q65qln-S-YamLSTzxSCQACPfo2lbnn4mv5tnoE5N_t010edvXLgg_Q-4avLGLvnjecug9ETKEkVFUzizeQ0_WX9Mwg50afCICuNiXrwVNKGM6wPjmG4QBZ4GLx_q99sk6DqPnDMxnYCBPe5ZZ94MQhL9YAPqxF-x7Icv80%3D) [NO](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=853a26144937468a8360666df9f494cd&_e=sb5e0-6Sqx4cQBe37OvKS0GbVz_zJESXiDG_nMnUIZSg768_Gax-zCetNRdPeGhtgvQutz_kdbwTP1Fcafj3D-dUGbjtTaLqleUP2qqTgeY5laAH5-u8LkYjn_821P_Xr-ca2HoC6KTKcLTFTOyb3ZxAX6lspERTte2wMrRiYGiALvsjDxHKiSPwfOZgCP6tjceJqHUTEBIGBjF20xe96IsCX0NbhxryJxspOjJrGNCuGPbFdUrBGJ6JbE6yff4UnFIP6kMoTVrEkpJk0splIuVGXkHXB7Ag8wy0WXTloYJYIzNfsgQ89L9IIFfM8IWgS5bKSS_bOvXHh4jhQVL7KU3LDou-yaDCnAWU4HQFGP3ClyyTg99C8z83k-usYotgFw5Uvqm3K6dhpVdDIbGwJYm0Iguk_IGk0JJhbhos0Ys%3D) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=853a26144937468a8360666df9f494cd&_e=sb5e0-6Sqx4cQBe37OvKS0GbVz_zJESXiDG_nMnUIZSg768_Gax-zCetNRdPeGhtgvQutz_kdbwTP1Fcafj3D-dUGbjtTaLqleUP2qqTgeY5laAH5-u8LkYjn_821P_Xr-ca2HoC6KTKcLTFTOyb3ZxAX6lspERTte2wMrRiYGiALvsjDxHKiSPwfOZgCP6tjceJqHUTEBIGBjF20xe96IsCX0NbhxryJxspOjJrGNCuGPbFdUrBGJ6JbE6yff4Ueykg-68uVGnQrylNu_qlD2mbDi3covdXcGnXugMtAsTX-W91JYnpHTIdH7Bo0RN9pV4xPy7tc_e4VKvIEpw8FQMRIj0CBa43W-J-UK6-Cke3Ieb2Elr6b32WMBIoK2_o5g7gop8Zn_2DMyRTE_OoKNVtYu78fhoYlnygTiMCji8%3D)**
** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Defend the Constitution
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=853a26144937468a8360666df9f494cd&_t=-ki_IZl6dlshlZlIKczrSkFBaC1mI1FQKIqlSDm53rbV9zvfMLZghcjDaDO60rMK_iYVrR1aiAa8a7j34WNODmDqS00Uf1pE0vVNmE_233c9Uc5glLHYyzAavsl_aefK7TwJW5t5Ih2nAdE9adiZ7f9MwYKgCb8pvfdoUD0g1X8%3D)
_[**unsubscribe**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=853a26144937468a8360666df9f494cd&_e=oURogtLJqifqHJNy7qJO7iSb9BanZ7D7RjWr8rIqcfRmB12R_BfMHMVa5exJ9z4sMqKluMcg0Iq_YNF5FaSotqFHasl4mzBJPN3o7o9bwJs36g5nhCDbpdz71ukuLyQhqT6tgqOV7z9wotvKF4TY6uuVF4GmLKEfEPw2jhFpUo982xN6vy9vUUaj2tfXNwA5_KpLHtE-ld8Zs_dGPFVumPSYku7yQp3mY3mik2NVZyJgMU0n4VP13prepYCO9IKHqpCV8S-QQ0Mg7Uz8wYWGOR6HqMJ4v-cBNG1ajIsrReo%3D)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=853a26144937468a8360666df9f494cd&_e=sb5e0-6Sqx4cQBe37OvKSxAwFCXoW52na9wIhRVhE6MrkH6XdkVj17HugfGX8V7gDhidV0geZ1qO7_O_DPIrYJ3BtqNvmbaCsGdVpcZRErUyLaBndgq8PHhqQm4l3KKmyz83YPM8P5ssYKdcmwy5r2uPgFifBwUc5uFIji5MXBdIVzHXFDXX6vi6IuFJfTYT0lbFub2zOAHu-pvuutUPR87OxNHdhRVZzLWJ-n62ZgU%3D)_

Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty. This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include: Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;" Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty; Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people; Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers. Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future. So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below: And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 Defend the Constitution 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

subject: Trump removed in 15 MORE STATES?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee
body:
Please read the following message from our sponsor.

Friend -

This is one of the most important emails we've ever
sent you.

We're rushing to you with an urgent election update
after the BOMBSHELL ruling to remove President Trump from the
ballot. Maine was only step one. The Lieutenant Governor of
California didn't waste a minute to follow suit. Time is of the
essence and Republicans need to be on high alert.

If not, it might be impossible for Republicans to
win the next election. Just look at what the Radical Left is
doing to our country:

LIST OF ACTIVE TRUMP BALLOT ACCESS CASES

Maine - Removed From Ballot

Arizona - Pending Appeal

Wisconsin - Pending Lawsuit

Alaska - Pending Lawsuit

Oregon - Pending Lawsuit

Nevada - Pending Lawsuit

Wyoming - Pending Lawsuit

New Mexico - Pending Lawsuit

Texas - Pending Lawsuit

West Virginia - Pending Lawsuit

South Carolina - Pending Lawsuit

New York - Pending Lawsuit

Vermont - Pending Lawsuit

New Jersey - Pending Lawsuit

Virginia - Pending Lawsuit

Well-funded Liberal groups and shady political
operatives are slamming key states with legal action to
DISQUALIFY President Trump from the 2024 ballot.

We're circulating an emergency petition to keep
President Trump's name on the ballot in ALL 50 states. We set a
goal of collecting 1,000,000 signatures by 9:00 AM tomorrow but
we're seriously behind and time is short.

We're sending out this last desperate plea in these
final hours.

Will you sign this critically important petition?

ADD YOUR NAME:
HELP KEEP TRUMP ON THE BALLOT >>

Thank you,

House GOP

It's House Majority Leader Steve Scalise.

I'm respectfully asking you to fill out my MAJORITY LEADER
SURVEY at your earliest convenience. It's important. I want to
have your goals, your concerns, and your priorities in mind
before I do anything else.

What would you like me to keep in mind when I'm taking on the
Radical Democrats?

BEGIN YOUR SURVEY >>

Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee
authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE
TIGER PAC.

Team
Scalise is committed to defending our Conservative House majority
and electing Conservatives across the country. Thank you for
being a part of our movement. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com
because you are a member of the Team Scalise Conservative
grassroots network.

Contributions to TEAM SCALISE, or any participating committee,
are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income
tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, national banks,
labor unions, foreign nationals without "green cards," and
federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law
requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the
name, mailing address, occupation, and employer of each
individual who contributes over $200 in a calendar year.

You can
donate via mail by sending a check to:
320 First
Street SE
2nd Floor

Washington, DC 20003

Privacy
Policy

DISCLAIMER
Your privacy is important to us.
It is The Federalist Wire's policy to respect your privacy and
comply with any applicable law and regulation regarding any
personal information we may collect about you, including across
our website, and other sites we own and operate.

subject: The election is officially in full swing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
With your support, you’ve sent a powerful message about the strength of this movement to reelect Joe and Kamala | | |

Peter, I’m incredibly grateful. I’m grateful for grassroots supporters like you who helped not just reach our end-of-year fundraising goal -- but exceed it. There’s a lot more I could say, but it all boils down to this: _thank you._ **With your support, you’ve sent a _powerful_ message about the strength of this movement to reelect Joe and Kamala and defend our democracy.** But now more than ever, we can’t take our foot off the gas. The election is officially in full swing, and we need to make sure we have the resources to defeat Donald Trump -- or whichever extreme MAGA Republican is their nominee. [**Will you consider chipping in your first contribution of $25 to kick off 2024? name: Lizzie Pannill Fletcher
subject: Happy New Year!
body:
https://www.lizziefletcher.com/ [https://www.lizziefletcher.com/]
2024 is here! As we begin this year, let us do so with an understanding of how important our work together will be and with a belief in what we can accomplish together. I know we can—we have done it before.
The year ahead will be pivotal for our communities and our country. I look forward to working with you in the days, weeks, and months ahead. As we work to win our race and help win other important races across Texas and elsewhere in the country, we will help win back the House, make gains in the Senate, and hold the White House. (Just think, at the end of this year, we can have Senator Allred instead of Senator Cruz!)
I am so optimistic about the things we can achieve together because I have seen what is possible when we work together on this team. So, to start the year, I want to thank you for all you have done and will do for our campaign and country. Together, we are going to make 2024 a very good year!
With best wishes for a happy, healthy, and hopeful new year.
Together, we can do anything,
LizzieSignature [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/lizzie_signature-1.png]

name: President Heather Williams (via DLCC.org)
subject: Happy New Year from the DLCC
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DLCC PAC
body:
Whether you made a donation, volunteered with one of our incredible candidates, or cheered on this team from the sidelines, your support made a huge difference, and we’re all deeply grateful. | | |
---
| |
---|---
Thank you, thank you, thank you. Today, on behalf of the entire team here at the DLCC, I’d like to thank you for your commitment to our mission in 2023. Whether you made a donation, volunteered with one of our incredible candidates, or cheered on this team from the sidelines, your support made a huge difference, and we’re all deeply grateful. Our work to build Democratic power in statehouses across the country isn’t easy – and we have a long road ahead in 2024. Last year, we were able to defy the odds together: winning more than 30 special elections, defending Democratic majorities in states like Pennsylvania, and blocking a billionaire-funded power grab in Virginia. **I’m so proud of all we’ve accomplishedand I hope you are, too.** [Thank you so much for being on our team. A small contribution of $7 would be greatly appreciated as we prepare for upcoming elections this year. name: Matt Cartwright
subject: Thank you and Happy New Year!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cartwright for Congress
body:
Thanks to you, we surpassed our end-of-year goal and are set to start off 2024 in a strong position.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76289605/447118866/1790176412?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzgyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MzE4YzAyZi1jN2E4LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjFmNTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j0Pat2wL-N21cUltLmgTp8-K7z2RrvQEyC17IfksXvo=&emci=725e1399-969b-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&emdi=5318c02f-c7a8-ee11-bea1-002248221f54&ceid=23311593) | Happy New Year, Peter!

I’m emailing to express my heartfelt gratitude for your incredible support! Thanks to you, we surpassed our end-of-year goal and are set to start off 2024 in a strong position.

I am so grateful to have each of you on my team as we face another tough re-election race. Republicans are already pouring outside money into our district to unseat me. The GOP has declared my race a top target, and they’re prepared to do – and spend – whatever it takes to maintain their slim House majority.

But thanks to supporters like you who are stepping up to stop the GOP from bringing their extremist agenda to PA-08, I know we can fight back and win.

So Peter, thank you again. It is truly an honor to serve northeastern Pennsylvanians, and I promise to keep fighting for you and your family's best interests in the House.

– Matt | In 2022, Matt Cartwright was one of only 5 Democrats to win a House race in a district that Donald Trump carried in 2020. He's gearing up for another tough re-election, and he needs your support to keep PA-08 blue. Rush a donation right away to help Matt protect his seat. | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76289606/447118894/-235138156?refcode=em23_240101_eoy_enask_gq_act_ty_mc_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_240101_eoy_enask_gq_act_ty_mc_ettx&utm_medium=email&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=&zip=18326&refcode2=5318c02f-c7a8-ee11-bea1-002248221f54&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzgyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MzE4YzAyZi1jN2E4LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjFmNTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j0Pat2wL-N21cUltLmgTp8-K7z2RrvQEyC17IfksXvo=)

clean_body: Thanks to you, we surpassed our end-of-year goal and are set to start off 2024 in a strong position. | Happy New Year, Peter! I’m emailing to express my heartfelt gratitude for your incredible support! Thanks to you, we surpassed our end-of-year goal and are set to start off 2024 in a strong position. I am so grateful to have each of you on my team as we face another tough re-election race. Republicans are already pouring outside money into our district to unseat me. The GOP has declared my race a top target, and they’re prepared to do – and spend – whatever it takes to maintain their slim House majority. But thanks to supporters like you who are stepping up to stop the GOP from bringing their extremist agenda to PA-08, I know we can fight back and win. So Peter, thank you again. It is truly an honor to serve northeastern Pennsylvanians, and I promise to keep fighting for you and your family's best interests in the House. – Matt | In 2022, Matt Cartwright was one of only 5 Democrats to win a House race in a district that Donald Trump carried in 2020. He's gearing up for another tough re-election, and he needs your support to keep PA-08 blue. Rush a donation right away to help Matt protect his seat. | = | "Facebook" "Twitter" "Twitter" | Paid for by Cartwright for Congress | Cartwright For Congress PO Box 414 Scranton, PA 18501 United States Click here to from the Cartwright for Congress.

2024 is here and we’d like to wish everyone a happy new year!
We are excited to get back to work and continue to fight for hardworking people all across Virginia. Our resolutions this year include passing a PDAB in Virginia, creating an economy that is fair for everyone, and making sure all Virginians have a voice in our government.
Our work would not be possible without the support we get from you. We’d like to say thank you for all you’ve done for our organization, and we hope you’ll stick with us through 2024!

name: =?utf-8?Q?Michigan=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: MIGOP E-Newsletter January 1, 2024
body:
We have a lot to update you on. | | | |
---
| **[View email in browser](https://mailchi.mp/868d752b8fb0/migop-newsletter-november-13-12670147?e=a2af77507c)**
---
| | |
## Welcome to the MIGOP Newsletter!
Each Monday, the Michigan Republican Party sends important information about what is happening within the party, state, and nation and how you can get involved.
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
Join fellow Republicans at special events around the state, such as the “[MAGA Mondays: Meet the Candidates](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=7b08014446&e=a2af77507c)” series hosted by the Saginaw County GOP and the “[Campaign Academy](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=48eb107779&e=a2af77507c)” hosted by the Wayne County Republican Committee.

**REMINDER PRECINCT DELEGATES!** Check out this helpful [resource](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=f564ab493c&e=a2af77507c), which gives an overview of each Michigan Republican Party convention and when they take place at the county, district, and state levels. **Mark your calendars and stay tuned for more details!**
For more information about upcoming events, visit the [MIGOP events page](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=9d8274c537&e=a2af77507c).
|
---
|
---

The December 22nd and 29th editions of _[Friday Lunch with Chair Karamo](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=1f3a3fa416&e=a2af77507c)_ are available on the MIGOP website. By Noon each Friday, a new interview with the Chairwoman will be posted.
|
---
|
---
**An important message from Check My Vote:**

_CMV will not support any entities, groups, and individuals who seek to illicitly-politicize our election integrity work. We at CMV, along with our 100s of constitutionalist volunteers, understand that election integrity is a national security issue and not to be co-opted by those invested in maintaining the status-quo of corruptible elections. __**[READ MORE . . .](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=18cf45e328&e=a2af77507c)**_

* * *

_**The Election Security Operations team at the MIGOP is actively seeking Republican volunteers for its 18 areas of responsibility in securing elections. For more information or to sign up, contact Phil O**_ _**’ Halloran at phil@migop.org.**_
|
---
| [ ](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=174cc0cfb8&e=a2af77507c)
---
Be a “good neighbor” and host a movie night at your home with family, friends, and neighbors to watch the documentary _[Let My People Go](mailto:https://letmypeoplego.movie/)_. **_It will change the way you understand and _do_ elections._** Your New Year’s resolutions will be same-day voting with a paper ballot and hand counting! For a 50% discount, use the coupon code **MIGOP**.

To learn more about the Good Neighbor Program, visit the **[NEW GNP webpage](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=0a671a2d51&e=a2af77507c)** or contact coordinators Ken Beyer (District 4 Chair) at **kenbeyer@protonmail.com** and Ann Clark (Wayne County Republican Committee Chair) at **annpatriot@protonmail.com**.
|
---
|
---
From _Just the News_ :“[Cybersecurity breach affects more than 1 million Michiganders](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=e8a0e3acd7&e=a2af77507c)”

From _Gridiron Heroics_ : “[Suspicious Video Has Dallas Cowboys And Detroit Lions Fans Call NFL ‘Rigged’ After Taylor Decker Fiasco](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=c1d15a17b5&e=a2af77507c)”
|
---
|
---
Not satisfied with trying to control our children, schools, guns, food, health, energy usage, land, and livelihoods—while completely ignoring our southern border—the Biden Administration is going after our [appliances](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=12f8c33a7c&e=a2af77507c). Yes, appliances.
|
---
|
---
Get involved with the Michigan Republican Party! Learn more about your county, district, and state party leadership at [migop.org](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=95b43c3d62&e=a2af77507c)[/about](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=0d1531dd9d&e=a2af77507c).

Stay connected with the MIGOP on [X](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=ac2d3b1b35&e=a2af77507c) (Twitter), [Truth Social](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=e06a9baf46&e=a2af77507c), [Telegram](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=e9188a42ec&e=a2af77507c), [Facebook](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=18243cfa81&e=a2af77507c), and [Instagram](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=166e27b387&e=a2af77507c).
|
---
|
---

**Elizabeth Warren stunned us:** []() We’re launching another URGENT ad campaign to abolish the Electoral College and protect our Democracy.

[**Listen, we need $3,941 by midnight tomorrow to make our first payment on the next round of ads. If we can’t keep our ads running, the Electoral College will hand the GOP another Trump presidency! * * *
Look, Elizabeth Warren is 100% right — _every vote does matter!_

The Electoral College has handed Republicans the presidency THREE times since 1988 despite the fact that they’ve only won the popular vote ONCE since then.

The Electoral College is a scam that makes YOUR vote worth less – _it’s SO UNFAIR and COMPLETELY undemocratic!!_

That’s why we’re rushing to raise $3,941 to make our next ad payment by midnight tomorrow and keep our ads running!
[**Please, our proven effective ads are the best way to spread the word about the dangers of the Electoral College. Please, chip in $7 now to help fund our ads »**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/35225?t=9&akid=20587%2E4449941%2Ewzva2U)

The Electoral College is a scam that makes YOUR vote worth less – it’s SO UNFAIR and COMPLETELY undemocratic!! That’s why we’re rushing to raise $3,941 to make our next ad payment by midnight tomorrow and keep our ads running! If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Let’s do this! – Fight for Reform | | Paid political advertisement paid for and provided in kind by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P.O. Box 66005, Washington, D.C. 20035. Your contribution to FFR will be used in connection with FFR’s matching funds program to match the contributions of other contributors. Contributions to End Citizens United Non-Federal are not tax deductible. fightforreform.org Thank you for supporting Fight For Reform, a State Level Project of End Citizens United. The Supreme Court’s 2010 Citizens United v. FEC decision completely changed the landscape of American politics -- it opened the door for billionaires, corporations, and special interests to spend unlimited, untraceable money to influence our elections. Fight For Reform is standing up to Big Money by electing champions of campaign finance reform and voting rights to state government, and passing reform ballot initiatives. Please, consider making a . Or, to help us reject the Big Money status quo in states and cities across the country, make a.** to request fewer emails. Click here to . | |

Peter,
As we bid farewell to 2023 and welcome 2024, I wanted to take a moment to wish you a Happy New Year! May the coming year bring you and your loved ones joy, good health, and prosperity.
Reflecting on the challenges and triumphs of the past year, I am filled with gratitude for the resilience and strength of our community here in Oregon. Together, we have faced uncertainties and celebrated victories, demonstrating the power of unity and determination.
There is so much work to be done in 2024, and I am committed to representing the interests and concerns of our community in Congress.
---

clean_body: | | | | Peter, As we bid farewell to 2023 and welcome 2024, I wanted to take a moment to wish you a Happy New Year! May the coming year bring you and your loved ones joy, good health, and prosperity. Reflecting on the challenges and triumphs of the past year, I am filled with gratitude for the resilience and strength of our community here in Oregon. Together, we have faced uncertainties and celebrated victories, demonstrating the power of unity and determination. There is so much work to be done in 2024, and I am committed to representing the interests and concerns of our community in Congress. | Happy New Year! Lori Chavez-DeRemer Congresswoman OR-05 | | | | | | | | Even as a Congresswoman, Lori’s most important title is mom. That’s how she knows the issues your family faces, and that’s why she fights everyday to make life better for every Oregon family, and every American. Aside from that, all you need to know are the issues she’s fighting for in Congress: If that sounds like the kind of agenda you can get behind, If you’d prefer to give by check, please use the below address: Lori Chavez-DeRemer for Congress 13203 SE 172nd Ave Suite 166 #399 Happy Valley, OR 97086 Forward This message to FIVE FRIENDS AND FAMILY to spread the word on how to achieve a better future for Oregon and America → ** Also text “LORI” to 71800 or click here to receive all of Lori’s messages | | | | Lori Chavez-DeRemer 13203 SE 172nd Ave, Suite 166 #399, Happy Valley, OR 97086 = \- ==

name: Mondaire Jones
subject: You all showed up. Thank you.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MONDAIRE FOR CONGRESS
body:
Because of you, we’re starting the 2024 election year as strong as ever.
Happy 2024, team!

I am thrilled to let you know that our grassroots campaign is starting this election year with a bang.

You all stepped up and showed out. Thanks to your incredible support, we surpassed our ambitious end-of-year goal. I am honored and humbled to fight for you and working people in the lower Hudson Valley. _Thank you._

When our fundraising numbers are made public in just a few days, everyone will be able to see that this grassroots team has what it takes to defeat Mike Lawler and his extreme MAGA Republican allies in Congress. And we can do it without the help of Big Oil, Big Pharma, corporate PACs, and their agendas.

We are building a movement, team, and I’m as committed as ever to working alongside you to defeat MAGA extremism, defend our democracy, protect our basic freedoms, and lower costs.

We’ve got a long road ahead of us this year, but I believe in the power of this grassroots team. I know we can get it done.

Yours,

Mondaire

| Mondaire Jones is running for Congress to finish the work he started last term. He’s ready to fight to lower costs for residents of the Hudson Valley, defend our democracy, raise wages, and protect reproductive rights for all. And he’s doing it without a penny from corporate PACs. [**Donate today to build our grassroots movement and send Mondaire Jones back to Congress and back to body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76292551/447126783/-1849040369?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2024.01.01_B1_EP_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ1ODUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWNjYzc4MTMtY2NhOC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIxZjU0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ZF6eJmbxOuGvFMwAP-GVwRbNjr3tmyGrT0Jea7tWU54=)
_My late great-great-grandfather, Robert Smalls_ Peter, 161 years ago today, Abraham Lincoln signed the Emancipation Proclamation which freed over 3.5 million slaves across rebel Confederate states. This was the first act of what would later be the full emancipation of enslaved Black Americans. Today, I'm also reminded of the heroism of my great-great-grandfather, Robert Smalls (pictured), who was born enslaved in the South. After learning the ropes of how to pilot a ship, he steered himself and several other enslaved Black Americans to freedom during the Civil War. His maneuver took grit, determination, and a whole lot of audacity to get in good trouble. He later came back and served as a representative here in South Carolina. I'm running for Congress to follow in his footsteps and exemplify the same commitment to public service. So, here's my ask for you: [**As we reflect on this pivotal moment in American history, will you consider contributing to my campaign to help me give South Carolinians the leadership and representation they deserve?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76292552/447126784/761589530?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2024.01.01_B1_EP_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ1ODUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWNjYzc4MTMtY2NhOC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIxZjU0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ZF6eJmbxOuGvFMwAP-GVwRbNjr3tmyGrT0Jea7tWU54=) If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | [CHIP IN $25 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76292553/447126785/761589530?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2024.01.01_B1_EP_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ1ODUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWNjYzc4MTMtY2NhOC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIxZjU0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ZF6eJmbxOuGvFMwAP-GVwRbNjr3tmyGrT0Jea7tWU54=)

clean_body: | = My late great-great-grandfather, Robert Smalls Peter, 161 years ago today, Abraham Lincoln signed the Emancipation Proclamation which freed over 3.5 million slaves across rebel Confederate states. This was the first act of what would later be the full emancipation of enslaved Black Americans. Today, I'm also reminded of the heroism of my great-great-grandfather, Robert Smalls (pictured), who was born enslaved in the South. After learning the ropes of how to pilot a ship, he steered himself and several other enslaved Black Americans to freedom during the Civil War. His maneuver took grit, determination, and a whole lot of audacity to get in good trouble. He later came back and served as a representative here in South Carolina. I'm running for Congress to follow in his footsteps and exemplify the same commitment to public service. So, here's my ask for you: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = In solidarity, \- Michael = | | Paid for by Michael B. # [#]
Peter,

Happy New Year! While we look forward to the possibilities ahead, let us acknowledge that there is much work to be done. The challenges we face as a community are significant, but together, we can overcome them.

Your support and engagement are crucial as we work together to make a stronger community. I am honored to serve California’s 4th District, and I look forward to working with you to address the challenges and opportunities that this election year will bring.

Wishing you a joyous new year,

Mike

So that means, if you renew by tonight’s 11:59 P.M. extension, your 2024 Sustaining Membership card will still say you renewed in 2023 to show you stood by our movement at the earliest possible moment. subject: I want to make sure we're on the same page for election year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window.
https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=30b0ac3b096b2a3a284712005507b987e8464f703a344c0f38935dc72d2d0a6d86202411c804e0f583389791de274df395bf070807389937bf273044380c0056f7fbece4eac80d9317f3956edf3b5f2d

Friend,

I campaign the same way I govern: with honesty and integrity. When it comes to my team, I want to make sure we're always on the same page about how you're doing and what you'd like to see from our campaign.

Will you take a moment to respond to our quarterly check in so I can be sure we're going into the Iowa caucuses on the same page?

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=336df3468c2f987eac377b130da37b830c1db2f12ca84ddfe050b1b101f5493fbcc6ab58c5e04142cb9295e86cd19eea7ee386b12cf0375831a489775e42937e
RESPOND TO THE SURVEY

I believe you're the most impacful part of my team, and it's why we rely on you during every critical moment. You are the foundation of this team, and I'd really like to know how you're doing. If you have a few moments to spare, I look forward to seeing your response!

Happy New Year from my family to yours,

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=336df3468c2f987eac377b130da37b830c1db2f12ca84ddfe050b1b101f5493fbcc6ab58c5e04142cb9295e86cd19eea7ee386b12cf0375831a489775e42937e

Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=336df3468c2f987eac377b130da37b830c1db2f12ca84ddfe050b1b101f5493fbcc6ab58c5e04142cb9295e86cd19eea7ee386b12cf0375831a489775e42937e

🚨 ATTENTION 🚨

Heads up! We have pre-checked the monthly donor box on our fundraising page. Monthly donors make a HUGE difference for our team and help ups plan ahead.

If one donation was all it took to defeat Joe Biden next November then we wouldn't ask for your help more than we already have, but unfortunately it's going to take more than that to win.

Please keep this box checked so we that we can count on your support.

Volunteer!

We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=336df3468c2f987e0d771fca7d2775a67160ff74300eafe05ee98e746d78929b1f944ad602a95a0b0efc4f3195224cf91635b178a419f1265cdf5e3b12d70b13
Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=336df3468c2f987eac377b130da37b830c1db2f12ca84ddfe050b1b101f5493fbcc6ab58c5e04142cb9295e86cd19eea7ee386b12cf0375831a489775e42937e

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=336df3468c2f987eac377b130da37b830c1db2f12ca84ddfe050b1b101f5493fbcc6ab58c5e04142cb9295e86cd19eea7ee386b12cf0375831a489775e42937e

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

- I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
- This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
- I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
- I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Thank you (and sorry)
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Hey, I wanted to email (again) this morning to thank you for wading through all the other emails and text messages we sent ahead of last night's FEC fundraising deadline.
#

Peter -
Hey, I wanted to email (again) this morning to thank you for wading through all the other emails and text messages we sent ahead of last night's FEC fundraising deadline.
They are such a huge part of the way we fund this campaign, so I hope you will view them as a small price to pay for replacing Senator Sinema and making sure that we keep Kari Lake out of the Senate.
We're going to file our report soon, and when we do I think you'll be very proud of the way we fund this campaign. It's going to tell a story of a campaign funded by lots and lots of regular people chipping-in what they can, when they can.
It's humbling.
So thank you again.
And happy New Year!
Ruben Gallego

The **Deep State Globalists** will pull out all the stops in this upcoming election year just like in 2020. The question then becomes: **what should we do to be ready for 2024?** I preached about this subject on Sunday at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=4821412.1636.1.bb999aad890f683cb2c0f117b97ad1a2) and I encourage you to check it out because it will help prepare you for what is coming. name: Adam Schiff
subject: Let’s make 2024 a year to remember
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| 2024 will be a defining year in the history of the United States, and I intend to finish it in a position to serve every single Californian as your next U.S. Senator to bring the change we desperately need to the Senate.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=4944%2E5257348%2EteVBwt)
Derek, there are few things that are certain about the new year.
Californians are struggling with the high cost of living, the climate crisis threatens our communities with drought, wildfires, and floods, there’s a lack of affordable housing and too many are struggling with homelessness, and the Supreme Court has been ripping away our fundamental freedoms.
For the first time in U.S. history, a major party presidential candidate — a former president, no less — is facing four separate criminal indictments spanning 91 charges, not the least of which is for his attempt to overthrow the 2020 election in an authoritarian coup.
And the United States Senate is mired in dysfunction, subject to Mitch McConnell and the Republican Party’s abuse of a legislative filibuster that appears nowhere within our Constitution, which they have used time and again to stymie increases to the minimum wage, immigration reform, workers’ rights, and more.
**2024 will be a defining year in the history of the United States, and I intend to finish it in a position to serve the country as California’s next U.S. Senator — so we can bring about the change we desperately need.**
I’m going to be relying on your support a great deal this year, and I know that every member of this team is up to the challenge.
From the fight to hold Trump accountable with impeachment, to serving on the January 6 Select Committee, to my removal from the House Intelligence Committee and Republicans’ partisan censure of me under Donald Trump’s personal threat last year, you have _always_ remained by my side. Fighting back. Speaking truth to power. And never tiring in our work to make our government live up to the promise of this country.
I’m grateful.
We have a two-month sprint to California’s U.S. primary election on March 5 — Super Tuesday.
Let’s get going.
With you,
Adam

Derek, there are few things that are certain about the new year. Californians are struggling with the high cost of living, the climate crisis threatens our communities with drought, wildfires, and floods, there’s a lack of affordable housing and too many are struggling with homelessness, and the Supreme Court has been ripping away our fundamental freedoms. For the first time in U.S. history, a major party presidential candidate — a former president, no less — is facing four separate criminal indictments spanning 91 charges, not the least of which is for his attempt to overthrow the 2020 election in an authoritarian coup. And the United States Senate is mired in dysfunction, subject to Mitch McConnell and the Republican Party’s abuse of a legislative filibuster that appears nowhere within our Constitution, which they have used time and again to stymie increases to the minimum wage, immigration reform, workers’ rights, and more. 2024 will be a defining year in the history of the United States, and I intend to finish it in a position to serve the country as California’s next U.S. Senator — so we can bring about the change we desperately need. I’m going to be relying on your support a great deal this year, and I know that every member of this team is up to the challenge. From the fight to hold Trump accountable with impeachment, to serving on the January 6 Select Committee, to my removal from the House Intelligence Committee and Republicans’ partisan censure of me under Donald Trump’s personal threat last year, you have always remained by my side. Fighting back. Speaking truth to power. And never tiring in our work to make our government live up to the promise of this country. I’m grateful. We have a two-month sprint to California’s U.S. primary election on March 5 — Super Tuesday. Let’s get going. With you, Adam | | 135 E. Welcome to 2024, Peter! With another year behind us and a new one just starting, I would like to reiterate my gratitude for your continued support. 2023 has been one of the most eventful years of my life. I was sworn in to the U.S. Senate, fought for our conservative values, and even wrote and published a book. But my favorite part of the last year has to be all of the memories I’ve made traveling across Alabama and meeting with constituents. Alabama is truly the greatest state in the nation, and all of the incredible people I’ve had the privilege of getting to know prove it. **[I can’t wait to continue serving Alabamians and meeting with constituents from Mobile to Muscle Shoals!](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=479f0be17aa94ae78e12c3403f66e17b&_e=qdhdBLFaVeG11GZyPUefBWlOxIPyqtu0qZTUaoUTt8UjhjwV3GO4euNrKG1_jD3ttGqkY_0EU2zy192W0lCk0qa3tv_YzwcI1_k0YbeQ-5MkyYy2E_orF94K85aKTWRE6FMRbrry8_8HRXJlJb7B-cbY5RBF45xUXV0n42YAbATjU2sKamfQmQUFAP9o5uoitrnjZtTmop9NZPr98HjG5PlDCcgzajA8YLRf5SEzT8BkRLJjR4BRj4iQkeLMvewYJ27GMyfd9nUJS6hPH2edaHkS3eMhfD_clyJ5quhpWl8ucUD-x1V0MnGoB1JWM4azz7w6ootR113uI-LEsKnnF8qXYc8ZqKevN1x0NfI6_z8USyZGj6_TNM4wwM1zDk-wdEduNSO2MFPmNR4zjWRvecYFmpFyGTHoSzHQ2lNAL18%3D)** Peter, you’ve made all of this possible and I can’t wait to continue fighting for our shared values in 2024. Thanks for your support! Sincerely, Katie Britt P.S. 2024 is going to be the most important election year of our lifetime. The House, Senate, and Presidency are all going to be up for grabs. If you’re able to, could you help my team start 2024 off right with a **[quick contribution of any amount?](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=479f0be17aa94ae78e12c3403f66e17b&_e=qdhdBLFaVeG11GZyPUefBWlOxIPyqtu0qZTUaoUTt8UjhjwV3GO4euNrKG1_jD3ttGqkY_0EU2zy192W0lCk0qa3tv_YzwcI1_k0YbeQ-5MkyYy2E_orF94K85aKTWRE6FMRbrry8_8HRXJlJb7B-cbY5RBF45xUXV0n42YAbATjU2sKamfQmQUFAP9o5uoitrnjZtTmop9NZPr98HjG5PlDCcgzajA8YLRf5SEzT8BkRLJjR4BRj4iQkeLMvewYJ27GMyfd9nUJS6hPH2edaKzVNipnoFIKt8I-kWyXNWjacoH8my7sm4gRqTiCtr65YkH2fi6ETyMgjwZJayZxAiIJKozdQDn5cMopklHuSMh6yQHQSKVN68RWyxR0JTjUifpMCb_Ak_Ji1CfMAC-xcotH6ZLkbUmPogH31p8R6z8%3D)**

| | Patriot,

---
_**Arrests, mugshots, indictments, lawsuits, trials, ballot removals...**_
---
Corrupt Washington Democrats thought last year would spell the END of the “Donald J. Trump for President Campaign.”
---
They believed they had devised an air-tight plan to destroy our campaign and eliminate Crooked Joe’s leading opponent for the White House.
---
And yet, here we are, at the beginning of 2024, _leading_ in the polls, _leading_ in battleground states, _winning_ over first-time voters, and _winning_ over Independent and even Democrat voters.
---
_But I want to make myself 100% clear. I am not taking credit for our unbelievable resilience._

I just wanted to reach out quickly to wish you a very Happy New Year! 2023 was a year full of challenges, both seen and unforeseen. 2024 will likely be similar, but I’m proud that we’re on the same team and I’m ready to go through this ride together. One of those unforeseen challenges is Lauren Boebert deciding to jump districts into our race! But with the challenge comes an opportunity to take out one of the most divisive and extreme Republicans in Congress. I look forward to that opportunity, but I’ll need you on my team if we’re going to defeat her and her big-money backers. Tomorrow, the real work begins to go and win this race. But for today, I hope you’re able to take some time to be with your family and friends and to celebrate the turning of a new year! All the best, John I'm John Padora, a Democrat running for Congress in CD-04. Lauren Boebert recently jumped into my district in a desperate attempt to stay in DC. My campaign is powered by grassroots donations - donate anything you can monthly to keep Boebert OUT of this seat. Paid for by Padora for Colorado

| Exclusive Updates and Behind-the-Scenes Snaps from Chuck's Campaign Journey

---
| | |
---
| |
---
|

In 2023, our Campaign has been on the move, crisscrossing the Granite State, and the journey has been nothing short of incredible. We've covered thousands of miles, attending 138 events in over 50 towns! We have:
\- Visited over 40 local businesses \- Spoke at 28 Local GOP Meetings \- Attended 20 fairs and festivals \- Walked in 6 parades But it's not just about the numbers; it's about the connections we've made along the way. These experiences are more than just campaign highlights; they're the heart and soul of our grassroots movement. Each business we visit, every meeting we attend, and each person we meet, reinforces our commitment to a campaign focused on winning for our Granite State. Stay tuned as we continue to unveil the stories and moments that make our grassroots journey truly unique!

Stay tuned as we continue to unveil the stories and moments that make our grassroots journey truly unique! | | | | | | | | | Campaign Kick off Event in Atkinson! | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Working to preserve our 2nd amendment rights! **** | | | | | | | | | | | Honoring our nation's heroes. Thank you to our Granite State Veterans! | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Engaging with the incredible women of the NHFRW - a force for change, unity, and progress. Grateful to have been awarded their Associate Member Of The Year Award in honor of an incredible leader, and dear friend, Dick Hinch! | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Spent some time in Pittsburg learning about the issues on our Northern Border. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | First In the Nation Summit was a success! | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | From Shop Floors to the State House: Witnessing the Backbone of New Hampshire's Economy! | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Attended community events across New Hampshire! | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Donated toys for the children at Family Promise Nashua! What an amazing organization! | | | | | | | | | | | | Thanks to former Senate President Tom Eaton for hosting an incredible house party in Cheshire County! | | | | | | | | | | | | Giving back to those in need this Thanksgiving | | | | | | | | | | | | Had a blast joining supporters in Durham to endorse Donald Trump! | | | | | | | | | | | | Traveled to Berlin to speak with voters about local issues | | | | | | | | | | | | Enjoying some homemade Italian food in Hollis! | | | | | | | | | | | | | Make Chuck Morse our next Governor of New Hampshire! | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|--- | Friends of Chuck Morse Paid for by Friends of Chuck Morse, Dan Norris Treasurer PO Box 106, North Salem NH 03073 United States tel:603 609 9011 mailto:cm@chuckmorsefornh.com You received this email because you signed up on our website or made a purchase from us.

name: Carmen Goers
subject: Happy New Year from the Carmen Goers Campaign
body:
Celebrating Fantastic Supporters Like You

| | | | | | | |
---
| | | |
---
| | | **Here 's to Victory in 2024!****
**
---

Dear Peter,
As fireworks fade and resolutions bloom, the 8th District campaign team reflects on your unwavering support. Your tireless efforts – doors answered, ballots cast, voices raised – paved the path to a promising year.
From town halls to mountain passes, we built connections, heard your hopes, and felt the pulse of our extraordinary community. Together, we've laid the groundwork for victory in 2024.
So, friends, raise a glass, toast to dreams yet to be dreamt, and join us on this journey. As the calendar turns, let's march into the future, united and unstoppable.
---
| | | |
---
| | | Happy New Year, 8th District! Forward to victory!

Sincerely,

Carmen Goers

name: Ritchie
subject: I’m amazed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458
body:
Thank you, Peter

|
---
Peter, I’m amazed.

First of all, I need to thank you.

I know we’ve bombarded you with emails the last few days, but I have great news: **We hit our 2023 end-of-year goal.**

And since I don’t do a single minute of call time, **the success of 2023 is fully thanks to grassroots supporters like you.**

I hope you had a wonderful holiday season, and I’m incredibly grateful for your support.

Thank you again,

_Ritchie_
| | Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458
www.torres.nyc

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

Click here to [receive fewer emails](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76307418/447149528/-250809415?refcode=RTFC_20240101_EMINFO_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4M2I1MDZlYS1lY2E4LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjFmNTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GsnymejMuYEwMNFwBngc0lhdaiKwv3wRrK0a3tlHzWc=&emci=d58a3ffb-24a1-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&emdi=83b506ea-eca8-ee11-bea1-002248221f54&ceid=34594689). I'll be posting [my predictions](https://substack.com/redirect/8db7a269-26e6-4b94-b690-9a082de3d0c8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) later this week, but in the interim, I wanted to wish you and your family a happy and healthy 2024!
[](https://substack.com/redirect/d8f51604-d465-4230-b4b3-166be34d1a94?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
### A Recommended Resolution
As many of you are aware, I've long felt that every perspective is biased, incomplete and limited, and it's therefore simply impossible to fully-appreciate anything without adopting multiple perspectives. This is true in business, medicine, and almost all walks of life.
Yet for most of us, we tend to use social media, particular networks, or even particular personalities to guide us towards particular information. Unfortunately, that tends to create an echo chamber in which we are bombarded with perspectives that match our own. Many have used this reality to complain about the relative dearth of trustworthy news.
**I have a different take.** Rather than lament the biased nature of today's information sources, I just accept it as a reality (every source has a limited perspective!) and seek to compensate for the bias with offsetting views that make it easier for me to **think for myself**.
If you're a regular consumer of _Fox News_ , for instance, I'd suggest you also turn on _CNN_ or _MSNBC_ to hear other perspectives. (Likewise, if you regularly listen to _NPR_ , you might try turning on the _Howie Carr Show_). You need not agree with the other outlets or their takes on the news of the day, but the mere act of being exposed to different interpretations will prevent you from blindly believing certain views.
All of this brings me to my recommended resolution. Given the most common resolution made each year has to do with diets, **I 'd like to suggest we all diversify our media diets and begin consuming information from a variety of sources**. Increasing our appreciation (and understanding) of differing views can create fertile ground in which civil discourse across important issues can grow and thrive, a dynamic that just might help reduce the polarization that is tearing our nation apart.
I discuss this idea, and a lot more, in my forthcoming book, _**The Making of a Generalist**_ , which will be released later this month...Stay tuned for more information!
In the meantime, Happy 2024!

[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..-qQDAS08eexW2bGiHXDULuYKTo9gx-HP1RwZPSpooSM?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=140161723)
### About Vikram Mansharamani
Vikram Mansharamani is an entrepreneur, consultant, scholar, neighbor, husband, father, volunteer, and professional generalist who thinks in multiple-dimensions and looks beyond the short-term. Self-taught to think around corners and connect original dots, he spends his time speaking with global leaders in business, government, academia, and journalism. _LinkedIn_ has twice listed him as its #1 Top Voice in Money & Finance, and _Worth _profiled him as one of the 100 Most Powerful People in Global Finance. Vikram earned a PhD From MIT, has taught at Yale and Harvard, and is the author of two books,_[Think for Yourself: Restoring Common Sense in an Age of Experts and Artificial Intelligence](https://substack.com/redirect/53ddefd7-f463-4926-be5d-f14269583f9a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) _and _[Boombustology: Spotting Financial Bubbles Before They Burst](https://substack.com/redirect/9b446d8b-2672-464c-8829-c3848743f2ed?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). _Vikram lives in Lincoln, New Hampshire with his wife and two children, where they can usually be found hiking or skiing.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/f179c6c0-9521-467d-a551-72eacad7f3ea?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

LinkedIn has twice listed him as its #1 Top Voice in Money & Finance, and Worth profiled him as one of the 100 Most Powerful People in Global Finance. Vikram earned a PhD From MIT, has taught at Yale and Harvard, and is the author of two books, and . Vikram lives in Lincoln, New Hampshire with his wife and two children, where they can usually be found hiking or skiing. | | ---|---|--- Invite your friends and earn rewards If you enjoy Navigating Uncertainty, share it with your friends and earn rewards when they subscribe. | | | | | | | (C) 2024 Vikram Mansharamani PO BOX 932, Lincoln, NH 03251 ? ?

Vice President Kamala Harris is making HISTORY! As the first woman Vice President, she’s shattered one of the TALLEST glass ceilings in our country.

_But despite her hard work,_ Republicans are smearing her DAILY in hopes of sabotaging Democrats’ chances of retaining the White House this year.

**AND IT’S WORKING – VP Harris’ approval rating is CRATERING across the country!**

[**We will not stand for this – but we need strong Democrats like YOU to use your voice and support our Vice President! Sign your name before midnight »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Stand-with-Harris?source=VPP_20240101_EMPET_E3_T0_AC_RS&t=9&akid=12260%2E878179%2ErRTYNY) | [ADD YOUR NAME: STAND WITH VICE PRESIDENT HARRIS »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Stand-with-Harris?source=VPP_20240101_EMPET_E3_T0_AC_RS&t=10&akid=12260%2E878179%2ErRTYNY)

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=12260%2E878179%2ErRTYNY). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=12260%2E878179%2ErRTYNY).**

We’re already preparing for our next big fight – state Democrats are facing nearly a dozen special elections in the next few months. President Obama is calling out the importance of Democratic leadership in the states – it’s up to grassroots supporters like you to listen to him and help elect state Democrats now. **By renewing your 2024 DLCC membership _today_ you can help pave a path for Democratic wins this year and beyond. **
**As an official member, you’ll be at the forefront of the fight against state Republicans’ extremist agenda, helping elect Democrats who will work to secure a progressive future for states like yours. So, can we count you in?**

name: Bob Casey
subject: Grateful to have you by my side
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=1569%2E552475%2Ebvuu5M)
Happy New Year, Peter.
I wanted to take a moment to thank you for being a part of this team. It’s because of thousands of grassroots supporters like you who chipped in when they could that we’re ready to hit the ground running this Election Year.
Now, with the 2024 election cycle officially in full swing, I need your continued support. Mitch McConnell and my mega-millionaire opponent are gearing up to flood PA with loads of dark money to buy this seat and flip the Senate red.
My friend James Carville said it best: If we lose here, “we blow a gasket.” That's why I'm grateful to have you by my side as we fight to keep PA and the Senate in Democratic hands. You're the reason Democrats won in PA in 2022, and you're the reason we're going to do it again this year.
Thank you again for your support, Peter. I'm wishing you and your loved ones a happy and healthy new year.
With gratitude,
Bob
Bob Casey is facing the toughest re-election fight of his career. Pennsylvania is a key battleground of 2024, and Mitch McConnell has already listed Bob as one of his top targets. Losing here could mean losing the Senate, so we need all hands on deck. [**Will you chip in today to become a 2024 Founding Donor and help us keep PA and the Senate blue?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240101-1?amount=5&refcode=em20240101-1&refcode2=1569_552475_bvuu5M&akid=1569%2E552475%2Ebvuu5M) **[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240101-1?refcode=em20240101-1&refcode2=1569_552475_bvuu5M&akid=1569%2E552475%2Ebvuu5M)**

clean_body: Here's why your signature -- today -- is so important: | | | It’s go time, Peter. We’re officially in the election year, which means we’re closer than ever to finding out our eventual GOP opponent. Whether it’s Donald Trump or another MAGA Republican, we must show that President Biden and Vice President Harris have a movement of grassroots supporters backing them 100% of the way. | | | Here's why your signature -- today -- is so important: Republicans are spending millions on attack ads in key states across the country. They’re promising to enact extremist policies that threaten to take away our fundamental freedoms and roll back our progress. The only way we can keep them out of the Oval Office is by putting in the hard work now \-- not months from now. Adding your name might seem like a small gesture, but by the time you read this, thousands of folks have already signed on. Now they’re counting on you to join them, Peter. | | Team Biden-Harris

Dear Peter,
Time to celebrate YOU!
YOU are the reason we can pop the champagne.
You see, we crossed $6,000,000 in the Fourth Quarter and it’s all because of you.
This achievement will put to rest the establishment parties’ wishful thinking that our campaign has no staying power.
Achieving this early show of strength will tell the mainstream, out-of-touch political parties something they don’t want to hear: **_The Republicans and the Democrats are _not_ the only game in town._**
The people are rising up, they are resisting, and they are voting with their pocket books to support an Independent candidate for President.
Make no mistake, meeting this goal will only add fuel to the firestorm sweeping the nation.
There is an unmistakable desire to reshape America, to build and protect a vibrant Middle Class, to protect our rights, to support young families in search for affordable housing, to recall our military men and women home from abroad, and to restore the industrial manufacturing base of the United States.
We have done it before, and with your help in 2024, we can do it again.
Thank you and stay tuned!
Team Kennedy

Friend,
Today marks a very special day for our movement to save America from the Left’s tyranny.
**This is the first day of the 2024 election year, and consequently, the moment when I see who my FIRST supporters of 2024 will be. **
